faqs.question: Is East Point Group of Institutions tier 1 college?
faqs.answer: Yes, East Point Group of Institutions has all the qualities of a tier 1 college. East Point Group of Institutions offers UG, PG, and other programmes to students. These courses are given across the Engineering, Health Sciences, and various other streams. The flagship programmes available at the college are B.E. and BSc. East Point Group of Institutions Bangalore awards scholarships to students as financial assistance. East Point Group of Institutions has various colleges under it. There are value-added programmes available for students, who opt for the “PROFESSIONAL TRACK” and are designed in alignment with market demands and emerging technological advancements.

college_info.intro:
East Point Group of Institutions popular programmes are BSc and B.E. BSc is available in 6 specialisations, namely Cardiac Care Technology, Anaesthesia & Operation Theatre Technology, Medical Imaging Technology, Medical Laboratory Technology, Perfusion Technology, and Emergency & Trauma Care Technology. The group has a total of 600+ teaching faculty and has 35,000+ alumni across the globe. The East Point Group of Institutions has strong ties with industry leaders & recruitment partners that have resulted in 97% placement rate.
East Point Group of Institutions is visited by top companies for placements such as Amazon, VM Ware, Dell, EMC, Salesforce, Robert Bosch, GE Health Care, etc. The college provides diverse co-curricular activities for a well-rounded education. The East Point Group of Institutions students receive scholarship assistance. The below are the East Point College courses and their respective fee and eligibility criteria:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement with supportive faculty and facilities.

review_content.Placements: The placement opportunities in our college are good. Many reputed companies visit every year. They are giving students a chance to start their careers well. The placement cell provides useful training, mock interviews, and proper support. Many students get placed with good packages.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure for our course. It has well-equipped classrooms, labs, and Wi-Fi that support learning. The hostel is clean and safe. It provides proper food, water, and electricity. Overall, it provides a comfortable stay and study environment.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued(Feb-2026)- Master of Business Administration (MBA Professional) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A good college with placement and solid infrastructure, but needs a little improvement in mess food.

review_content.Placements: 90% of students are placed during the 2025 campus selection process. The highest package offered is 7-8 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. The majority of students are offered a package ranging from 3 to 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Amazon, Deloitte, Oracle, IBM, and many more. The institution helps us obtain internships in many companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has the best computer labs, study areas, smart classrooms, conference rooms, and it is a Wi-Fi-enabled campus with a digital library. The hostel rooms are 2 or 3 sharing. The mess food is hygienic and tasty, but not many options given. There is a hospital on campus with 24 hour medical facility. Students can use their free time for sports or extracurricular activities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Anaesthesia and Operation Theatre Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely recommended for students who need college life and a better education.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80% of students get placed. In our seniors, the highest package is 8 LPA for the total course, and I got it for 7 LPA. Almost 5 companies recruit students. The college has a hospital, so students get internships for free and also get an amount incentive for the internship. I am studying Anesthesia and Operation Theatre Technology and many other allied courses offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything we need is there in the hospital. Facilities are so nice. Every medical facility has because it is a super specialty hospital with 500+ beds. For students, there is a huge, spacious, air-conditioned library where we can study, and in the library every book we need to study. Labs and classrooms are also air-conditioned with a pleasant ambience for studying. The hostel offers multiple types of rooms that are 3-sharing, 2-sharing, 4-sharing, and premium. The hostel food is also tasty and clean.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E in Information Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members and good placements.

review_content.Placements: I took the course information science engineering, as I know my seniors about 70% of them were placed from our college. The highest package is around 25 LPA. 45% of students got internships. Roles offered are data analyst, data scientist, etc. I am loving the campus life.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in all the classrooms, labs, and hostels. The quality of hostel food is not bad. But we get good food in the canteen. Medical facilities are awesome. Sports and games are fun. I just love the food chain and coffee. We have around 4 canteens on our campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: This is an average college.

review_content.Placements: Yes, according to our seniors, placements are for those who score well. The highest package was 25 LPA, and the lowest was 3-3.5 LPA. Companies include Blinkit, Zomato, AWS, and Infosys. Actually, the real placement percentage is 20-25%. Roles, as per our seniors, include background designer and some other higher posts if they score well.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel room is kind of good, but the food is the worst, as it's Kerala style, and I am from Karnataka, so I am not adjusted to it. Classrooms are updated right now, and they also provide a digital library. Sports are conducted only once a year, and there is a grand event in May called Samskruthi, which is conducted for three days in a row.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Superb college, excellent faculty members, and plenty of job opportunities.

review_content.Placements: From B.Tech, almost 90 percentof the students got placed. The salary package offered is nearly 25 LPA and the lowest is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Tekion, Trellix, Versed, UST, Dell, Sonata Software, Toyoma Control, Wistron Infocomm Manufacturing Pvt Ltd, Harman Inc, Artech InfoSystems, Intellipaat, NTT Data, Artech, and CGI. All the students got internships through on campus placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good. The building and classrooms are spacious. The food quality is good. You can get North and South Indian food at mess. The hostel fee is around Rs 75,000 per annum including food, laundry and hostel room which is also well maintained.

admission_overview.college_name: East Point Group of Institutions Course Admissions 2026: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_overview.title: East Point Group of Institutions Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: East Point Group of Institutions offers a number of courses at the UG, PG and Diploma level. The courses are offered in the multiple domains of Engineering, Management, etc. The courses are offered in affiliation with RGUHS, VTU and BNU. EPGI admissions are both merit-based or entrance exam-based. The mode of application at EPGI is completely online. For entrance-based admissions, EPGI accepts valid scores of various state/ national-level entrance exams such as KCET, JEE Main, PGCET, MAT, CAT, etc., for respective courses. The duration of most UG courses is three to four years while the duration of most PG courses is two years. Diploma courses extend up to two years.

eligibility_selection.title: East Point Group of Institutions Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Admissions at EPGI are both merit and entrance-based. For admission to EPGI courses, candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria and qualify for the selection rounds. admission_process.title: East Point Group of Institutions Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: East Point Group of Institutions admissions consist of a number of rounds. It includes fulfilling the minimum eligibility criteria, applying online and qualifying for the selection rounds for respective courses. More details around EPGI admission process are as follows:
Step 1: Application Process

To apply for UG & PG courses at EPGI, candidates must visit the official website of the institute and fill an online application for their desired programme. Check below the step-wise application process for EPGI admission 2026:
Image source: Official website
Step 2: Selection Criteria

EPGI admissions are both merit and entrance-based. For admission to courses such as BBA, BCom, BCA, etc., candidates are admitted based on their merit of the last qualifying exams. However, for admission to courses such as BTech, MBA, etc., the college offers entrance-based admissions.
Step 3: Final Admission
Once all the selection rounds are completed, the selected candidates will be notified. Further, the selected candidates must pay a certain amount of fee and get the academic documents verified.

faqs.question: Which BTech specialisation does East Point Group of Institutions offer?
faqs.answer: East Point Group of Institutions offers a four-year BTech course across eight specialisations via its East Point College of Engineering and Technology. This course is offered in affiliation with Visvesvaraya Technological University (VTU). Find below all the BTech specialisations offered at EPGI:Computer Science and EngineeringCSE (IoT, Cyber Security with Block Chain Technology)Information Science EngineeringArtificial Intelligence & Data ScienceCSE (AI & ML)Electronics and Communication Engine

faqs.question: What is the basic eligibility for BTech at the East Point Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: To apply for admission to BTech at EPGI, it's mandatory to pass Class 12 with a minimum of 45% aggregate in Physics, Mathematics, and English along with Chemistry/ Biotechnology / Biology / Computer / Electronics subjects as per the basic eligibility for BE/ BTech at East Point Group of Institutions. Candidates belonging to SC/ST and Category-1 (Karnataka only) need a minimum of 40% aggregate to be eligible for the course. The final selection is done based on a valid score of either KCET or JEE

faqs.question: Are direct admissions available at East Point Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, direct admissions are available for some courses at the East Point Group of Institutions. Students must apply timely for direct admissions to avoid delay in the complete admission process.

faqs.question: How can students apply for admission to various courses at East Point Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: The mode ofEPGI Bangalore course admissionsis online. Admission to various courses is based on merit and entrance test scores. The accepted entrance exams areCOMEDK UGET, KCET,JEE Main, and others. Students who wish to get admission must first reach the official site. Then, click on the Apply Now tab. Then, select the needed course and pay the application fee. Fill out and submit the application form with all the needed details.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam required for admission to MBA at East Point Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, admission to a two-year MBA course at East Point Group of Institutions is totally based on the scores obtained in any state/ national-level entrance exam. Interested candidates can apply via scores of either PGCET/ KMAT/ CAT/ MAT. Those who pass graduation in any stream with minimum 50% aggregate are eligible to apply for this course. The final admission is done based on candidates' past academic records along with their scores obtained in the respective entrance exams.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission in East Point Group of Institutions for MBA?
faqs.answer: To get admitted to East Point Group of institutions for the degree of Master of Business Administration (MBA Global) course, applicants must meet the entry requirements - 50% in graduation hence it is easy to get admission in it as there are 180 seats offered for admission and the total tuition fee is around 4 Lakhs hence it is easy to get admission on it.

placement_report.college_name: East Point Group of Institutions Placements 2025: Highest, Average Salary Package & Top Companies

placement_data.title: East Point Group of Institutions Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The highest package offered during East Point Group of Institutions placement 2024 was INR 25 LPA . The average package was 6.5 LPA . The median and lowest package offered was INR 8 LPA and INR 4 LPA . The season witnessed 1200 placements and 4996 offers were made. More than 2000 multiple offers were given. The highest stipend recorded was INR 50 Thousand per month . Over 1000 recruiters took part in the placement drive. The top recruiters included Amazon, Wipro and Google.

cut_off.college_name: East Point Group of Institutions Cutoff 2025: Check COMEDK Round-Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: East Point College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to BE/BTech programmes via the COMEDK UGCET examination. Students can view the exam-wise sections below to know the cutoffs for various accepted examinations across different rounds, categories and quotas. Refer to the pointers below for more exam-related updates:
Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table given below to download the consolidated NEET UG Counselling Rounds for the General All India category students:

East Point College Karnataka PGCET Round 2 Seat Allotment ranks are out for admission to MBA/ MCA courses. However, the Round 2 cutoff is behind the login and is only accessible via student login. In the meantime, candidates can refer to the table given below to check out the East Point College Round 1 cutoff for the General All India category candidates along with previous years' trends.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.E in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) has the lowest cutoff rank of 49188.5 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 53577, in the General All India quota.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:

According to the East Point College B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.E in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) stood at 59837 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

For the HS quota, the cutoff rank for the same specialisation was 84027. Comparing both the quotas, the last round cutoff rank for General AI category students was more competitive for admission than the HS quota students.

East Point Group of Institutions accepts KEA NEET UG scores for admission to the MBBS/MDS courses. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table given below to check out the previous year KEA NEET UG cutoff trends.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement with supportive faculty and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure for our course. It has well-equipped classrooms, labs, and Wi-Fi that support learning. The hostel is clean and safe. It provides proper food, water, and electricity. Overall, it provides a comfortable stay and study environment.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with placement and solid infrastructure, but needs a little improvement in mess food.
reviews.review_text: The college has the best computer labs, study areas, smart classrooms, conference rooms, and it is a Wi-Fi-enabled campus with a digital library. The hostel rooms are 2 or 3 sharing. The mess food is hygienic and tasty, but not many options given. There is a hospital on campus with 24 hour medical facility. Students can use their free time for sports or extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely recommended for students who need college life and a better education.
reviews.review_text: Everything we need is there in the hospital. Facilities are so nice. Every medical facility has because it is a super specialty hospital with 500+ beds. For students, there is a huge, spacious, air-conditioned library where we can study, and in the library every book we need to study. Labs and classrooms are also air-conditioned with a pleasant ambience for studying. The hostel offers multiple types of rooms that are 3-sharing, 2-sharing, 4-sharing, and premium. The hostel food is also tasty and...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in all the classrooms, labs, and hostels. The quality of hostel food is not bad. But we get good food in the canteen. Medical facilities are awesome. Sports and games are fun. I just love the food chain and coffee. We have around 4 canteens on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: This is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel room is kind of good, but the food is the worst, as it's Kerala style, and I am from Karnataka, so I am not adjusted to it. Classrooms are updated right now, and they also provide a digital library. Sports are conducted only once a year, and there is a grand event in May called Samskruthi, which is conducted for three days in a row.

reviews.review_heading: Superb college, excellent faculty members, and plenty of job opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. The building and classrooms are spacious. The food quality is good. You can get North and South Indian food at mess. The hostel fee is around Rs 75,000 per annum including food, laundry and hostel room which is also well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: East Point is a better platform for corporate field jobs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of East Point is better than any college in India. East Point has numerous well-designed labs, library and computers. Classrooms are well furnished and attached with digital screens and high-speed internet Wi-Fi connectivity. The college has a hospital with 24/7 service and physiotherapy and all medical facilities are available. The hostel facility is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides the best education, which is worth the .oney.
reviews.review_text: The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled with good speed. The classrooms are well furnished and the good environment to study. The college has a good and big library. Students can get good knowledge from them. Medical facilities are available 24/7 and sports meets are organised to encourage student sports.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college to learn.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good and is available in both colleges. There are many labs, and labs work well. Classrooms are good. Digital screens are attached to each classroom. There is a big library, and textbooks and novels are available in the library. Medical facilities are good. A hospital is available 24X7. There are grounds to play any sports, and all the required kits are available.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty and college infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is beautiful, and the rules and regulations are very good. The infrastructure is excellent, and the hostel fees are very reasonable. Wi-Fi is available everywhere on campus, including the classrooms. The library is very good for studying without any disturbance, and the college even has its own hospital with 24/7 service.

reviews.review_heading: Pradeep's review of East Point Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text:
There are many blocks in the college. 
The Wi-Fi is very slow, little to not working, and working borderline classrooms are 2/5; there's one screen that is never used, and the chairs are cheap. The library is fine, the best thing in the college; probably they even have a digital library, and they practice a scan and register system, which is really cool.
Now when it comes to hostel food, the hostel food is fine but the seating arrangement is awful and never has enough space or is not that clean;...

reviews.review_heading: The college has great facilities.
reviews.review_text: For coming to the college, buses are available for day scholars. The library is the best on campus and it is filled with many books. Wi-Fi is also available throughout the campus. The best hostel with excellent rooms available. Rooms are well maintained and a medical facility is also available.

reviews.review_heading: A good and well disciplined college.
reviews.review_text: WiFi is available throughout the campus. Lab facilities are very good. Students in our college have the freedom to learn various aspects. Classrooms are neat and tidy, and there is a central library where we can find many knowledgeable books. Hostels are good, and food as well. All classrooms have digital screens for lectures. The campus is filled with green trees and gardens with no pollution or noise. It is a very good place to learn. The college has a hospital and transport facility.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for B.Tech in Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: We have high-speed Wi-Fi in our college, and multiple routers cover the entire campus. We have high-class laboratories and well-structured classrooms. We have a central library, which has a huge collection of books. We do have a digital library with high-speed internet. The college has boys and girls hostels inside the campus. Rooms are excellent for premium sharing. There is a classic look in the hostel rooms. Food is good with all kinds of options. All the wardens in the hostel are retired mil...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for this course in our college were very good. There are so many labs and classrooms There is free Wi-Fi and a library. Facilities in the hostel are good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. The college was huge, with 100 acres of green campus, and no pollution or noise in the college. The college is an absolute choice for the students. The college too has transport, a hostel, a huge library, a huge playground, and a digital ...

fees_and_eligibility.overview: The modes of Grant Medical College admission 2025 are online and offline. Grant medical college admission is completely entrance-based. Those who qualify for the examination will be eligible to participate in the counselling process of NEET. At the UG level, the college offers four and a half years of MBBS with a one-year compulsory rotating internship. At the PG level, the college offers three-year MD, MS, DM, MCh, a one-year diploma in Ophthalmology, and a two-year MSc course. MD is offered in 17 specialisations and MS is offered in six specialisations. In order to check out the course-wise admission criteria, selection, seats, and fee click on the course-wise links mentioned below:

faqs.answer: A:    The cost fee MBBS- Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery at Grant Medical College is INR 5.71 Lakh. Apart from the tuition fee, there is a one-time admission fee of amount INR 4,000, and a hostel fee of amount INR 20,180 that students are required to pay in addition to the tuition fee. To get admitted to Grant Medical College MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery course, applicants must meet the entry requirements - 50% in 12th.
faqs.question: What is cost of MBBS at Grant Medical College?

faqs.answer: A:    Grant Medical College is a government University affiliated with Maharashtra University of Health Sciences and it is ranked 21 by India Today in 2021. It is not a private University so, It is very Important to take the NEET Exam to get admission to the Grant Medical College. The availability of seats in the college lies between 250-260 every year. The merit for taking admission in the college for the General category usually falls between 720-640, and The merit for the SC/ST Category falls between 136-107. The merit list for OBC Category usually falls between 136-107. After, clearing the merit round students can apply for counseling to take admission to the college.
faqs.question: Can I join Grant Medical College, Mumbai without NEET?

faqs.answer: A:    Grant Medical College, Mumbai fees is different for each programme. Students have to make the payment through the accepted payment gateway. The fees is as below:CoursesTuition FeesBScINR 1.7 lakhMDINR 2.1 Lacs - INR 4.7MBBSINR 7.6 lakhMSINR 4.7 lakhM.ChINR 3.4 lakhDMINR 3.4 lakh
faqs.question: What is the fees for Grant Medical College, Mumbai?

faqs.answer: A:    Grant Medical College provide admission in BSc based on candidates qualification as per the college's admission guidelines. The qualification is as follows:Candidates must have Nationality Certificate of India.Candidates should have born before 31'st December 2005.Candidates must have 12 years of school education with Science as main subject

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good scope for PG, great infrastructure, fests and extracurricular activities are given priority.

review_content.Placements: All the students got seats in government colleges for PG in the previous batch. Every student gets around 80,000 in residence. Major branches taken by students are medicine, surgery, dermatology, and paediatrics. All the branches are good and provide an outstanding package and knowledge for future.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my college, there is basketball court, amphitheatre, 3 boys hostels, and 1 girls hostel. We have 5 canteens, boys common room, ladies common room, badminton court, garden, spots to hang out, 3 libraries, and reading rooms. We also have two gyms on campus. Facilities provided in hostels are gym, reading rooms, libraries, etc. Quality of food in the canteen is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: GMC offers a really good college life.

review_content.Placements: As it is a field of Medicine, self employment is a lot more compared to placements. Moreover, the students pursue PG post MBBS, so the number of students getting selected after giving NEET PG varies every year. They get a salary of almost 90000-100000 per month. Those who choose to do jobs based on MBBS, get around 70-80k per month and if you are working in the rural area, you’ll be paid around 90k. Placements are almost 100% in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Grant Medical College has one of the greatest infrastructure which can be compared to that of AIIMS hospital. It has the biggest college campus in Maharashtra. Hostels are provided for MBBS students with minimal charges. There is a canteen available serving average food. You can also get a private tiffin service if your wish and those are offered at pretty decent prices.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members. But the infrastructure in hostels is not that good.

content.Placements: 100% of students get placed and get good packages starting from 10 LPA. Students get recruited to different hospitals due to high demand. Our students get internships from the government in our own hospital with good stipend. Students also get opportunities to do PG and earn good money.
content.Infrastructure: We have our own hostel at very cheap fee. Hostel has its own gym. Hostel has its own canteen. Hostel also has its own reading room for study. But library needs to get renovated. The AC and fans in the reading room are not working properly. Students get irritated in the summer. But the campus has its own different reading room which is already renovated and has good infrastructure. Our campus has 5 canteens.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Honest review - Grant Government Medical College.

content.Placements: Placing is not a thing of MBBS but as an MBBS student, you should get admission to PG. The stipend as an intern is Rs18,000 per month. In PG you get a stipend of around Rs 80,000 to Rs 90,000 per month. The internship rate is 100% if you pass all 4 proofs of MBBS. Roles of an MBBS doctor in an internship vary according to the department of work like managing accident cases, blood sample collections, report analysis, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is very devastated. It is now a work in progress. We have 5 hostels at JJ Hospital campus. Old boys hostel for 1st year students of MBBS (1st proof), apna boys hostel, and RM Bhatt boys hostel. Hostels are for 2nd proof onwards. We have a ladies hostel also. There is 300 doctors' hostel for PG students. Regarding our boy's hostel, we have poor facilities even basic things like bathrooms and toilets are less. But work is getting completed to next year. Mess food is not that good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good scope for PG, great infrastructure, fests and extracurricular activities are given priority.

content.Placements: All the students got seats in government colleges for PG in the previous batch. Every student gets around 80,000 in residence. Major branches taken by students are medicine, surgery, dermatology, and paediatrics. All the branches are good and provide an outstanding package and knowledge for future.
content.Infrastructure: In my college, there is basketball court, amphitheatre, 3 boys hostels, and 1 girls hostel. We have 5 canteens, boys common room, ladies common room, badminton court, garden, spots to hang out, 3 libraries, and reading rooms. We also have two gyms on campus. Facilities provided in hostels are gym, reading rooms, libraries, etc. Quality of food in the canteen is good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: GMC offers a really good college life.

content.Placements: As it is a field of Medicine, self employment is a lot more compared to placements. Moreover, the students pursue PG post MBBS, so the number of students getting selected after giving NEET PG varies every year. They get a salary of almost 90000-100000 per month. Those who choose to do jobs based on MBBS, get around 70-80k per month and if you are working in the rural area, you’ll be paid around 90k. Placements are almost 100% in this college.
content.Infrastructure: Grant Medical College has one of the greatest infrastructure which can be compared to that of AIIMS hospital. It has the biggest college campus in Maharashtra. Hostels are provided for MBBS students with minimal charges. There is a canteen available serving average food. You can also get a private tiffin service if your wish and those are offered at pretty decent prices.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of MBBS from The Grant Medical College, Mumbai.

content.Placements: At Grant Medical College, 100% of the students get placements in the MBBS programme. The average package offered at the college was 10–15 LPA. The top recruiters in the college were various private and government hospitals. At our college, 100% of the students get internships each semester.
content.Infrastructure: This college has a well-maintained and developed infrastructure for the MBBS course. The college had pretty good facilities. Wi-Fi, labs, library, medical, sports and all the required facilities for the MBBS were available on campus for the students. A hostel facility was also available for college students.

Find below theGrant Medical College, Mumbai admission process:
Application Process 2026

Grant Medical College has different application processes for each course offered. Some programmes require submission of an application on the official website, while others like MBBS don't require a college-level application form.
Release of Merit lists

Candidates must appear for the respective entrance exam and the counselling process. Admission to Grant Medical College is based on merit and entrance scores. The merit list is prepared based on the candidate's performance in the entrance exam.
Counselling Process
Shortlisted candidates are called for counseling, where they need to choose their preferred course and college. Seats are allocated as per the merit lists and candidates preferences.
Final Admission
For final admission, shortlisted candidates must pay theGrant Medical College, Mumbai admission feesand confirm the seat after qualifying the counselling round.

TheGrant Medical College, Mumbai fee structureincludes different components. Some of these include tuition fees, library fees, exam fees, caution deposit, and more. reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members. But the infrastructure in hostels is not that good.
reviews.review_text: We have our own hostel at very cheap fee. Hostel has its own gym. Hostel has its own canteen. Hostel also has its own reading room for study. But library needs to get renovated. The AC and fans in the reading room are not working properly. Students get irritated in the summer. But the campus has its own different reading room which is already renovated and has good infrastructure. Our campus has 5 canteens.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review - Grant Government Medical College.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is very devastated. It is now a work in progress. We have 5 hostels at JJ Hospital campus. Old boys hostel for 1st year students of MBBS (1st proof), apna boys hostel, and RM Bhatt boys hostel. Hostels are for 2nd proof onwards. We have a ladies hostel also. There is 300 doctors' hostel for PG students. Regarding our boy's hostel, we have poor facilities even basic things like bathrooms and toilets are less. But work is getting completed to next year. Mess food is not that good.

reviews.review_heading: Good scope for PG, great infrastructure, fests and extracurricular activities are given priority.
reviews.review_text: In my college, there is basketball court, amphitheatre, 3 boys hostels, and 1 girls hostel. We have 5 canteens, boys common room, ladies common room, badminton court, garden, spots to hang out, 3 libraries, and reading rooms. We also have two gyms on campus. Facilities provided in hostels are gym, reading rooms, libraries, etc. Quality of food in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: GMC offers a really good college life.
reviews.review_text: Grant Medical College has one of the greatest infrastructure which can be compared to that of AIIMS hospital. It has the biggest college campus in Maharashtra. Hostels are provided for MBBS students with minimal charges. There is a canteen available serving average food. You can also get a private tiffin service if your wish and those are offered at pretty decent prices.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MBBS from The Grant Medical College, Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: This college has a well-maintained and developed infrastructure for the MBBS course. The college had pretty good facilities. Wi-Fi, labs, library, medical, sports and all the required facilities for the MBBS were available on campus for the students. A hostel facility was also available for college students.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend students to join this college.
reviews.review_text: First-year classrooms are really very old and so they need reconstruction. Otherwise, the vibe of the hall is really very good. If you have seen Munna Bhai MBBS movie, the anatomy hall seen in that movie was shot there in our college. The hall is really big and it can accommodate 500 students easily at a time.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best medical institutes in the country.
reviews.review_text: It is an old institute. The infrastructure of many buildings looks like British infrastructure. Hostels are one of the best in government medical colleges of Mumbai. Our college has multiple canteens. They provide a variety of food items. The gymkhana is located at marine drive.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to take admission in.
reviews.review_text: The boys and girls hostels have separate canteens. Apart from it, we have the central canteen and the PG doctors canteen. Apart from the central library, we also have a reading room just below the hostel that is air conditioned and has adequate illumination. The reading room is open 24 hours a day and has no time restrictions.

reviews.review_heading: The best medical college in Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are excellent with adequate lighting and ventilation. Library has enough space for 200 students and well-equipped with AIR Condtioning. Hostel are pretty good with clean toilets and clean water supply for drinking. We have two playing area for football, cricket as well as a well-equipped Gym for students. Moreover we have 4 canteens which is affordable for students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has great faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has a lot of trees. It has an academic building, a hospital building, canteens, a sports field, a boys' common room for get-togethers, etc. The environment is very nourishing and pleasant. GMC Mumbai provides one of the best hostel facilities in Maharashtra. There are two boys' hostels and two girls' hostels on campus. The hostels are well secured and maintained. Hostels are provided with shared as well as single rooms with all facilities such as electricity, beds, tables, chairs, etc...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Grant Medical College.
reviews.review_text: There is a central library. There are 4 to 5 canteens. The food is affordable and hygienic but average in taste but has varieties. There is 1 girls hostel which is very small and does not have enough rooms to accomodate girls of all the years with bad infrastructure. The concerned authority of the hostel is rude and incompetent. Rooms are leaking with water during rainy days and bathrooms do not have running water. In the coming years it might be difficult to get a hostel during internship since...

reviews.review_heading: Extremely amazing placements, facilities, and faculty.
reviews.review_text: GGMC is well known for its campus. Placed in the heart of Mumbai. It has a huge campus studded with a majestic combination of historical buildings and lush green nature. The hostel is provided to all students and there is 3-4 canteen available. The quality of food is pretty good. Much better than what is expected from the mess.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the top medical colleges in Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in the hostel are good, and the quality of food is okay. Sports are highly supported in our college. The library is huge, with a seating capacity of 300. Lecture halls are big, and many movies are shot here. The campus is as good as expected.

reviews.review_heading: This is one of the top medical institutes in India with a very good campus and management.
reviews.review_text: There are different facilities like a hospital, library, different buildings for different departments and laboratories. Hostel is quite good with ground and canteen in the basement. We have a free medical facility for the students who fall ill in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: GGMCJJH supports extracurricular activities  as equally as academics.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are one of a kind. However, the labs are a bit outdated. The library is restricted to some students only. Other than that, the reading rooms are present on campus, which provides ample reading space. The quality of food is average. Wi-Fi is not available on campus.

college_info.college_name: Grant Medical College

data.description: There is no mess attached to Apna boys hostel but in RM Bhatt there is a huge canteen where you can chill with your buddies, but avoid the super seniors to avoid some out-of-the-world moments. We usually eat in the central canteen or 300 P.G residents canteen. The usual thali you get here, costs 55 INR.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Grant Medical College

likes.text: For PG entrance there is good enough atmosphere for preparation, And also, One have to complete the bond of rural service like every other government medical college.

faqs.answer: Subharti University admissions are currently open. The university has not specified a deadline for admission to SVSU. Candidates can get admission to SVSU based on their merit in the last qualifying exam or entrance exam score. The university offers admissions on the basis of the scores obtained in national-level entrance exams such as NEET and CUET-UG for admission to specific courses. Subharti University Entrance Test (SNET) is also conducted by the university for admission to several UG and PG courses.
faqs.question: Q: When do admissions close at Subharti University?

faqs.answer: Yes, SVSU conducts its own entrance examination - SNET, for admission into PhD programmes. Admission process for UG and PG programmes is entrance and merit based, with the university accepting NEET, CUET UG, CUET PG etc. scores for entrance based admissions.
faqs.question: Q: Does Subharti University conduct its own entrance examination?

faqs.answer: Yes, SVSU does grant direct admissions to candidates under the Management Quota. However, for all other categories, the university has an entrance and merit based admission process. The university has limited seats for direct admission under management quota and candidates are advised to apply as soon as admissions open.
faqs.question: Q: Is there any provision of direct admission to SVSU?

faqs.answer: Yes SVSU does offer distance learning courses to its students. These courses are approved by the Directorate of Distance Education. Applications for the same are also accepted strictly in the online mode. Admission to distance learing courses are both merit and entrance based.

course_faqs.question: Is Subharti University good for MBBS?
course_faqs.answer: MBBS is one of the popular courses offered by Subharti University. The university offers a 4.5-year MBBS programme including one-year internship. Looking at the placement data, MBBS students have got excellent opportunities. According to Swami Vivekanand Subharti University Meerut NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during Subharti University MBBS placements 2022 stood at INR 7 LPA. There was a rise of over 16% in the MBBS median package offered in 2022 as compared with 2021.

course_faqs.question: Is MBBS available at Subharti University?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, Swami Vivekanand Subharti University offers 4.5 year MBBS course including one-year internship. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Biology with at least 50% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for the SVSU MBBS course. Admission to MBBS course is based on NEET score.

review_summary.college_name: SVSU - Swami Vivekanand Subharti University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Totally satisfied with best faculty, good infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: Top recruiters are Apollo Hospital, Lok Priya Hospital, and Subharti Hospital. Sports physiotherapist is the top role offered in our course. My batch is 2022 and it completes in 2026. Around 60 percent of students get placement. All students of my batch get internships in Subharti Hospital and Lok Priya Hospital.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms in my college are well-equipped with Wi-Fi and a library. The hostel infrastructure and environment are friendly. The food in the mess is good and hygienic, though not like home. Good medical facilities are available for students, along with some discounts on medical treatment.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Swami Vivekanand Subharti University.

content.Placements: Placement in our course was extremely decent, it was about 70%. The highest package offered in our course was 24 LPA. The average package was around 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Axis Bank, ICICI Prudential, Tata AIA Insurance, etc. Around 70% of students got internship offers.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Wi-Fi was available on the campus. Library and study center were very good. Quality of hostel was also good. Mess and canteen food were tasty. There was limited medical facility.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Subharti University is value for money.

content.Placements: Subharti University provides a broad range of graduate, post-graduate, and diploma courses. Here in Subharti the fee for all the courses is comparatively lower other private universities. There are 20 colleges on the 250 acres large campus.
content.Infrastructure: This college is best for medicine studies. Subharti University is recognised by UGC. I started my course BBA 2023, and this is the best for 1,10,000 fee. Subharti University provides broad range of graduate, post-graduate, and diploma courses. It has more than 250 acres of campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Practical and interactive learning. All the faculty are supportive of students. Good infrastructure.

content.Placements: All the faculty are supportive of students. Good infrastructure. 55 to 60 percent students from my batch got placed. The highest package is close to 20 LPA while the average package remained between 3 to 3.5 LPA and the lowest is 2 LPA. Top recruiters included Amazon, Infosys, HCL, Axis Bank, Bajaj Motors, Paytm and Flipkart. About 40 to 50 percent students received internships in IT companies, manufacturing firms and finance organizations with some converting into pre placement offers. The major roles offered are software developer, system engineer, data analyst, HR associate and business development executive.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Well-qualified faculty members, lush green campus. Placement is a little dissatisfied.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is 20%. The highest package is 5 LPA, the average package is 3 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. Most companies are small startups from Noida, Ghaziabad, Meerut, and Gurugram that come for placements. Roles include support engineer, sales, customer support, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is really good. More than 300 computers in the engineering college. Free Wi-Fi is available in the library, but in the hostel, you have to pay. The library is big and has a good selection of books. Regarding the hostel, there are many hostels. VHR hostel campus offers good food, and all hostels have a good environment for studying. All facilities in the hostels are really good.

admission_overview.college_name: SVSU - Swami Vivekanand Subharti University Admission 2026: Application Process, Eligibility & Fees

admission_overview.title: Subharti University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Subharti University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The university accepts national-level entrance exams such as NEET and CUET-UG for admission to specific courses. SVSU conducts Subharti University Entrance Test (SNET) for admission to various UG and PG courses. SUET is an entrance exam conducted by the university for PhD course. Subharti University offers more than 50 courses at UG, PG, doctoral, diploma and certificate levels at campus and through affiliated colleges. The university also offers courses in distance education mode through the Directorate of Distance Education. Applications are accepted strictly in the online mode. SVSU offers courses in multiple streams such as Engineering, Management, Arts, etc. through a number of faculties. Some popular programmes include MBBS, MBA, BPEd etc. Read on to know more about Subharti University admission process, eligibility,fees, cutoff etc.

eligibility_selection.title: Subharti University Eligibility and Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: SVSU admissions are either based on national or university-level entrance exams or merit in the last qualifying exam. The university offers direct admission to candidates under the Management Quota. The fee for Management Quota candidates will be different from the regular one. Check below top Subharti University courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:

paragraphs: Subharti University admissions begin with registration for a course. Candidates are then further selected based on their merit or entrance exam scores. Check below steps to get admission to SVSU:
STEP 1: SVSU Application Process 2026

Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online or download the application form and submit it in campus. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 1,500 to apply for a course. Aspirants applying online can pay fee via any of the online payment modes. For offline submission, aspirants must send a demand draft for fee payment.
STEP 2: Selection

Once the registration process is over, the university shortlists candidates based onSNET examor merit in the last qualifying exam. For MBBS, SVSU acceptsNEETscore for admission. Besides, SVSU also selects candidates for some of the UG courses based onCUET-UGor CUET-PG for PG programmes. The university might also conduct personal interview round for some of the programmes.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

Afte the selection process is complete, shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Once the documents are verified, candidates are allotted seat in the university. Selected aspirants are then required to pay the course fee to confirm their admission.

Subharti University feesinclude multiple components such as one-time fees, caution deposit, tuition fees, etc. Candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university. The fee for admission through Management Quota is slightly higher than the regular one. Below are top Subharti University courses along with their fee and average package:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The seat intake for Subharti University varies course-wise. Candidates can get a seat in any of the SVSU courses by fulfilling both eligibility and selection criteria. In all admissions, whether through any entrance test or based on merit, the reservation policy for students of SC/ ST/ OBC categories (as per law) of that time and other eligibility criteria fixed by the university will apply. faqs.question: When do admissions close at Subharti University?
faqs.answer: Subharti University admissions are currently open. The university has not specified a deadline for admission to SVSU. Candidates can get admission to SVSU based on their merit in the last qualifying exam or entrance exam score. The university offers admissions on the basis of the scores obtained in national-level entrance exams such as NEET and CUET-UG for admission to specific courses. Subharti University Entrance Test (SNET) is also conducted by the university for admission to several UG and PG courses.

faqs.question: What is the admission process of Swami Vivekanand Subharti University?
faqs.answer: Swami Vivekanand Subharti University admission process begins with registration. Aspirants can apply online or download the application form and pay the application fee ofINR 1,500to register for a course. For admission to most of the courses, aspirants need to qualify SNET or fulfil the merit requirements. Once selection process is over, aspirants are called for document verification and seat allotment. Aspirants need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Can I join Swami Vivekanad Subharti University directly?
faqs.answer: Swami Vivekanad Subharti University offers direct admission underManagement Quota. Candidates who do not appear inSNETor do not qualify the same but are eligible for the selected programme can take direct admission through Management Quota. For regular admission, aspirants are required to either qualify SNET or fulfil the eligibiltiy criteria for the applied course.

faqs.question: How many seats are there for MBBS at SVSU?
faqs.answer: There are a total of180 seatsfor MBBS at Subharti University. Candidates can get a seat in MBBS course based on NEET score. The final selection will be based on entrance exam score and availability of seats. The exam is conducted once a year in offline or paper-pencil-based test (PBT) mode for three hours and 20 minutes or 200 minutes. As far as the NEET exam pattern is concerned, there are 200 questions from Physics, Chemistry and Biology, out of which 180 questions have to be attempted.

outlook.description:
SVSU Meerut has been ranked well by the Outlook under the 'State Private University' category. Through the years, the Outlook rankings for SVSU Meerut indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'State Private University' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. In 2025, SVSU Meerut fell 3 ranks to #27 rank in the 'State Private University' category by the Outlook ranking.
It has been noticed that in the 'Medical Universities (Private)' category, the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared against previous year's ranking. In 2025, SVSU Meerut climbed 1 rank to #17 rank in the 'Medical Universities (Private)' category by the Outlook ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: SVSU - Swami Vivekanand Subharti University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: There are 14 hostels including 2 NRI hostels within the university campus. The hostels maintain strict timings of entry. All hostels have a resident warden and also a chief warden (girls/boys separate) for the proper management and care of the students. The hostels have facilities like air cooler/ air conditioner facility as per demand, 24x7 hot and cooled water supply, 24x7 power supply, free internet connectivity through Wi-Fi system, indoor games - TT, carom and chess, badminton and volleyball courts, television room and study room.

library.description: Swami Vivekanand Subharti University's library has a collection of more than 25000 books, 150 international, 250 national and 400 e-journals. It also has other aids, internet facilities and subscription to various e-journals. There is a huge projector room, a separate reading room and a seminar room for the learners. Learning CDs/DVDs and other audio-visual aids are also available for students.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Hockey Field, Handball Field, Baseball Court, Volleyball Courts, Kabaddi Courts, Kho-kho Court, Table Tennis Room, Well-equipped Boxing Arena

Learning CDs/DVDs and other audio-visual aids are also available for students.

cafeteria.description: SVS-University offers an excellent choice of places to eat on the university campus. University houses have six canteens which offer multi-cuisine menus ranging from Indian to Continental and Chinese in a modern and hygienic ambience, with one exclusively for girls. For snacks, juices, beverages and other Indian and Continental fast foods, there are three modern cafeterias on the university campus.

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied with best faculty, good infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms in my college are well-equipped with Wi-Fi and a library. The hostel infrastructure and environment are friendly. The food in the mess is good and hygienic, though not like home. Good medical facilities are available for students, along with some discounts on medical treatment.

reviews.review_heading: Swami Vivekanand Subharti University.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Wi-Fi was available on the campus. Library and study center were very good. Quality of hostel was also good. Mess and canteen food were tasty. There was limited medical facility.

reviews.review_heading: Subharti University is value for money.
reviews.review_text: This college is best for medicine studies. Subharti University is recognised by UGC. I started my course BBA 2023, and this is the best for 1,10,000 fee. Subharti University provides broad range of graduate, post-graduate, and diploma courses. It has more than 250 acres of campus.

reviews.review_heading: Practical and interactive learning. All the faculty are supportive of students. Good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: With projectors, well equipped labs for all branches, rich library with thousands of books and journals and Wi-Fi facilities throughout the campus. The hostels are comfortable with AC and non AC options though the mess food can be improved. The canteen is good for snacks and meals, and the highlight is the on-campus hospital that ensures 24/7 medical support. Sports facilities are also impressive, with playgrounds, courts, indoor games, and a gym, making campus life

reviews.review_heading: Well-qualified faculty members, lush green campus. Placement is a little dissatisfied.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good. More than 300 computers in the engineering college. Free Wi-Fi is available in the library, but in the hostel, you have to pay. The library is big and has a good selection of books. Regarding the hostel, there are many hostels. VHR hostel campus offers good food, and all hostels have a good environment for studying. All facilities in the hostels are really good.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is good but there are many rules that we have to follow others pay a fine.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are okay with smart board. There are many canteens on campus but mess food is not so good. Hostal rooms are small with 2 students in a room. Girls and boys hostels are different. Medical facilities are good but expensive. There are park and ground for sports, and gym is also available for hostellers.

reviews.review_heading: My college faculty is very supportive.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities of our university are really good, like Wi-Fi facilities, classrooms are well organised, and even libraries are available with a strong Wi-Fi connection. Food quality in mess is awesome as compared to various other private universities, but here you will get only vegetarian food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SVSU - Swami Vivekanand Subharti University.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure for both courses. The hostels include well-equipped classrooms, libraries, labs, recreational areas, and a comfortable, safe living environment with essential amenities. This includes hygienic washrooms, clean rooms, good food, recreational spaces, and 24/7 security in hostels.

reviews.review_heading: The environment and college location are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of our university are really good, with Wi-Fi access, well-organized classrooms, and libraries available with strong Wi-Fi connections. The food quality in the mess is excellent compared to various other private universities, but here, you will get only vegetarian food.

reviews.review_heading: The college is excellent and I like the management of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of our university are really good like Wi-Fi facilities. Classrooms are well-organised. Libraries are also available with a strong Wi-Fi connection. Food quality in the mess is awesome as compared to various other private universities but here we will get only vegetarian food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SVSU - Swami Vivekanand Subharti University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Subharti University is very good and the hostel infrastructure is also very nice. Rooms are two-seater where we will get a bed, a study table, a chair and cupboard. There is also a study room, TV room, etc. Currently, there is no canteen. Mess food is also good, and it serves us sweet also.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement and good teachers with knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. There are so many buildings for so many courses. Classrooms are good too, and so many books in library. There are so many games being conducted lately, and medical buildings also have good infrastructure. There are hostel facilities too, with good Wi-Fi and food.

college_info.college_name: SVSU - Swami Vivekanand Subharti University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Candidates pursuing any course at Subharti university can apply to the various scholarships offered at the university. Candidates can avail benefit of maximum 10% additional benefits even if from two categories. However, scholarships to Buddhist students is offered over and above the existing scholarships, students who are availing any other scholarship will still get its perks as additional 5% scholarship.

The application fee for each SVSU course is INR 1,500. Aspirants can pay the application fee in any of the online payment modes. Candidates applying offline for admission can pay the application in the form of DD. Aspirants need to pay DD  in favour of "Swami Vivekanand Subharti".
Yes, Subharti University does offer scholarships to the students of the university. Some of the scholarships offered are:
1.       Meritorious Scholarship: The scholars who does not have scholarships from any other government or private institution can apply for this scholarship.
2.     Scholarship to the child of a Martyr of Indian Defence Services including Indian Coast Guard
3.     Additional Scholarship: 5% additional scholarship to the following category students:
·       Existing/Alumni Students
·       Girl Students
·       First relative of Indian Defence Services including Indian Coast Guard.
·       Differently Abled (physically challenged) students.
4. 10% scholarship to student belonging to Buddhism
5. Scholarship to the student belonging to family of Faculty of staff
Candidates can avail many other scholarships, as per the official website.

The total tuition fee for Subharti University MBBS is INR 53.3 lakh. This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Aspirants need to pay the course fee after completion of the selection rounds to confirm their seat in the university. The total fee of MBBS includes caution deposit, one-time fee and tuition fee. Besides, aspirants also need to pay an application fee of INR 1,500 to register for a course.

college_info.intro:
Government Medical College Nagpur offers UG, PG, PhD, courses in:
MBBS and MS are the flagship programmes of GMC Nagpur. MBBS is offered for a duration of five and a half years. The aforementioned duration also includes one year of compulsory internship. During the internship period, students are given practical training to become successful health practitioners. The internship period also includes ward posting. After the successful completion of the MBBS programme, students could either pursue higher education, such as MD, MS, etc. or start their practice. Government Medical College Nagpur offers internships at its attached hospital, i.e., Mayo Hospital. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Government Medical College Nagpur, their respective eligibility and GMC Nagpur fee structure:

faqs.answer: The GMC Nagpur BPT admission cutoff varies between 325 to 350 points for candidates from the general category. Getting 329 points in NEET would sit within the cutoff area that produces an average opportunity for accepting BPT admission. Your 10th class outcomes at 83% and 12th class performance at 75% meet the admission criteria for general enrollment applications. BPT admission at GMC Nagpur will determine your acceptance based on both applicant numbers and vacant seats together with possible year-to-year cutoff changes. Candidates from the reserved groups experience better admission opportunities after receiving cutoff relaxation.
faqs.question: Q: My NEET score is 329. Can I get a seat in BPT course in GMC Nagpur?

faqs.answer: Government Medical College, Nagpur Admission 2026 will open soon. The admission process is both merit and entrance-based as per the preferred programme. Enrolling applicants must secure a valid score in the NEET exam for UG and PG courses. GMC Nagpur provides programmes in over 25 fields, namely Pulmonary Medicine, Radiology, Orthopaedics, Psychiatry, General Surgery, ENT, Ophthalmology, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Anatomy, Physiology, General Medicine, Pediatrics.

faqs.answer: No, all states and UT's don't have NRI quota in Govt. medical colleges. Only Govt. medical colleges of Rajasthan, Haryana, Chandigarh, Goa, Himachal Pradesh, Punjab and Pondicherry are having NRI quota seat in Government Medical colleges, in addition to this NRI is also there in GMER colleges of Gujarat.Selection is based on the NEET exam. For B.Sc, applicants must pass class 10+2 or equivalent from a recognised Board with Physics, Biology, Chemistry, or related subjects. Selection is based on the NEET examAdmission to MBBS at GMC Nagpur is based on the score obtained by the candidates in the NEET UG exam. Candidates with a valid NEET score have to then register and appear for the NEET Counseling for securing a seat for admission at GMC Nagpur.

review_summary.college_name: Government Medical College, Nagpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Students come from diverse backgrounds. Decent cultural fests, active student societies, & a campus.

content.Placements: Over 80% of students get internships in good hospitals. Top recruiters include AIIMS, Fortis, and Apollo. A few students also secure PG seats through NEET PG.
content.Infrastructure: Lecture halls are spacious with smart boards. Labs are well-equipped, and the library has updated books. The hostel is average, and the food quality is decent. Wi-Fi is available.
content.Faculty: Faculty is experienced and supportive. The curriculum follows NMC guidelines. Exams are moderately difficult. 75–80% pass rate.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This is good for students who want to be good doctors.

content.Placements: A year of MBBS course includes 150 students in our medical college. Our college provides internship to all the students who passed in the university examination. The roles that our college provides are mainly the helping interns who work and help the PG residents and the professors.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college is excellent, offering a wide range of facilities. These include a library, lecture halls, labs, and faculty blocks, along with a huge playground for various sports. The hostel also boasts excellent infrastructure. While the mess food is a bit less impressive, the other facilities are good, particularly the breakfast, lunch, and dinner.

content.Infrastructure: It is Asia's biggest campus. In total, the college has really good infrastructure with a newly built auditorium, library, playground, canteen, gurudwara and classrooms. Canteen is good and food served in this canteen is nice compared to other canteens.

individual_reviews.title: Magnificent campus and prestigious institute.

content.Placements: Almost every student gets into decent work. After MBBS, some of us will get enrolled in post-graduation courses while others will serve for the bond which we have to do compulsory in MH colleges. The stipend offered is Rs. 30,000. For rural bonds, it is around 85,000. After MBBS, it's a decent earning at the earliest. After that, you can set up your clinic or apply for UPSC CMS or you can enroll in PG courses after clearing the next exam.
content.Infrastructure: As far as infrastructure is concerned, GMC Nagpur has the 2nd biggest medical campus in Asia. It is spread over 625 acres of land. It provides every amenity a college should have. There are dedicated hostels for every year. Each hostel has 2 messes and a gym. New equipment is being added this year. The hospital building is different. The MBBS building is different. An astonishing oval garden is what we have. There are huge departments with plenty of good and experienced staff. We do not find it difficult to have good equipment.

admission_overview.title: GMC Nagpur Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: GMC Nagpur Admission 2026 will open soon. The admission process is both merit and entrance-based as per the preferred programme. Enrolling applicants must secure a valid score in the NEET exam for UG and PG courses. GMC Nagpur provides programmes in over 25 fields, namely Pulmonary Medicine, Radiology, Orthopaedics, Psychiatry, General Surgery, ENT, Ophthalmology, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Anatomy, Physiology, General Medicine, Pediatrics. GMC Nagpur offers programmes at UG, PG and PhD levels. Over 43 programmes are offered in full time and offline mode. The fees for the different offered programmes falls in the range of NR 35,200 - INR 5.9 lakh. Some popular programmes at the college are MBBS and BSc. UG courses extend upto three to four years while PG courses have a duration of two years. PhD courses extend upto three years and may be extended to five years as per requirement. Read the article to know more about GMC Nagpur admission process 2026.

paragraphs: The admission process for each course differs from another one. However, the steps remain common which are to register for the course-specific entrance, appear for the exam-specific counselling process, and then final seat allotment for the shortlisted students. Find below the step-by-step procedure to get admission to GMC Nagpur's popular courses:
1: Application Process

GMC Nagpur has different application processes for each course offered. Some programs require submission of an application on the official website, while others like MBBS don't require a college-level application form. Students seeking admission to MBBS are required to apply via the NEET UG entrance exam. For admission to DM/MCh, candidates are required to apply for the NEET SS exam. While for BSc/BPT, interested candidates can visit the official website of GMC Nagpur and apply online.
2: Merit lists
Candidates must appear for the exam followed by their admission counselling. The college conducts admission on the basis of both merit and entrance.
3: Counselling Process
Shortlisted candidates must attend the counselling.
4: Final Admission

The fees for all the courses include tuition fees, hostel fees, and one time fees. The college fees keeps changing for various courses. Likweise, the seat intake also keeps changing for the various programmes. Candidates can check the GMC Nagpur seat intake below:
Note: This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
lists: Document Verification
Depositing the admission fee
After everything is over, candidates can still take admission to the college.

placement_data.title: GMC Nagpur Placement overview
paragraphs: Government Medical College, Nagpur

faqs.question: Does Government Medical College, Nagpur offer better placements than IIMT University?
faqs.answer: Government Medical College, Nagpur offers a BSc in Nursing and offers a median package of INR 3 Lacs with a tuition fee of INR 35,200. while IIMT University also offers BSc in Nursing with a median package of INR 2.50 Lacs with a tuition fee of INR 2.4 lakh. As per the data, it is clear that GMC Nagpur offers a better placement opportunity with an affordable price. Also GMC Nagpur associates with top medical institutes such as Lokmanya Tilak Municipal Medical College, GMC Nagpur, Govt Medical College, Trauma Care Centre GMC Nagpur, Govt Hospital, Government Medical College And State Cancer Institute, Gurukrupa Hospital Akashwani Aurangabad.

faqs.question: Are MBBS placements at Government Medical College, Nagpur good?
faqs.answer: Around 10%-15% of the students from the MBBS course get qualified in the first attempt for the PG entrance exam. They get their courses and colleges depending on the marks scored by them in the PG entrance exams. Every MBBS graduate is allowed to practice as a medical officer in rural health centres as many years as they want. The minimum salary offered is Rs. 55,000-60,000 per month. They can also do paid tutorships. So, it is good college for MBBS .

faqs.question: Who are the notable alumni of Government Medical College Nagpur?
faqs.answer: GMC Nagpur alumni are working as professional doctors, surgeons, and some of them have opened their hospitals and clinics. Some of the GMC Nagpur notable alumni are mentioned below: Shrikant Jichkar , former member of the Indian National Congress. Prakash Amte , social activist, Magsaysay awardee, director of Lok Biradari Prakalp. Zulekha Daud , a renowned physician-turned-entrepreneur and Pravasi Bharatiya Samman awardee. Sheetal Amte , Indian public health expert, disability specialist and social entrepreneur. V Maitreyan , an Indian oncologist and politician from Tamil Nadu.
