facilities: Medical Facilities such as ICCU, Ultrasound 2-D Echo, Auto Analysers, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Students come from diverse backgrounds. Decent cultural fests, active student societies, & a campus.
reviews.review_text: Lecture halls are spacious with smart boards. Labs are well-equipped, and the library has updated books. The hostel is average, and the food quality is decent. Wi-Fi is available.

reviews.review_heading: This is good for students who want to be good doctors.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is excellent, offering a wide range of facilities. These include a library, lecture halls, labs, and faculty blocks, along with a huge playground for various sports. The hostel also boasts excellent infrastructure. While the mess food is a bit less impressive, the other facilities are good, particularly the breakfast, lunch, and dinner.

reviews.review_heading: GMC Nagpur 2024 batch review.
reviews.review_text: Library is available which is an AC library allowed from 2nd year of college. Wi-Fi is available. Hostel is available mostly 2 to 3 persons per room depending on the strength of the batch living in the hostel like boys and girls. Different hostels have 3 boys hostels and 2 girls hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for cultural events.
reviews.review_text: It is Asia's biggest campus. In total, the college has really good infrastructure with a newly built auditorium, library, playground, canteen, gurudwara and classrooms. Canteen is good and food served in this canteen is nice compared to other canteens.

reviews.review_heading: Magnificent campus and prestigious institute.
reviews.review_text: As far as infrastructure is concerned, GMC Nagpur has the 2nd biggest medical campus in Asia. It is spread over 625 acres of land. It provides every amenity a college should have. There are dedicated hostels for every year. Each hostel has 2 messes and a gym. New equipment is being added this year. The hospital building is different. The MBBS building is different. An astonishing oval garden is what we have. There are huge departments with plenty of good and experienced staff. We do not find it ...

reviews.review_heading: What a massive 200 acres of a medical college has to give to its MBBS students.
reviews.review_text: The main college building of GMC Nagpur hosts classes for most of the subjects in the MBBS 4-year course. The building is enormous, with ample space accorded to each department for their classrooms and laboratories. It's so big that some of them still find it as a maze. There are classrooms equipped with AC and projectors. The college has a separate library building just adjacent to the college building. The library can readily accommodate up to 200 students at once or more. There are 3 boys hos...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college and would like my juniors to join the college.
reviews.review_text: E-library, gym, basketball court, badminton court, swimming pool, playground, table tennis, lawn tennis and many more facilities are provided. College and hostels both have canteens. The college canteen has a variety of food and a menu. The food provided is very cost-friendly and hygiene is also maintained properly but the mess in the hostels is not good. I would recommend you all to get tiffin services which are better than the hostel ones.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, realistic review.
reviews.review_text: Nutrition lab, library, hostel, classroom—everything is average. The hostel is compulsory, and a meal is available inside the hostel itself. The hostel and college campus are too good; they are very lush, green, and wide. Asia's largest medical campus is here.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and modern facilities for the students.
reviews.review_text: GMC Nagpur has the best quality infrastructure for the MBBS course. The college has best quality clinical facilities for the students to practice. Other necessary facilities include labs, library, canteen, hostel, mess, etc. available for the students. Hostel facilities were also of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best in terms of faculty members and education.
reviews.review_text: It is a government medical college, so facilities are not much good. Our college provides basic facilities. It provides facilities like classrooms, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good for clinical practice. Low fees but lacks infrastructure and disorganised administration.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of classes is really bad, especially for the departmental subjects. The library of GMC is one of the best features of the college. Hostel has a mess but no inbuilt canteen, although other canteens in the campus are available. There's a swimming pool and sports facilities are available as well.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best in Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi but has a gym, basketball court, badminton court, and football ground. There are the best hostels with a canteen. Night canteen is also available. Sports are played. There is a huge campus of 247 acres. College has a huge library that is air-conditioned and can accommodate 500 students.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and have good job opportunities in this sector.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, it contain seminar halls and well-equipped lab. The hostel facility is good, there are personal rooms and cots. Mess and canteen both are available. Has its own ground for sports swimming pool medical facilities are also available. The mess food quality is good and also you can allow the mess from other providers. Wi-Fi are available. E-library is available.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied as per learning point of view.
reviews.review_text: We have a campus building were most of first and second year department located. And remaining final year department are in hospital building. We also have a Library building beside college building. We total have 7 hostels and also a MARD hostel for UG and PG respectively. Facilities are sufficient according to the requirement.

reviews.review_heading: One can gain great knowledge, but our faculty are not interested in teaching.
reviews.review_text: College is currently undergoing renovation works, so all the classrooms and labs are getting better shapes. The library is new and well acquainted with almost all books. But as there are a huge number of students, students struggle finding a seat in the library to study. However, the canteen available here is good.

college_info.intro:
Rayat Bahra University comprises more than 10 departments, including Enginnering & Technology, Managemnet Studies, Political Science, Computing, Education, and others. The affialited colleges and departments of the university offer a wide range of courses at UG, PG, diploma, certificate and PhD courses across various streams. BTech, BSc and MBA are the popular programmes offered at the university.
Rayat Bahra University Mohali offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programe offered at the university cover core courses in the areas of CSE, Mechanical, Automobile, ECE, Mechatronics, Civil, Biomedical, Aerospace, and others. The MBA course offered by the RBU Mohali is a two-year programme. It is offered is several specialisations, including Health Care Management, Finance, HR, Digital Marketing, Fashion Managemnet, and others. Below mentioned are the Rayat Bahra University popular programmes:

review_summary.college_name: Rayat Bahra University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Rayat Bahra University: An overview of academic structure and student development.

content.Placements: Placement rates tend to be decent, but average packages often align with overall university states. MBA / Management: Often slightly higher average packages in some reports. Pharmacy & specialized Streams: variable, often linked to industry internships.
content.Infrastructure: Separate hostels for boys and girls are available on campus, designed to give a safe and comfortable home-away-from-home for students. Rayat Bahra University's every hostel includes common rooms, activity areas, dining/mess hall, reading rooms, and canteen access. Rayat Bahra University facilities typically include hot water in winter, Wi-Fi internet, security, and power supply.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Forensic Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The amount of fees they charge does not justify the services they provide. Not recommended.

content.Placements: Not all courses provide placement opportunities, but courses like MBA, B.Tech, and others do provide placement opportunities in MNCs. The average package goes in lacs. For an internship, the college does not assist. B.Sc. students do not have any placement opportunities. Only a few students get internships, and also not many, approximately around 60 percent only.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are clean and well-made. There are good labs with proper equipment, proper boards and screens for study purposes, but there are no Wi-Fi or AC facilities. The library is good and spacious, but it does not have books from all courses, so you have to submit an application to request books, and you will do so. The hostel facilities are not good. Most of the rooms have fungus growing on the walls, there is no proper ventilation, the bathrooms are not properly cleaned, and the food is average as well. Hostel not recommended. The canteens are good, and there are different outlets providing food at reasonable prices.

The university offers several specialisations in the BSc courses, so the gov. job roles depend on the BSc specialisations students choose. Check out the different jobs available according to the offered specialisations: After completing BSc Optometry from Rayat Bahra University, candidates can apply for jobs in the public sector, such as ophthalmologist's assistant or optometrist. After completing the BSc in Medical Lab Technology degree, candidates can work in health care sectors and get various job roles, such as senior technical officer, chief technical officer, medical laboratory scientist, laboratory manager, lab supervisor, medical representative, etc. After completing a BSc in Chemistry, Biochemistry, and Statistics candidates can appear for competitive exams, such as SSC CGL, RRB, and FCI, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Rayat Bahra University: An overview of academic structure and student development.
reviews.review_text: Separate hostels for boys and girls are available on campus, designed to give a safe and comfortable home-away-from-home for students. Rayat Bahra University's every hostel includes common rooms, activity areas, dining/mess hall, reading rooms, and canteen access. Rayat Bahra University facilities typically include hot water in winter, Wi-Fi internet, security, and power supply.

reviews.review_heading: The amount of fees they charge does not justify the services they provide. Not recommended.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are clean and well-made. There are good labs with proper equipment, proper boards and screens for study purposes, but there are no Wi-Fi or AC facilities. The library is good and spacious, but it does not have books from all courses, so you have to submit an application to request books, and you will do so. The hostel facilities are not good. Most of the rooms have fungus growing on the walls, there is no proper ventilation, the bathrooms are not properly cleaned, and the food is ...

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good in this university, as various developments are going on
reviews.review_text: Department of Computer Science and Engineering of Rayat Bahra University is well-equipped to meet the academic and technical needs of students. The campus offers high-speed Wi-Fi internet, where labs are equipped with updated software and high-performance systems. Classrooms are spacious and equipped with an enhanced learning system.

reviews.review_heading: According to me, it is an average college, not that much bad or good but just a mix of it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. The whole university is smaller than you expect but they are renovating the building regularly and about the classrooms and library, they both are good the only issue with them is, even though they've given free Wi-Fi, it doesn't work all the time and the speed is slow. The hostel I've heard is not the best but not the worst too, the food in the mess is average. Canteens and shops have great value. The sports facility is only available after the class hours that is...

reviews.review_heading: It is an amazing university. The college provides good placements for doctors and engineers.
reviews.review_text: We have a separate laboratory for each subject. We have an anatomy subject and for that, we have a good lab with good equipment. The hostel quality is extraordinary. The food is almost good but as you can understand hostel food is hostel food it can't taste like home food but it is good, healthy, and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Please don't take admission here your future will be spoiled.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good as free Wi-Fi for everyone. Labs are also good and all the devices in the lab working properly. Library is so awesome as all the content you can get from the library. I'm a day scholar so I can't say anything about mess and hostel. Very poor in sports and spoiling all the athlete's lives.

reviews.review_heading: Almost 80% students are placed.
reviews.review_text: 100% satisfied, well-equipped classrooms, a well-stocked library, and functional computer and science labs. The university also provides Wi-Fi access. The university also provides well-equipped to support practical learning and research. The campus is best.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Clinical Embryology at Rayat Bahra University.
reviews.review_text: There are a lot of facilities available here. Wi-Fi facility are also provided across the whole campus. Hostels are good too, and they also have Wi-Fi. Gym facilities are provided too. The mess food is good too. Classrooms are attached to labs, so you can have full hands-on experience.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rayat Bahra University.
reviews.review_text: There is a central library from where you can issue books for some time and you can sit there and study till 4:00 PM, if you are a day scholar and for hostel student it is open 24/7 and provided with Wi-Fi in library. Classrooms have infrastructure and sufficient space where approximately 35-40 students can sit properly. Now if we talk about hostel, good rooms are available in hostel but mess food is not worth it according to the payment we have made for mess.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with staff and resources provided at this university.
reviews.review_text: We have well-equipped classrooms, a well maintained library, computer labs, science labs, as well as Wi-Fi facility in this college. There is 20X7 access to library for the hostlers. The quality of food is also very good. There are 24*7 medical facilities available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: An honest review of college life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure that has buildings classroom are well maintained and are comfortable for the better environment of students. Moreover, there is no air-conditioner so in summer it is difficult to study in classrooms due to excessive heat. Rather than this, everything is very nice.

reviews.review_heading: Great BCA course and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our BCA department has modern computer labs, WiFi, spacious classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostel facilities are clean, and the mess offers hygienic food. Medical support is available on campus, and there are good sports facilities for indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: University is good but the hostel is not recommended.
reviews.review_text: The campus is tidy and green with lots of trees and parks. The classes have windows and are well ventilated with enough space to accommodate a good amount of students in one class. However, hostel facilities are lacking. They take 55,000 from us per semester, and the room is not even provided with basic facilities. The food in the hostel mess is another disaster. Not recommending hostels.

reviews.review_heading: I am a student, Rayat Bahra University heading towards my future and making it bright.
reviews.review_text: There are a large number of classrooms with great infrastructure. Each classroom is equipped with a projector for displaying the content of topics related to the syllabus, which helps students in smart, easy, and efficient learning.

reviews.review_heading: Very Much Satisfied with the Campus
reviews.review_text: The complete campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and the hostel also has Wi-Fi facilities. For day scholars, the library is open until 4:30 PM (Mon-Fri), but hostelers get access to the library 24/7. It has all labs for medical and non-medical courses, as well as for HM courses and other courses too. The food quality is average, and there is a hospital from the Bhara group nearby. Various games and grounds are also available on campus.

college_info.college_name: Rayat Bahra University

data.description: Rayat Bahra University was spread across 25 acres of area. The university has state-of-the-art infrastructure to the students. From the library to e-learning rooms, RBU comprises all the basic and modern amenities. Some of these facilities provided by RBU include labs, seminar rooms, a university convocation centre, hostels, a mess, a cafeteria, a sports complex, a convenience store, etc.

highlights.summary: Amrita School of Allied Health Sciences admissions 2025 is open for various courses at the UG, PG and advanced master levels. Interested students can go the verified website to apply for the desired course.

faqs.answer: A:    Placements at Amrita have always been excellent. Students who are eligible and opted for placements have more than one job offer, on an average. Exercising their dream option, some of them have up to three job offers by the end of their course. Amrita Institute of Medical Sciences is known for its quality education and good placement rate.
faqs.question: How are B.Sc placements at Amrita Institute of Medical Sciences?

faqs.answer: A:    Amrita University's School of Business lists 99 recruiters on its official website.Amrita Institute of Medical Sciences, affiliated with Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, has a strong placement record with a median salary of INR 9.5 LPA in 2021 and a total of 5,165 placements.On LinkedIn, Amrita Kumari holds the position of Associate Team Lead in Healthcare Recruitment at talent4health.Ebin Abraham serves as a Coordinator at Amrita Centre for Allied Health Sciences, according to LinkedIn.

reviews_list.review_title: Amrita kochi campus offers good placements every year.

review_content.Placements: Most of them were placed at a higher level of salary and in better hospitals. The highest package will be 25-30k per month. Abroad companies recruit paramedics more. All students are getting internships at our college after their 3-year course. We can work as critical care technicians or paramedics in any hospitals, especially critical care specialty hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: Amrita Kochi campus provides us with spacious classrooms, Wi-Fi for students with parental control , a library with all types of books which you can refer to for your thesis and exams, a good mess for students to eat, and the quality of the food we can say is above average only.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Operation Theatre Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely loved but improvements can be made.

review_content.Placements: More than 90 percent of the students are placed in Amrita hospital itself. Our lowest package was 4 LPA and now it has hiked to 6 LPA. AIIMS and Amrita hospital are the most top recruiting hospitals.100 percent of the students git internship in Amrita itself because it is mandatory for the students to do internship in Amrita itself.
review_content.Infrastructure: Paid Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. A vast and seperate library for UG and PG is provided. Classrooms are well occupied and with centralized AC and with smart classrooms. Quality of food available in the hostel is still a debatable topic. Really non delicious food is served. Medical facilities are provided at the top notch. Sports and games are there annually.

individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the long dreamed course of mine.

content.Placements: We were continuously hired by multispeciality hospitals like AIIMS in Kochi and some other hospitals in the roles of cardiovascular perfusionist, cardiac specialists, and so on. The remuneration offered by such a hospital would be mostly encouraging and appreciable.
content.Infrastructure: Various specialized laboratory and clinical facilities were available on the campus. Also required research, reference books, and access to online resources available within the library of the college. Students were more familiar with using libraries than looking for online resources.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physician Associate - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A personal overview from an amritian PA student.

content.Placements: Our college doesn't provide placement at other hospital instead a major percentage gets placed at our hospital itself. Internships are also provided at our hospital itself. We can work as the physician Associate or physician Assistant under a senior doctor of the chosen department.
content.Infrastructure: We have a wifi campus, lab facilities, central library's for UG and PG , Banking Facilities , smart classrooms, canteens, food court, playground, basketball court any more. Hostelers are allowed to use mobile phones. Mess food quality is an average or moderate level. Amrita has never got a poison issue from mess food but the taste isn't very appreciated and also it's not a full vitamin diet. There are many inter school sports matches and games happening at Amrita. Our hospital provides a very excellent medical facilities and immediate treatment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Intensive Care Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Amrita kochi campus offers good placements every year.

content.Placements: Most of them were placed at a higher level of salary and in better hospitals. The highest package will be 25-30k per month. Abroad companies recruit paramedics more. All students are getting internships at our college after their 3-year course. We can work as critical care technicians or paramedics in any hospitals, especially critical care specialty hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: Amrita Kochi campus provides us with spacious classrooms, Wi-Fi for students with parental control , a library with all types of books which you can refer to for your thesis and exams, a good mess for students to eat, and the quality of the food we can say is above average only.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Operation Theatre Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely loved but improvements can be made.

content.Placements: More than 90 percent of the students are placed in Amrita hospital itself. Our lowest package was 4 LPA and now it has hiked to 6 LPA. AIIMS and Amrita hospital are the most top recruiting hospitals.100 percent of the students git internship in Amrita itself because it is mandatory for the students to do internship in Amrita itself.
content.Infrastructure: Paid Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. A vast and seperate library for UG and PG is provided. Classrooms are well occupied and with centralized AC and with smart classrooms. Quality of food available in the hostel is still a debatable topic. Really non delicious food is served. Medical facilities are provided at the top notch. Sports and games are there annually.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Radiology and Imaging Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Best course in health sciences which will give you a good career.

content.Placements: Our course has a high placement rate in indie and all over the world, especially in UK, US and gulf countries. We are taught to deal with the most advanced machines of radio diagnosis and radio therapy. Payment package is about twenty thousand per month. We can work as a radiographer and an RT technologist via this course.
content.Infrastructure: The machines that we learn here are most advanced when compared with other colleges in India. Hostels are kind of above average, one room is shared by four people. Wi-Fi is not available till now. The food quality is also average but cleanliness is assured. Vegetable is available in the mess.

admission_process.title: Amrita School of Allied Health Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Amrita Center for Allied Health Sciences admissionis offered to a wide range ofundergraduate and postgraduate courses, namely BSc, MSc, MHA and MPH, among others. Admission to a few courses isentrance or interview-based. However, there is still a wide range of courses admission to which is subject to the merit scores obtained by the students in the last qualifying exam. Read on to learn more aboutAmrita Center for Allied Health Sciencesadmission.

The university offers courses in full-time and part-time modes over 12 courses. Some of the popular programmes ofAmrita Center for Allied Health Sciences Kochi campusare BSc, MSc, DM,MHA,BASLPamong others. Candidates can read the table below to learn more on ACAHS Kochi campus admission 2025 criteria from the table presented below:
Particulars
ACAHS Kochi Campus Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
12+ courses across multiple specialisations
How to apply?
https://www.amrita.edu/school/allied-health-sciences/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from the official website.

The application form for Amrita Center for Allied Health Sciences is available online on the university's official website. Admission to a few courses is entrance and interview-based while for a few, it is subject to merit in the last qualifying exam. Some of the popular courses offered by Amrita Center for Allied Health Sciences along with their eligibility criteria & fee details are listed below:
Class 12 with 60% aggregate
50% seats via Amrita Entrance Examination (merit)/ 50% seats via Management quota
BSc degree with a one-year Internship
Past Academic Scores + Personal Interview
Graduates with minimum qualification of MBBS/BDS/ AYUSH/ BSc Nursing regularly employed in a Government/Private Sector (work experience of 2 years)
Academic Qualification + PI
Merit and eligibility criteria
Class 12 with a 60% aggregate
50% seats via Amrita Entrance Examination (merit)/ 50% seats via Management quota

The Amrita Center for Allied Health Sciences admission process for MSc is done based on past Academic Scores and Personal interviews. For BSc, selection for candidates will be based on the rank obtained in the Amrita Entrance Examination. Allotment of seats for the shortlisted candidate will be based on the performance in the counselling/interview. Out of the total seats for all specialities, 50% of seats will be allotted to the Merit category and 50% to the management category including NRI i.e. 15% of seats. Candidates are advised to frequently visit the admission page for the latest updates. Interested candidates can check out the below table for the Amrita Center for Allied Health Sciences admission process:

Application Process:Interested candidates are required to meet the course-specific eligibility and then fill out the application form on the official website of the institute. The candidate needs to register their commonly used mobile number/Email ID.
Selection Rounds:Applicants are then required to appear for the selection rounds determined by the institute for each course.
Admission Confirmation:Shortlisted candidates are required to pay the registration/ admission confirmation fees to confirm their admission.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for MSc at Amrita School of Allied Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: The university offers 11 MSc courses at the PG level. Aspirants who want to apply for MSc at Amrita School of Allied Health Sciences need to meet the last educational qualification. The eligibility criteria for the programme is a BSc degree with a one-year Internship. However, the selection criteria for the course is Past Academic Scores + Personal Interview.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MSc at Amrita Center for Allied Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for MSc courses at Amrita Center for Allied Health Sciences ranges between INR 1 Lacs and INR 3 lakh. This fee, however, is obtained from unofficial sources. Hence, is indicative. As per the official website, however, the total fee for non-scholarship category students ranges from INR 1.6 Lacs and INR 6 Lacs for different MSc specialisations. For the specialisation-wise fee for MSc, students are advised to visit the official website and get the details.

Students who want to take admission for MPH at Amrita School of Allied Health Sciences need to meet the last educational qualification. The eligibility criteria for the course is Graduates with minimum qualification of MBBS/BDS/ AYUSH/ BSc Nursing regularly employed in a Government/Private Sector (work experience of 2 years).

faqs.question: What is the MPH selection criteria at Amrita School of Allied Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: Selection is based on the marks obtained in the qualifying examination, Personal Interview and group discussion at Amrita School of Allied Health Sciences. However, the eligibility criteria for the programme is Medical / Dental / Nursing / AYUSH / Pharmacy / Physiotherapy / Biomedical engineering / Allied sciences / Veterinary Sciences / Life Sciences / Statistics / Biostatistics / Demography / Population sciences / Nutrition/Sociology / Psychology / Anthropology / Social work / Agriculture.

faqs.question: What is the MPH course duration at Amrita School of Allied Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: Master of Public Health (MPH) at Amrita School of Allied Health Sciences is a two-year course at the PG level. Check other MPH courses at Amrita School of Allied Health Sciences. The eligibility criteria for the programme is Graduates with minimum qualification of MBBS/BDS/ AYUSH/ BSc Nursing regularly employed in a Government/Private Sector (work experience of 2 years).

placement_data.title: Amrita School of Allied Health Sciences Placement overview 2024
paragraphs: Amrita Institute of Medical Sciences & Research Centre concluded its placements drive for 2020 majorly in sectors such as medical, healthcare, education and research. Amrita Institute of Medical Sciences Kochi offers courses in four major streams and also conducts placements for each. In 2020, 103 students from Dental and Medical were offered a median salary of INR 9.5 LPA.

As per external sources, most of the alumni from Amrita Institute of Medical Sciences (Ernakulam) are placed in the Healthcare sector (51%), followed by Education (10%) and Research (9%). The pie chart below shows the total number of alumni placements across various sectors:
Note: The category ‘Others’ includes Administrative, Support, Quality Assurance, Media & Communication, Sales, Engineering and HR.
Q. How good are placements in Amrita Institute of Medical Sciences?

A. During 2020 placements, more than 50% of the total students were placed across various domains such as healthcare services, education, research, etc. The median salary for the 2019-2020 batch went up to INR 9.5 LPA.
Q. What was the median salary offered to BDS programme students at Amrita Institute of Medical Sciences?
A. The median salary offered to BDS students was INR 10.5 LPA for the 2019-2020 batch.
Q. How many Engineering students were placed in Amrita Institute of Medical Sciences placements 2020?
A. A total of 1,787 Engineering students were placed during the 2020 placements drive.
Q. What was the total number of placements during Amrita Institute of Medical Sciences placements 2020?
A. As per NIRF report, a total of 2,835 students were placed during placements 2020.
Q. What are the top recruiting companies that participate in Amrita Institute of Medical Sciences placements drive?

A. As per external sources, some of the major recruiting partners at the institute are Amrita Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Centre, Aster DM Healthcare, IQVIA, ASTER Medcity, Rajagiri Hospital Kochi, KIMS Healthcare Management Ltd., Max Healthcare and Apollo Hospitals among various others.

faqs.question: How are B.Sc placements at Amrita Institute of Medical Sciences?
faqs.answer: The B.Sc placements in Amrita Institute of Medical Sciences are very good with a dedicated placement team who ensure that students get the best opportunities. The institute has a good record in providing quality placements as it achieved close to 100% placement rate for the past 5 years at Mysore campus. Companies like TCS, Infosys, IBM, SAP Labs and many others often have pool campus drives at Amrita, Mysore campus providing lucrative offers to students. Furthermore, the highest annual package for NRI quota students is Rs. 30 Lacs at Amrita Institute of Allied Health Sciences while regular students can expect somewhere between Rs. 18-20 Lacs.

faqs.question: How are B.Sc placements at Amrita Institute of Medical Sciences?
faqs.answer: Placements at Amrita have always been excellent . Students who are eligible and opted for placements have more than one job offer, on an average. Exercising their dream option, some of them have up to three job offers by the end of their course. Amrita Institute of Medical Sciences is known for its quality education and good placement rate.

faqs.question: How many recruiters participated in Amrita Institute of Allied Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: Amrita University's School of Business lists 99 recruiters on its official website.Amrita Institute of Medical Sciences, affiliated with Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, has a strong placement record with a median salary of INR 9.5 LPA in 2021 and a total of 5,165 placements.On LinkedIn, Amrita Kumari holds the position of Associate Team Lead in Healthcare Recruitment at talent4health.Ebin Abraham serves as a Coordinator at Amrita Centre for Allied Health Sciences, according to LinkedIn.

faqs.question: How much does B.Sc at Amrita Institute of Medical Sciences cost?
faqs.answer: The cost of studying a B.Sc at Amrita Institute of Medical Sciences depends on programme and category. For the Management Category pupils, the fee for a year in B.Sc Anaesthesia Technology (AT) is INR 190,000. Conversely, NRI Category students have to pay US$ 3,000 as their annual fee for B.Sc Anaesthesia Technology (AT). Additionally, other B.Sc Allied Health Sciences programs from Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham come with different costs due to the variation in specialisation as well as category involved.

Almost 100% vegetarian food is available at the hostel mess. There is an intercampus sport meet with other course students.

reviews.review_heading: Amrita provides good future to its students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is one of the best things in Amrita. Each course has its own unique structure. Hostels are pretty good. We have a canteen in the hostel premises. Basketball and badminton courts are available. We have two hostels for girls and two for boys, and they are very well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure. It provides good exposure to the field of work.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Most modern technologies are available here. Our department has its own library and classrooms. The library is up-to-date with all the modern books, and there is a system with connection to Wi-Fi through which we can do further research. Hostel facilities and food served are average.

reviews.review_heading: Won't recommend to join.
reviews.review_text: The facilities which they provide is good and the infrastructure is above average. The quality of food is not satisfactory. To be exact, only breakfast felt fine. Some of the canteen staff have been adamant and rude with all of us, if we take food for the second time. Medical facilities is good and also they used to provide free medicine and check up to a point (don't know if it still persist). Sports and games events are good.

reviews.review_heading: Definitely, Amrita has good infrastructure and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus has Wi-Fi connectivity and provides free medical facilities to students. Every year, they conduct sports and arts. The mess is also available.

reviews.review_heading: You should definitely go to this college it's just so good no excuse to study.

The facilities are just amazing as a hotel the food is amazing the taste is just like home
The quality is top not there are Wi-Fi labs class room library everything that you need in a college for pace and its just amazing to get 
into this college
There are so many facility like medical facilities sports games like everything.

reviews.review_heading: Our college amrita is the best college in the Kerala because kindly approached towards patients .
reviews.review_text: Nice class room, lab facilities and library facilities available and there are 2 library facilities are there one central library there students get peaceful environment for studies. And then mess food is good as compared to other hostel. Here only vegetarian items.

reviews.review_heading: It has limited job prospects.
reviews.review_text: Most of the students got hired in the role of public health specialists with an initial pay of 4,36,300 LPA in government agencies, research institutions, and some other organisations. Few of the students worked in various NGOs during their free hours. Career support was comparatively less than in other disciplines.

reviews.review_heading: The college has source faculty members and they guide students.
reviews.review_text: The campus provides immediate medical emergency services, transportation between zones for student convenience, and a strict uniform policy as per college guidelines. There will be no limitations for students to explore the college during leisure hours.

college_info.intro:
The Savitribai Phule University Pune flagship programmes are MBA, BSc, BTech etc. The Department of Management Sciences (PUMBA), Savitribai Phule Pune University is known as one of the first Management Institutes present in India. Considering the ROI of Savitribai Phule Pune University popular programmes, the placement recorded the highest MBA package of INR 16.22 LPA. in the past years. SPPU students are today working in top firms at top positions. Savitribai Phule Pune University students are trained with Managerial as well as presentation skills.
The UniPune has been ranked by QS & other world university rankings under catgeories like Asian University Rankings, etc. Overall, this Pune University is quite famous. The university has students from different cultures, resulting in students learning from each other. This makes students lifelong friends & in many cases making business contacts for the future. The following are the USPs of joining the popular programmes at SPPU:
Holistic and Value-based Education
For more details around SPPU Pune popular programmes, check out the table below:

faqs.answer: UniPune admission to a majority of PG and UG courses is based on the Online Entrance Exam (OEE) conducted by the University. The university offers MCA, MMM, Advanced Diploma, MPH, E-MBA, LLM and M.Lib.I.Sc, among others. Admission to a few courses is completely based on merit in the previous qualifying exam. The university also accepts MAH CET, MAH MCA MET, CMAT/ CAT/ ATMA and other exams for admission to a number of courses offered at its campus or its affiliated colleges.
faqs.question: Q: Which entrance exam is accepted by UniPune?

faqs.answer: PUMBA is a popular college for its two-year E-MBA program. Admission criteria for this course is merit-based and candidates must have at least three years of work experience along with a valid score in the entrance exam conducted by Savitribai Phule Pune University. The programme is designed for seasoned professionals who want to enhance their managerial skills and knowledge. The Executive MBA programme at PUMBA offers six functional specializations, including Marketing, Human Resource (HR), Finance, Operations, Systems, and International Business. The programme uses scores of CMAT/CAT/ATMA/XAT/MH-CET for admission.
faqs.question: Q: Is Department of Management Sciences, Pune University (PUMBA) good for Executive MBA?

faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to MA are required to have completed their relevant UG degree. For further selection, candidates have to appear for OEE conducted by UniPune for final selection. The majority of MA courses are available on the campus of UniPune while a few chunks of MA specialisations are also offered by various affiliated colleges and recognised institutes under UniPune. After appearing for the exam, students are required to wait for the merit lists released on the official website of the university. After the release of the merit list, students are required to fill in the admission form and upload the necessary documents in it. After all the documents are verified by the relevant department, an admission fee challan is generated and the fee must be paid followed by that before the last date.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get into Pune University for MA?

faqs.answer: Pune University MSc admission is entrance based. The selection is done on the basis of OEE scores conducted by the University. Candidates need to possess a bachelor's degree from a recognised institute/ university in the relevant field to apply for UniPune MSc admission. Candidates seeking enrolment via Pune University OEE 2025 can apply online on the official website of Campus Common Entrance Platform. There is no requirement to submit the required documents or application form offline.

review_summary.college_name: Savitribai Phule Pune University (SPPU) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: COEP Technological University review.

content.Placements: The majority of the students get placed, the average for the Computer Science and Engineering department is 17 LPA, and the highest is 50+, which is offered to 3-4 students only. The training and placement cell helps students and guides them to better placement opportunities. Top recruiters are De Shaw, Nvidia, Wells Fargo, etc. Around 150 students out of 220 students get internships in their 3-4th year.
content.Infrastructure: Some faculty members are quite helpful and knowledgeable, who help students for getting industry ready and gain good technical skills and soft skills. The boys' hostel is quite old, not so good, food quality is above average. Other facilities like sports, infra and all are good. COEP is the only college in Pune to have its own boat club, which is active.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: COEP is the regional underdog.

content.Placements: Offers are comparable to the top 10 NITs in CSE. The average package was 17 LPA, median was 15 LPA for 2025. This year, De Shaw hired someone at 60 LPA CTC. Other branches also have decent placement, but due to doubling the intake, the placement might be affected later. Some companies that visit are De Shaw, Nutanix, Texas Instruments, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, but the number of students in the location is really low. Mess food is okay. The gym is crowded. Ground is good. Wi-Fi is provided in the entire campus, but sometimes it doesn't work. Located in the city center, so many fun activities around. The overall infrastructure is decent.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is an easy-going engineering life.

content.Placements: A very low percentage of students have placed from Zeal in B.Tech ENTC. The highest package is about 15 LPA, and the median is about 2.8-3.14 LPA. Mainly, the best hiring companies that arrive in college are all about the mechanical and robotics branches, with a recruiting rate of up to 90% recruiting rate.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure and facilities, labs are good, and overall, a good mid-level campus. Very good college, but the downside is that there are limited grounds and sports facilities. Courses are available, and indoor activities are very good. The college also appreciates indoor activities rather than outdoor activities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best college in the Khed Taluka.

content.Placements: 66 percent of students participated in this course. The maximum start package in this course was 5 LPA. In the commerce field, companies hired students to recruit. Many companies took interns as freshers. HR, associate, and similar roles were given.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus was very big and versatile. All fields were available. Teachers were very strict and individually concentrated on all of us. Classrooms were neat and clean, and there were cameras. Hostel facility, canteen facilities, and stationery were available in the campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Our college gives us 100% placements. Faculty members are kind and approachable.

content.Placements: 90 percent of students got placed in ISB&M College. The salary package offered ranges from 6-10 LPA. Recruiting companies like Black Orange, etc., hire students. 70 percent of students got internships from the BBA course through Black Orange company. Roles offered in our college are finance, HR, and marketing.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, library, computer, classrooms, etc. Hostels are also very good. Our mess provides us with healthy and hygienic food. We got morning tea with breakfast, then lunch, then evening snacks and dinner. Medical facilities are available in the college and also in the hostel. We have different activities like sports, etc.

Furthermore, admission to BCom at UNIPUNE is offered on the basis of merit and valid scores of institutional level entrance exams. In addition to this, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 35% in Class 12 to qualify for the rounds ahead. For final admission, shortlisted candidates must pay the fees and confirm the seat.

In addition, the hostel charges are INR 3.15 lakh.The course fee varies from one specialisation to another and the selected college. faqs.answer: Pune University MSc admission is entrance based. The selection is done on the basis of OEE scores conducted by the University. faqs.question: How costly is UniPune?
faqs.answer: UniPune offers UG, PG, Diploma, Certificate and Doctoral level programmes across50+departments. The University offers these programmes within the range ofINR 3 KtoINR 50.42 Lakh. These courses are available in full-time mode for the duration of 4 month to 4 years. UniPune is not very costly as it is a government university.

courses_data.name: UniPune MBA Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:MAT, ATMA, XAT, MAH CET, MCAER CET, CMAT, CAT, GMAT, CBSE 12th, MHT CET
courses_data.description: Unipune (short for Savitribai Phule Pune University) offers Manag ement level programme PUMBA and two-year MBA Pharma Biotech via the Department of Management Sciences. Along with the above-mentioned programme UNIPUNE offers several other combinations for the MBA programme at the PG level through its other affiliated colleges. SPPU MBA admissions for Maharashtra candidates are subject to a valid score inMAH CET, conducted by DTE Maharashtra. However, for outside Maharashtra candidates, a valid score inCMAT/CAT/MAH CETworks well. Read on to know more about Pune University MBA admission 2025.

faqs.question: Can I join MBA without CAT at UNIPUNE?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is possible to join UNIPUNE for an MBA. As the University admission to the MBA course is based on multiple entrance exams,  MAH CET, CMAT,XAT, ATMA, etc. Thus, applicants who have not appeared and secured valid scores in CAT can apply for the course through the scores of different examinations.

faqs.question: What is the cost of MBA at UNIPUNE?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for MBA ranges betweenINR 15,000  and INR 11.9 lakhat UniPune and its affiliated colleges. For the exact fee, students are advised to visit the official website of UniPune or other affiliated colleges for details. Unipune offers its MBA courses via the Department of Management Sciences, popularly known asPUMBAand several other affiliated colleges. This fee is sourced from unofficial sources. Hence, is completely indicative.

faqs.question: Is Pune University hard to get?
faqs.answer: UniPune is not very difficult to get admission. Students should qualify the minimum eligibility criteria. Pune University offers admission basis merit and entrance wherein students must secure minimum marks in Class 12 or graduation, depending on the level of course opted. Students should also have valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as ATMA, OEE, GATE, UGC NET or SLET.

faqs.question: Is SPPU a private or government university?
faqs.answer: Savitribai Phule Pune University  (also known as UNIPUNE, Pune University and SPPU), is acollegiate public state university. The University is located at Pune, was established in 1949 through Poona University Act and is one of the premier universities in India. Recognised by UGC, it is popularly known as the 'Oxford of the East'. The University is accredited ‘A’ grade by NAAC. With over 40+ academic departments,  10+ faculties and 50+ research centres, the university also has about 300+ recognised research institutes and over 700 affiliated colleges offering UG, PG, diploma, PG diploma, PhD and certificate courses.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to Pune University?
faqs.answer: SPPU admission for a majority of PG and UG courses, such as M.Sc. M.A. M.Tech, M.Com B.A. And BBA among others, is based on the Online Entrance Exam (OEE) conducted by the University. Additionally, there are numerous courses, such as MCA MMM, Advanced Diploma, MPH E-MBA, LL. M. and M. Lib. ISC among others, where the admission process is completely based on merit in the previous qualifying exam (Class 12 for UG admission and UG degree for PG admission). Thus, students will not be able to get direct admissions to Pune University.

faqs.question: How is the admission process for M.A at SPPU?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to MA are required to have completed their relevant UG degree. For further selection, candidates have to appear for OEE conducted by UniPune for final selection. The majority of MA courses are available on the campus of UniPune while a few chunks of MA specialisations are also offered by various affiliated colleges and recognised institutes under UniPune.

paragraphs: According to the NIRF report 2025 released, out of 206 UG 3-year students, 83 students were placed and 65 students opted for higher studies during SPPU placement 2025. 708 PG 2-year students were placed out of 1644 students and 88 students opted out. 100% placement rate recorded in 2024 for PG 3-year course during Pune University placement 2024.

Savitribai Phule Pune University has released the PUMBA placement report 2024. As per the report, highest and average package recorded during MBA placements was INR 16.22 LPA and 9.4 LPA . Top recruiters such as Deloitte, PwC, CRISIL , Godrej & Boyce and MRF visited the campus.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered during UniPune MBA placements?
faqs.answer: According to Savitribai Phule Pune University (PUMBA) placement report 2024, the overall average package offered during UniPune MBA placements 2024 stood at INR 9.4 LPA. Further, an improving trend was witnessed in the average package offered over the past three years. The overall and batch-wise average package offered over the past three years during UniPune MBA placements are presented below: Particulars MBA Placement Statistics (2022) MBA Placement Statistics (2023) MBA Placement Statistics (2024) Average package INR 8.1 LPA INR 8.85 LPA INR 9.4 LPA Top 50% average package INR 9.5 LPA INR 10.17 LPA INR 10.84 LPA Top 10% average package NA INR 12.48 LPA INR 15.42 LPA Note: The above-mentioned data is of Savitribai Phule Pune University’s Department of Management Sciences (PUMBA).

faqs.question: What package do Savitribai Phule Pune University graduates get after MBA?
faqs.answer: Savitribai Phule Pune University has a good track record of placements for its MBA course. As per the latest report, the the highest and average package offered to MBA students during SPPU placements 2024 stood at INR 16.22 LPA and INR 9.4 LPA , respectively. The salary packages offered to MBA students during Savitribai Phule Pune University placements 2024 are tabulated below: Particulars MBA Placement Statistics (2024) the highest package INR 16.22 LPA Average package INR 9.4 LPA Top 50% average package INR 10.84 LPA Top 10% average package INR 15.42 LPA

faqs.question: Does Savitribai Phule Pune University provide 100% placements for MBA program?
faqs.answer: According to Savitribai Phule Pune University (PUMBA) placement report 2024, the placement rate recorded during University of Pune MBA placements 2024 was 80.7%. Further, the placement rate recorded over the past three years during UniPune MBA placements is presented below: Particulars MBA Placement Statistics (2022) MBA Placement Statistics (2023) MBA Placement Statistics (2024) Placement rate 98.87% 93.06% 80.7% Companies visited 96 104 140+ Total participants 177 173 171

faqs.question: Which is the top recruiting sector during Savitribai Phule Pune University MBA placements?
faqs.answer: BFSI & NBFC sector emerged as the top recruiting sector during UniPune MBA placements 2024. The top 4 sector-wise placement distribution recorded during UniPune MBA placements 2024 is presented below: The sector-wise placement distribution recorded during UniPune MBA placements 2024 is presented below: Sectors MBA Placement Distribution (2024) BFSI & NBFC 27% IT 16% Manufacturing 14% Research & Consulting 10% FMCG & Retail 8%

faqs.question: How costly is UniPune?
faqs.answer: UniPune offers UG, PG, Diploma, Certificate and Doctoral level programmes across 50+ departments. The University offers these programmes within the range of INR 3 K to INR 50.42 Lakh . These courses are available in full-time mode for the duration of 4 month to 4 years. UniPune is not very costly as it is a government university.

description: UniPune Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for admission to MBA and MCA courses based on the CAT and the MAH MCA CET exam. Students can also scroll down the page to know the cutoff of various other accepting exams. A few more exam-related updates are below:

Savitribai Phule Pune University JEE Main cutoff 2025 has been released for various categories and rounds for admission to several BTech specialisations based on JEE Main scores, followed by round-wise counselling. Candidates planning to be admitted to any BTech branches at various Pune University-affiliated colleges must have a valid score in the JEE Main exam. Of all the specialisations, BTech in Computer Science Engineering can be considered the most popular and competitive specialisation bec

UniPune JEE Main cutoff 2025 has been concluded for admission to the BE, BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released through the affiliated colleges of UniPune. The most popular course for admission was BTech in Computer Science and Engineering. For admission to the College of Engineering, Pune, the last round closing rank for the General AI category candidates interested in studying CSE was 9029. For Pune Institute of Computer Technology, Society for Computer Technology and Research, the l

UniPune BTech cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to various BTech specialisations at different affiliated colleges. Students can check the table provided below to know the important details for UniPune BTech 2026.

UniPune released Counselling results for 2025 up to four rounds. The university releases counselling results for various categories. Candidates can check the round-wise consolidated lists for UniPune BTech cutoff 2025 as well as for the previous two years, 2024 and 2023, in the table provided below:

Unipune MHT CET cutoff 2025 will soon be available on this page. In the meantime, students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff details for MHT CET for admission to various BE course specialisations. The university offers admission to it's affiliated colleges via the MHT CET examination cutoff.

Some of the important dates related to UniPune MHT CET cutoff 2026 are mentioned in the table below. Students who want admission to this university and its affiliated colleges can download the timelines as a PDF file for later use.
Download the consolidated round-wise and year-wise UniPune MHT CET counselling rounds 2025, as well as for previous years, i,e, 2024 and 2023.

The UniPune MAH MBA CET cutoff 2025 is provided in the table below for MBA/PGDM admission, among other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories. For the General AI category, the last-round cutoff percentile for MBA admission was 90.81. For the same course, the cutoff stood at 95.79 in the first round. More details are given below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view and compare the last three years of MAH MBA CET cutoff data for admission to the MBA course. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA admission at UniPune was 90.81. For the same course, the last round cutoff was 95.18 in 2024, while in 2023, the cutoff was concluded at 89.17.
Analysing the past three years' cutoff, it is evident that the cutoff ranks saw a fluctuation over the years for MBA admission.

Students who want admission at UNIPUNE for the MBA/ PGDM courses, can look at the table below to know the important timelines for admission to UNIPUNE. Students can download these essential dates as a PDF file for later use.
UNIPUNE accepts the MAT, CAT, CMAT, MAH CET exam for admission to MBA/PGDM courses. Students can look at the table below to know the previously mentioned exams year-wise cutoffs.

UniPune admissions to Law courses including, B.A. LL.B. has been released up to the last round. The university offers admissions through various affiliated Law colleges. As per UniPune cutoff 2024, the closing score for B.A. LL.B. for ILS Law College for Last Round was 99.32, for Dr. D. Y. Patil Law College, it was 95.38. Check out UniPune MHTCET BA LLB cutoff for various UniPune affiliated colleges cutoff 2025 for the General category All India candidates:

UniPune accepts the MHCET Law scores for admission to the Law courses through affiliated colleges. As per UniPune cutoff 2025, the last round closing scores for D.E.S's Shri Navalmal Firodia Law College stood at 98.11 for the General AI category. In 2024, the closing rank stood at 98.7, witnessing an increasing trend.
MHCET Law Counselling was concluded after the release of the final round. Candidates can refer to the table given below to check out the previous year's cutoff trends for differe
Some of the important dates related to MHCET Law are given below:
Download the consolidated previous year's MHCET Law Counselling Rounds for the All India category candidates:

UniPune MAH B.Ed CET Cutoff 2025 has been published for all roundsfor the students belonging to the General All India quota. According to the closing cutoffs for the General category candidates under the AI quota, the cutoff range went from 7.54 in the first round to 98.3 score in the last round. The hardest college for admission according to the first round cutoff was Smt. Kashibai Navale College of Education, with the cutoff being 97.31.

Unipune MAH BEd CET was concluded for candidates interested in studying BEd at the university. Unipune releases its cutoff through its affiliated colleges. The cutoff is released for students belonging to the General AI category. For admission to Jai Ganesh College of Education, the last round closing was 44.95, in the General AI category. For MIT Saint Dnyaneshwar B.Ed. College, the cuoff was closed at 81.47, among the General AI category candidates seeking admission to BEd.
Some of the important dates related to UniPune B.Ed cutoff 2025 are given below:
Candidates can refer to the table given below to download the consolidated previous year's MAH B.Ed CET Counselling Rounds for admission to Pune University B.Ed courses:

UniPune MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for students belonging to the All India and Home State quota. According to the MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025, the cutoff for MCA course admission ranged from 99.83 to 99.28 for the candidates belonging to the General AI category.
For the General HS category, the cutoff was 99.11. To know more cutoff information about other categories, rounds, and quotas, see the table below:

As per the MCA Cutoff 2025 for the General category candidates under the Home State quota, the cutoff in the last round of admission was 99.28, whereas, in 2024, admissions were closed at a percentile of 99.78, and in 2023, the last round cutoff was 99.92. This pattern over the years suggests that the competition for MCA admission has decreased over the past 3 years. Students can refer to the table below to know more about other categories and quotas, and rounds year-wise cutoff of 2025, 2024, a
Students aiming for admission to UniPune via the MAH MCA CET for the next academic year can refer to the table below to know the important dates for the MAH MCA CET 2026.

Students who want to gain a seat at UniPune for the MCA course should know the cutoff trends over the years to better understand what percentiles are required for admissions. To help with the same, the table below contains the consolidated year-wise PDFs for 2025, 2024, and 2023.
Tabulated below are the important UniPune MAH HM CET important dates 2025. Students can download the essential dates table as a PDF file for later use to better understand the cutoff trends.

Candidates seeking admission to UniPune Bachelor in Hotel Management and Catering Technology can refer to the table given below to download the previous year's consolidated MAH HM CET Counselling Rounds for the General All India category students:

UniPune cutoff 2025 has been released for ME courses based on MHT CET MTech scores. For admission to Pune University' candidates need to have valid MHTCET MTech scores. As per the UniPune ME cutoff 2025, the Last Round percentile ranged between 1.29 and 20.47 for General Home State category candidates. The college that was the hardest to get admission to was Pune Institute of Computer Technology, Society for Computer Technology and Research, with a cutoff of 20.47 in the last round, followed by

SPPU accepts MAH MArch CET scores for admission to the M.Arch programme for the General AI category. For the General category candidates under the All India quota, the cutoff ranged from 99.08 to 98.27, according to the first and last round closing percentile.

highlights.description: One of India’s top schools is UniPune. Numerous national and international ranking agencies have continuously recognised it as one of the best institutes. According to the NIRF Ranking 2025, the institute has been awarded #91 rank in the Overall category, #56 under University, and #11 under State Public University. UniPune is also ranked internationally by QS World Rankings 2025 at #631-640 position. The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around UniPune rankings.

rankings.highlight: 4th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Pune In 2025
Best Among QS World University Rankings Ranked Colleges In Pune In 2024
Best Among India Today Ranked Colleges In Pune In 2025

nirf.description:
Based on the rankings from NIRF, UniPune outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the NIRF ranking system. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have dropped in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, UniPune fell 54 ranks to #91 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, UniPune fell 33 ranks to #56 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It can be seen that; in the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranks have descended when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, UniPune fell 8 ranks to #11 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.
Read less

comparison.college: Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology
SKUAST - Sher-E-Kashmir University of Agricultural Sciences and Technology of Kashmir

qs_world.description:
As per the overall score, UniPune has been placed at a good position by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Top Global Universities' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Top Global Universities' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend. In 2026, UniPune climbed 65 ranks to #566 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Asia', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, UniPune fell 34 ranks to #207 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, UniPune fell 8 ranks to #37 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. Throughout the preceding two years, the rank has oscillated but is currently stable.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.
Read less

hostel.description: The University has a chain of seven Boys' hostels and six Girls' hostels providing accommodation to more than 1221 students. It also has a University Guest House, which is comfortable and well-furnished and has more than 34 rooms with dining facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by College of Engineering, PuneReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: COEP Technological University review.
reviews.review_text: Some faculty members are quite helpful and knowledgeable, who help students for getting industry ready and gain good technical skills and soft skills. The boys' hostel is quite old, not so good, food quality is above average. Other facilities like sports, infra and all are good. COEP is the only college in Pune to have its own boat club, which is active.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by College of Engineering, PuneReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: COEP is the regional underdog.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, but the number of students in the location is really low. Mess food is okay. The gym is crowded. Ground is good. Wi-Fi is provided in the entire campus, but sometimes it doesn't work. Located in the city center, so many fun activities around. The overall infrastructure is decent.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Zeal College of Engineering and ResearchReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is an easy-going engineering life.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure and facilities, labs are good, and overall, a good mid-level campus. Very good college, but the downside is that there are limited grounds and sports facilities. Courses are available, and indoor activities are very good. The college also appreciates indoor activities rather than outdoor activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Hutatma Rajguru MahavidyalayaReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Best college in the Khed Taluka.
reviews.review_text: The college campus was very big and versatile. All fields were available. Teachers were very strict and individually concentrated on all of us. Classrooms were neat and clean, and there were cameras. Hostel facility, canteen facilities, and stationery were available in the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by ISB&M College of CommerceReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Our college gives us 100% placements. Faculty members are kind and approachable.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, library, computer, classrooms, etc. Hostels are also very good. Our mess provides us with healthy and hygienic food. We got morning tea with breakfast, then lunch, then evening snacks and dinner. Medical facilities are available in the college and also in the hostel. We have different activities like sports, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Pimpri Chinchwad College of EngineeringReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: An average college in Pune.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very good and nice. I stayed there for my whole FY. We have fast Wi-Fi, alternate-day cleaning services, food delivery options, hot water, and vending machines. It is a 12-story hostel. We also have medical facilities available, and the management hosted events for us. About the food, it is horrible and very bad. I did not like it, but the hostel is great.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by PVG's College of Engineering and Technology and G.K. Pate (Wani)
reviews.review_heading: Placements are not good, Don't take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in computer labs and the Training & Placement Office. Labs are well-equipped with the latest technology. Air conditioning is also available in all computer labs. Classrooms are well-equipped with smart TVs. The library area is also good, but the mess facility is not good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by MCE Society's Allana College of PharmacyReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the separation of students based on gender and with the events.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. Good Wi-Fi connectivity. Classrooms have projectors. The library is separate for girls and boys, which is a big disappointment, as in group studies, there's no place to study together, and in a university, having a separate library is not preferable.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Army Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: This is a good college to consider.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is good. The main building of this college is also good. There is a 4th-year hostel which was made recently. It is the best hostel in this college. It has a lift. We have a college gym that is common for all, and girls have their own gym in their hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Pune Institute of Computer Technology, Society for Computer Technology and ResearchReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements, great crowd, good food, okay facilities, bad faculty.
reviews.review_text: College is small, but the facilities, like labs and classes, are decent. The number of students is high, so extra lab practice is almost impossible. The library is good, books are plenty, and the space is also okay if you arrive in the morning. A hostel for both genders is good as it has been renovated. Better find local hostels in the area, like Union, Khade, or Stanza. The college canteen is good enough, but the surrounding area has better options. The college gym is small but very well-mainta...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by International Institute of Information Technology, PuneReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good college for scholars.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is top-notch, and the hostels are not that good, but still okay. Triple-sharing rooms are available for first-year students, and from next year, double-sharing is also available. We have a water cooler on every floor and a LAN port to get Wi-Fi in every room. The room is good. Food is okay in the mess.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Shri Guru Teg Bahadur College, SathialaReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good learning experience at GNDU with a supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good and well-maintained. Classrooms and labs are properly set up and comfortable for regular use. Wi-Fi and library facilities are available for students. Hostel rooms are clean and manageable, and the food in the mess is decent. Sports, medical, and other basic facilities are also available, making campus life smooth and comfortable.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by College of Engineering, PuneReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: I love the college and its life here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is a bit weak. Classrooms are clean, and the library is well-equipped. The hostel infrastructure really needs to be improved, and the mess food is fine. The sports facilities are good, and our college has its own teams that frequently participate in tournaments. College Sport events also take place.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Pune Institute of Computer Technology, Society for Computer Technology and ResearchReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Small campus but big exploration.
reviews.review_text: The college provides unlimited Wi-Fi for all students on campus. Individual labs are available for each practical subject. But classrooms are limited, so we have to compromise on college timing. Because of that, some batches are taken late. The college library is beneficial for students. Overall, the campus size is small.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Zeal College of Engineering and ResearchReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Decent academics with a balanced campus life.
reviews.review_text: College has good infrastructure with proper classrooms, library and Wi-Fi. Hostel facilities are decent, mess food is average. Sports and medical facilities are available and manageable. The medical facility is good as many insights college has taken upfront action towards medical incidents.

college_info.college_name: Savitribai Phule Pune University (SPPU)

data.description: Savitribai Phule Pune University has a sports complex that includes Basketball and Volleyball Courts along-with Cricket and Football Grounds , Gymnasium and a Sports Hostel . The complex is by parks. It features an open ground for outdoor games and athletics. Accommodation facility is also availble for up to 80 sportspeople.

college_info.intro:
Dr MGR Educational and Research Institute popular programmes are MBA and BSc. MBA students are placed in top companies such as IBM, Google, Cognizant, and others. Dr. MGR Educational and Research Institute MBA students can work in various sectors such as the Retail and Corporate Sector, Media Sector, Hospitality Sector, and others. Dr MGR Educational and Research Institute is ranked for its various courses. Hence, it is one of the best colleges offering UG and PG courses to students.
Dr MGR Educational and Research Institute University BSc students can work in fields such as Teaching, Research Analysis, and others and can become Data Scientists, Agriculture Officers, Forest Officers, Biochemists, and others. reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of the good placement.

review_content.Placements: In our college, every year, 80 to 90 per cent of students get placed in law in high court, district court, cognizant, TCS, and many more. Top recruiting companies are High Court, TCS, Supreme Court and many more, and the roles offered here are trainee roles. The highest package is 12 LPA, the average is 6 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. Every year, 80% of students get an internship in different courts.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are excellent in this college, plus Wi-Fi, and the labs are good, neat and clean. The quality of food is acceptable, plus hostel rooms are quite good for studying. Different kinds of sports, like cricket and football, are held in this college. Students love to eat delicious food here.
