review_summary.college_name: Dr MGR Educational and Research Institute Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in English - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Everyone promised placements.

content.Placements: Placement-wise, it was a stronger institution. For our discipline, companies such as PlanetSpark, Educare Ventures Private Ltd., Jessi Publications, and Ambitious Global Services were among the most promising and frequently discussed recruiters. Reputed schools like Podar International School and Rainbow International School also hired graduates from our program for various job opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Smart boards were fixed in all the classrooms for creating interactive learning space. There would be a collaboration space available for the students to discuss and to take a practical assessment. A thing to be worried about in college was that they were charging a higher capital fee and there were no hostel facilities provided in the institution, they suggested some PGs outside the campus.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It's a really good infrastructure and facilities. Good for placements in top companies.

content.Placements: Approximately 60 to 80 percent of attendance is needed, and they are offering 6 LPA to 16 LPA in top companies. Internship in my course is nearly 60 to 80 percent of students. They offered top companies for placements like IBM, Accenture, Cipla, Deloitte, Wipro, Infosys, and various types of companies are offered in this college. You can learn the top roles about cybersecurity, AI, data analyst, data scientist, and more.
content.Infrastructure: 24/7 Wi-Fi for all hostellers and food for vegetarians and non-vegetarians are both available. There are separate hostels for girls and boys for their privacy. The canteen food is really good, they prefer sports and games, and they have neat classrooms, libraries, etc.

individual_reviews.course: LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of the good placement.

content.Placements: In our college, every year, 80 to 90 per cent of students get placed in law in high court, district court, cognizant, TCS, and many more. Top recruiting companies are High Court, TCS, Supreme Court and many more, and the roles offered here are trainee roles. The highest package is 12 LPA, the average is 6 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. Every year, 80% of students get an internship in different courts.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are excellent in this college, plus Wi-Fi, and the labs are good, neat and clean. The quality of food is acceptable, plus hostel rooms are quite good for studying. Different kinds of sports, like cricket and football, are held in this college. Students love to eat delicious food here.

individual_reviews.course: LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the placement and faculty.

content.Placements: Every year, 80 to 90% students get placed in our college in top recruiting companies. Top recruiting companies are Sealdah High Court, Subordinate Courts, TCS, Cognizant, Wipro, and many more. Top roles offered by companies are court trainee and analyst trainee, the highest package is 12 LPA, average is 6 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. Every year, 90% of students get internships in TCS, Sealdah Court.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are quite good and acceptable. Wi-Fi is good for students to work in the lab. Plus, the quality of food in the hostel and canteen is delicious, and students love that food. Hostel rooms are also neat and clean. Different kinds of sports like football and cricket are also held here

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Enjoying the college days with both learning and a set of great friends and faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements in my college are very structured. They maintain a placement cell that is very active, with daily updates of companies that are hiring shared via a WhatsApp group. They also conduct job fairs where students can attend interviews with various companies on campus.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. The lab has enough systems with the required configuration and Ethernet connected for each system. Students can access the Wi-Fi if required, but speed can be a little issue as many students connect at the same time. Classrooms and the library are clean and good. As for the hostel, I can't speak because I’m a day scholar.

faqs.question: How much rank should I score to get Dr. MGR Educational and Research Institute?
faqs.answer: In 2024, Dr. MGR Educational and Research Institute has released the NEET cutoff for the UG courses. In connection to it, the required rank as perMGR Educational and Research Institute cutoff 2024stood between270532and368968for the General AI category candidates.

faqs.question: Can I get into MGR Educational Institute with 70% in class 12?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can surely get admission at 12th percentile of 70, as your 10+2 scores doesn't matter in the case of NEET PG admission. The needed criteria which a candidates must follow is to have MBBS degree from an institute recognised by the Medical Council of India (MCI). Such candidates must possess MBBS degree or a Provisional MBBS Pass Certificate at the time of admissions.

faqs.question: What is the expected NEET cutoff 2025?
faqs.answer: Dr. MGR Educational and Research Institute cutoff 2024is based on NEET UG scores followed by the NEET UG Counselling for the All India Quota. Considering the NEET UG Round 3 seat allotment results, the BDS rank stood at368968for the General AI category candidates. Over the years, NEET UG cutoff had shown fluctuations. With respect to it, the expected cutoff can stood upto5 lakhfor the General AI category candidates.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance test for BTech at Dr MGR Educational and Research Institute?
faqs.answer: Yes, to get admission at Dr MGR Educational and Research Institute for BTech aspirants need to have valid score of AIEEE or MGREEE followed by CSAB counseeling. In order to get admission to BTech full-time course, the student needs to qualify for Class 12 or equivalent with 45% aggregate. Further, in Class12 the Maths/Physics/Chemistry or Biology should be the compulsory subjects.

faqs.question: What is the last date for Dr MGR Educational and Research Institute admission?
faqs.answer: Dr. M.G.R. Educational and Research Institute admissions are open online for various courses. Till now, no schedule has been released by the university. Since the application portal is live, candidates can apply online for their preferred course.The university conducts entrance exams to shortlist candidates for various courses.DR MGR Educational and Research Instituteoffers more than 20 courses across various schools, such as the Faculty of Engineering and Technology, and the Faculty of Humanities and Science, among others.

faqs.question: Can I join Dr MGR Educational and Research Institute directly?
faqs.answer: That depends on what you mean by "Directly" I suppose that you mean without JEE/ NEET, and if thats so, then yes you surely can based upon your 12th percentage. But its highly recommendable that you appear for JEE/NEET as it opens doors for other Nationally Recognized colleges like NITs and GFTIs and if you have already given and not getting any college than yes you can surely gain an admission by 12th percentage basis  in this college.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for DR MGR Educational and Research Institute BA?
faqs.answer: The selection of the candidates at DR MGR Educational and Research Institute for BA is based on their performance in the last qualifying exam. Candidates must have passed their Class 12 or an equivalent exam from a recognised board to be eligible to apply for the programme. The shortlisted candidates are further proceeding to the next step. They must present the required documents for the verification purpose. To confirm the seat for the BA programme at MGRERI, aspirants must pay the admission fee.

placement_data.title: Dr MGR Educational and Research Institute Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: As per Dr MGR Educational and Research Institute NIRF reports 2024, the median package offered during BTech and MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 6.9 LPA and INR 6 LPA , respectively. Earlier, the NIRF report 2023 is released. As per the report, 1,130 UG and 733 PG students were placed during Dr MGR University placements 2022. The median package offered to UG (4-year) and UG (5-year) students was INR 5.6 LPA and INR 9 LPA . For PG (2-year) and PG (3-year) courses, the median package offered during Dr MGR University placements 2022 stood at INR 7 LPA and INR 12 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: How are the placements of BTech in Dr MGR Educational and Research Institute?
faqs.answer: The placements of BTech in Dr MGR Educational and Research Institute are decent and improving every year. According to the reviews of the students and alumni, the institute has a good placement record for BTech courses. Some of the top recruiting companies that visit the campus are Siemens, L&T, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, TCS, HCL, etc. The average salary package offered to BTech students is around INR 3.6 lakh per annum. The highest salary package offered was INR 7.5 lakh per annum and the lowest salary package was INR 2.5 lakh per annum.

faqs.question: How many companies participated in Dr. M.G.R. Educational and Research Institute placements 2023?
faqs.answer: More than 900 jobs were offered by 170 companies that took part in the 2023 Dr. M.G.R. Educational and Research Institute (MGR) placements. The most expensive plan available is INR 24 Lacs year, while the least expensive is INR 2.5 Lacs annually. In addition to offering internships, placements, seminars, guest lectures, conclaves, business and research initiatives, and more, the university's Placement and Training Cell collaborates with industry partners. Amazon, Cognizant, IBM, Infosys, Accenture, TCS, HCL Technologies, Frost & Sullivan, Tech Mahindra, Virtusa, and SBI Life Insurance are a few businesses that have taken part in MGR placements.

nirf.description:
Dr MGR Educational and Research Institute has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for Dr MGR Educational and Research Institute indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend. In 2025, Dr MGR Educational and Research Institute's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Dr MGR Educational and Research Institute's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute has displayed an increasing trend in the 'Engineering' category when compared with the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Dr MGR Educational and Research Institute climbed 50 ranks to #151 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Architecture and Planning' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Dr MGR Educational and Research Institute fell 10 ranks to #32 rank in the 'Architecture and Planning' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

As for the hostel, I can't speak because I’m a day scholar.

reviews.review_heading: Neutralists are satisfied with the specific faculty members and friends.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, two laboratories with 70+ systems with the internet connection and 5 ton centralized air conditioning. I am a day scholar. I do not know much about the hostel, but the college canteen food is good, and the prices are slightly high.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and decent placements with scope for industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: Provide snacks and meals at reasonable prices. Medical facilities include a campus health centre with a visiting doctor. Sports facilities include a cricket ground, volleyball, basketball, and indoor games for student recreation. Hostel food is average, totally.

reviews.review_heading: Very good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure available here is far better compared to other universities. The rooms are neatly maintained with workers cleaning every day. All the classrooms, library, and mess are maintained with air conditioning and cleaned every day.

reviews.review_heading: Dr. M.G.R. Educational and Research Institute.
reviews.review_text: Our department has good infrastructure facilities such as spacious classrooms, projectors, well-equipped computer labs with high-speed Wi-Fi, and a central library with a wide collection of books and e-resources. The hostel facilities are decent, with proper rooms,  24/7 water and electricity, and security. Mess food is satisfactory with both vegetarian and non-vegetarian options, while the canteen offers snacks and beverages. The campus also provides medical facilities, a health center, and amb...

reviews.review_heading: Fate to join this college.
reviews.review_text: Most facilities will be more fun and friendly with students, but some make us feel very bad about the infrastructure. Wi-Fi will not be available, and labs do not really help us to work. Classrooms are literally bad, and benches are not good; this will cause back pain. We have only four classes and then one break. The hostel is available, and the food in the canteen is not too good. Medical facilities are available, sports and games are not very motivating in this course, and the ground will not...

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are good. The campus is sprawling across 250 acres. Smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, a well-stocked library, and seminar halls are available on campus. The quality of food is good. There are separate hostels for both girls and boys on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Students will be satisfied with our college. It has a good campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good because the government is taking care of our college. In our college, labs and library are also good. We have different labs for different subjects in our course. The quality of facilities in the hostel is good. The food may not be good for Andhra and Telangana state students. Maybe it is good for Tamil students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. M.G.R. Educational and Research Institute.
reviews.review_text: Our college is very good. Our college has a strong building with good infrastructure, including separate blocks for different branches, labs, and a library. The computer labs are equipped with high-tech systems, and classrooms are spacious enough for over 100 students.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the good environment, infrastructure, and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The labs and classrooms are very good. There is a big library where you can get the books that you want. There is a washing machine and hot water facility. Good and hygienic quality of food is available. There is a hospital near to the hostel. We can play so many sports, we have big grounds.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good faculty and good teachers.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my course are good. They provide Wi-Fi, good labs, classrooms, and a library, which are good. The food quality is also so good, students can get both veg and non-veg food, and the food changes on a daily basis.

highlights.summary:
Panjab University admissions 2026 for several course are ongoing. Interested candidates can go to the official website to apply or learn more about the desired course. As per the NIRF 2025 rankings, Panjab University ranks #35 under the category 'University', and #57 under the 'Overall' category.

Panjab University admission 2026 is based on entrance exam or merit as per course requirements. A few more updates are as follows:

table.details: - 901-950 by QS World University Ranking 2026 - 35 by NIRF 2025 (University) - 57 by NIRF 2025 (Overall) - 3 by NIRF 2025 (State Public University) - 3 by NIRF 2025 (Pharmacy)

college_info.intro:
Punjab University offers various Certificate, Diploma, Undergraduate, Postgraduate, and PhD programmes in multiple streams such as Business and Management Studies, Accounting and Commerce, Arts (Fine/ Visual/ Performing), Design, Engineering, Humanities and Social Sciences, Law, Medicine, and Health Sciences, and Science, and so on. PUCHD eligibility varies from course to course. Candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria to be able to apply for the course. Punjab University's flagship courses are MBA, BTech, BSc, and BA.
Punjab University offers these courses in full-time mode for the duration of 2 to 5 years. PUCHD fee structure includes tuition fees ranging from INR 480 to INR 6.19 Lakh. Punjab admissions to any of the course is based on merit and entrance exam. Therefore, candidates must secure the suggested minimum aggregate in Class 12 and graduation. Apart from this, candidates must secure valid score in accepted entrance exams such as JEE Main, CAT, MAT, XAT, PU MET, JAC Chandigarh etc. Considering the ROI, Panjab University UIET recorded the placement stats with the highest package of INR 42 LPA. For more details, candidates must visit the official website.
For more information about Punjab University check out the below video:
Candidates can refer to the information below to know more about the university courses and Punjab University Chandigarh fees:

faqs.answer: A:    The answer is both yes and no. admission to all MBA courses is entrance-based at all the MBA offering institutes of PU. While for an Integrated MBA, students need a valid score in JEE Main exam, admission to UBS and UIAMS is subject to a valid score in CATor PU METexams, respectively. Students who wish to get into the specialisations or courses offered by UIAMS are required to appear for PU MET exam and those who wish to get into UBS are required to have a valid score in CAT exam.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth pursuing MBA at Panjab University?
overview_faqs.answer: The highest and average package offered during Panjab University UBS Chandigarh MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 58.48 LPA and INR 13.7 LPA, respectively. Out of 115 students who participated in the placements process, 105 students have received offers till now during Panjab University UBS Chandigarh placements 2023. In addition to this, the university has a five-story impressive library, various spots and playground facilities along with up-to-date labs making it a decent choice among students. For more details on Panjab University's MBA, check out detailed students' reviews or PUCHD MBA.

review_summary.college_name: Panjab University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Please don't consider this.

content.Placements: If you’re coming to this college, then please don’t expect placement. Its the least possible thing college is concerned about. Almost every student here is either for Masters or has a family business, here for just a degree. Barely any student gets placed.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are just natural saunas. Just walk 5 minutes you’ll complete the campus tour. The labs and library are decent. Sports facilities are barely accessible. Never saw a medical facility here, so don’t know. Hostels are really small but decent. Don’t get food from that canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is top-notch choice if you want a balance of everything in life.

content.Placements: 89 percent of students were placed. The highest on-campus package is 21 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are ZS and Infosys. 80 percent got internships. Top roles were SDE and analyst. There were well-recognized companies that visited our campus, and the placements were fine.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well maintained, with a few having AC. Hostels are top-notch with all facilities and no restrictions. Hostel staff is also very good. The hostels are well maintained. There are too many hostels, and students have the choice to choose according to their needs.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: A practical and student-friendly college.

content.Placements: The placements for the B.Com batch were decent, and the requirements were good communication skills with basic domain knowledge. Around 25% of the batch sat for the placements, and most of them got placed. The highest package offered was around 4 LPA, whereas the average was around 2.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college has very good infrastructure and is one of the bigger colleges under Panjab University. The classrooms are big and have blackboards as well as smartboards for good audio-visual aids. There is also a library that has a wide range of books available. Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls with decent facilities. Medical facilities are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Political Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college and students are too good. The environment of the college is positive.

content.Placements: The college provides many opportunities to improve our skills and potential. Many companies come to our college for placements of students. There are many opportunities in our college. Faculty members give knowledge about placements.
content.Infrastructure: There are 3 computer labs in the college. It provides a good network connection. The mess in the hostel is okay. The canteen provides food at an affordable price. It has Nescafé, Verka, and juice corners in the college for students and teachers. There are sports rooms with different games.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college feels average to me.

content.Placements: I am studying B.Sc. Chemistry. There are 24 students in the department. It is a government college, so most students receive financial support through scholarships. Company placements are not discussed. IMAT is the final stage of the course, so internships are conducted during this period. The top roles offered include food safety department roles, forensic science, chemist positions, etc.
content.Infrastructure: As I am studying B.Sc. Chemistry, we need labs, which are only about 50% okay, with limited equipment. Wi-Fi is available only on the ground floor. The classrooms are spacious, but the library is poor, as it is usually closed even though it is a single room. Food availability is good. Currently, there is no hostel facility, and medical facilities are poor. Sports and games are also not very engaged in our college.

admission_overview.title: Panjab University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Panjab University Chandigarh admission process is based on the entrance examination and merit. Panjab University Chandigarh is currently open for admission. The university offers programmes including MA, BA, BBA, MBA, MLib and many more. Panjab University conducts multiple entrance exams, such as PUMET, PU-CET (UG), PU-CET (PG), PU PGLAW, PUTHAT, PULEET, MBAUSOL, PU UGLAW, PU MPhil, and PhD Entrance Test for admission to its various courses. For a few courses, such as MA, BA, MLib, etc., admissions are completely based on merit in the last qualifying examination. Students must go through the Panjab University CHD-conducted/ national-level entrances and then appear for the university-level selection rounds for final admission at Panjab University.

paragraphs: Panjab University admissionhas multiple steps and can be completed online. Admission to UG and PG courses is based on merit and entrance exams. Find below the admission process for Panjab University:
Application Process

Students interested in getting in Panjab University need to submit online application for all UG and PG courses atugadmissions.puchd.ac.inoronlineadmissions.puchd.ac.inas per their preferred course. Panjab University application process is conducted in online mode. The application process for Punjab University admission is generally released in April, every year. Check here thePanjab University admit cardfor popular entrance examination.
Selection Criteria & Release of Merit Lists

After filling out the Punjab University admission form, you need to go through the selection rounds of the desired course. After the rounds are over, course-wise merit lists are posted on the official website.
Final Admission Confirmation
Post the selection rounds, candidates who are shortlisted and have their names on the merit lists can submit the fee and confirm their admission to the relevant course at Panjab University.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in MBA in Panjab University?
faqs.answer: Panjab Univeresity MBA admissions are entirely entrance-based. For admission to MBA course at UBS and UIAMS, candidates must have a valid score of either CAT or  PU MET exams, respectively. The eligibility criteria for MBA course is to pass graduation with minimum 50% aggregate in the relevant stream. Candidates qualifying all the selection parameters will be offered seat via a university-level counselling process.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to Panjab University?
faqs.answer: Panjab University Chandigarh admission process is based on the entrance examination and merit. Panjab University Chandigarh is currently open for admission. The university offers programmes including MA, BA, BBA, MBA, MLib and many more. Panjab University CHD admission is entrance and merit-based for its undergraduate and postgraduate courses. The courses are offered in various streams such as Engineering, Management, Law etc. at Panjab University Chandigarh India. Students can check the table below to know course-wise eligibility and selection criteria for various courses:CoursesEligibilitySelection CriteriaBTechClass 12 with a 50% aggregateJEE Main + JAC Chandigarh CounsellingBScClass 12 with passing marks in English and at least 40% aggregatePU CET UGBComClass 12 with at least 40%-60% aggregateMerit-basedMBAGraduation with a 50% aggregatePU MET/CAT/PU-CET (PG)/JEE Main/JAC ChandigarhBPharmaClass 12 with a 50% aggregateCETUGMBBSClass 12 with a 50% aggregateNEET + CounsellingBachelor

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Panjab University?
faqs.answer: For Panjab University admission 2025, the university conducts multiple entrance exams such as PUMET, PUCET, PGLAW, PUMEET, PU UGLAW, PU MPhil and PhD Entrance Test, among others, for admission to its UG, PG and doctoral-level courses. However, candidates can reach out to the admission office to understand if there are any seats available to PU programmes for direct admission. The online link to fill and submit the online admission form for UG/ Certificate courses can be checked on the official website. Candidates seeking admission via the sports category must submit the certificate/ documents in the office of Campus Sports (Gymnasium Building, Jawaharlal Nehru Complex), PU, Chandigarh on or before the last date for submission of admission form.

placement_data.title: Panjab University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Punjab University has released the placement details for its constituent colleges - University Institute of Engineering and Technology and University Business School. The highest and average packages offered to the Engineering batch 2025 was INR 24 LPA and INR 8.51 LPA , respectively. More than 100 companies took part in the placement drive. There were 356 job offers made during the Punjab University UIET placements 2025. The students of the MBA batch 2025 secured the highest package of INR 24 LPA and the average pacage of INR 12.43 LPA in 2025.

Earlier, as per the media reports, the highest and average package offered during Panjab University MBA placements 2023 was INR 58.48 LPA and INR 13.7 LPA , respectively. The MBA placement rate recorded during Panjab University placements 2023 was 91.3%.

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered during Panjab University placements?
faqs.answer: The highest package offered to the Engineering batch 2025 was INR 24 LPA. On the other hand, the highest salary offered to the MBA students during Punjab University placements 2025 was also INR 24 LPA.

faqs.question: How are the placements at Panjab University?
faqs.answer: The key highlights of PU Chandigarh UIET placements 2024 as compared with 2023 and 2022 are presented below: Particulars PU UIET Placement Statistics (2022) PU UIET Placement Statistics (2023) PU UIET Placement Statistics (2024) Highest package INR 56 LPA (Off Campus) INR 32 LPA (On Campus) INR 45 LPA INR 42 LPA (Off Campus) INR 25 LPA (On Campus) Average package INR 8.85 LPA INR 8.72 LPA INR 9.11 LPA Total offers 423 382 314 Total companies 50+ 50+ 50+ Note: UIET denotes University Institute of Engineering and Technology and the institute functions under Panjab University. Further, as per media reports, the key highlights of PU Chandigarh UBS placements 2023 as compared with 2022 are presented below: Particulars UBS Placement Statistics (2022) UBS Placement Statistics (2023) Highest package INR 53.06 LPA INR 58.48 LPA Average package INR 10.13 LPA INR 13.7 LPA Placement rate 96.29% 91.3% Companies visited 31 45+ Note: UBS placement data is sourced from media reports. UBS is University Business School, and the school functions under Panjab University.

faqs.question: How many students are placed during Panjab University placements?
faqs.answer: According to Panjab University stream-wise NIRF reports 2024, the course-wise number of students placed over the past three years during Panjab University placements is presented below: Course Placement Rate (2021) Placement Rate (2022) Placement Rate (2023) MBA Total students: 143 Students placed: 106 Total students: 140 Students placed: 130 Total students: 121 Students placed: 113 BTech Total students: 490 Students placed: 280 Total students: 606 Students placed: 379 Total students: 591 Students placed: 424 MTech Total students: 37 Students placed: 4 Total students: 43 Students placed: 25 Total students: 87 Students placed: 29 LLB Total students: 280 Students placed: 197 Total students: 260 Students placed: 210 Total students: 240 Students placed: 160 BA LLB Total students: 244 Students placed: 200 Total students: 240 Students placed: 120 Total students: 240 Students placed: 204 LLM (1-year) Total students: 2 Students placed: 1 Total students: 12 Students placed: 0 Total students: 54 Students placed: 15 BPharm Total students: 47 Students placed: 0 Total students: 50 Students placed: 2 Total students: 55 Students placed: 0 MPharm Total students: 64 Students placed: 53 Total students: 74 Students placed: 65 Total students: 64 Students placed: 55 BDS Total students: 78 Students placed: 11 Total students: 73 Students placed: 38 Total students: 88 Students placed: 43 MDS Total students: 15 Students placed: 15 Total students: 13 Students placed: 13 Total students: 15 Students placed: 15

faqs.question: How many offers are made during Panjab University UIET placements?
faqs.answer: More than 100 companies took part in the Punjab University UIET placements 2025 and offered 356 job offers to the students. Some of the top recruiters include Samsung, Infosys, KPMG, Deloitte, Adobe, etc.

faqs.question: How are Panjab University MBA placements?
faqs.answer: Punjab University offers decent placements annually to its MBA graduates. In 2025, the highest and average packages offered to the MBA batch 2025 was INR 24 LPA and INR 12.43 LPA, respectively. The median package offered was INR 12 LPA.

faqs.question: How expensive is MBA at Panjab University?
faqs.answer: The total fee for MBA ranges between INR 42,700 and INR 6.20 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. For more details and fee break-up for MBA at PU, candidates are advised to reach out to the admission office of Panjab University or the MBA-affiliated college of PU. Other than the course fee, students are required to pay the registration fee for CAT or PU MET exam depending on their admission process The application fee is INR 3,250 at UBS and INR 2,175 (PU MET) for General category candidates.

faqs.question: What is the MBA application fee of PUCHD?
faqs.answer: The application fee for MBA at Panjab University Chandigarh is INR 2,710 for General category candidates. Panjab University offers two-year MBA programmes across four specialisations via the University Business School and across seven specialisations via the University Institute of Applied Management Sciences . Other than these, Dr. S. Bhatnagar University Institute of Chemical Engineering and Technology offers an Integrated BE (Chemical) - MBA to the students. For the application fee of UIAMS and Dr. SS Bhatnagar, candidates can refer to their official websites.

highlights.description:
Panjab University is one of the most popular institutes of the country. Most of the ranking bodies, both national & international, have recognised this institute as one of the popular choices among students. The institute has been ranked #57 by the NIRF 2025 under the category Overall, #35 under University, #93 under Engineering, #92 under Management, and #3 under Pharmacy. At the global level, the QS World 2025 ranked the institute at #1001-1200 position. The institute has been ranked well by eminent ranking bodies because of its curriculum, infrastructure and well-qualified faculty. Students can check the article in this space for more details around the Panjab University rankings.

nirf.description:
Based on the rankings from NIRF, Panjab University outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the NIRF ranking system. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Panjab University climbed 3 ranks to #57 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Panjab University climbed 3 ranks to #35 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Panjab University climbed 8 ranks to #93 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute's ranks in the 'Management' category; have shown a fluctuation when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Panjab University's rank is #92, the same as last year's rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.

It can be seen that the Panjab University's rankings in 'Top Global Universities' category have displayed a fluctuating trend as per the ranks of the previous years. In 2026, Panjab University climbed 100 ranks to #901 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings.
The rankings of the institute in the 'Asia' category have demonstrated a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, Panjab University fell 7 ranks to #276 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Rankings achieved by the institute under the 'Southern Asia' category have exibited a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, Panjab University fell 2 ranks to #61 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.

hostel.description: The campus has hostel facilities with the capacity of  8 each for boys and 9 for girls and a Working Women Hostel which can accomodate more than 6000 students. Each hostel has a dining hall and canteen, wifi facility several deserts and water coolers, a visitors' lounge

library.description: Five storyed impressive Library building with seating accommodation of 500 readers. Fully Computerized library providing internet and email facility. Also, access to approximately 5000 online full-text journals, is available through INDEST- Consortium, and UGC- INFONET.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Hockey Ground, Volleyball Court, Kabaddi Court, Shooting Range, Weight Lifting, Judo, Wrestling Court

library.description: Five storyed impressive Library building with seating accommodation of 500 readers. Fully Computerized library providing internet and email facility. Also, access to approximately 5000 online full-text journals, is available through INDEST- Consortium, and UGC- INFONET.

cafeteria.description: The cafeteria is located in the spacious and airy campus and serves delicious and hygienic food. Refreshments are available at the college canteen at affordable rates. Adequate seating facilities are provided to accommodate students and staff even during peak time.

hostel.description: The campus has hostel facilities with the capacity of  8 each for boys and 9 for girls and a Working Women Hostel which can accomodate more than 6000 students. Each hostel has a dining hall and canteen, wifi facility several deserts and water coolers, a visitors' lounge

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Hockey Ground, Volleyball Court, Kabaddi Court, Shooting Range, Weight Lifting, Judo, Wrestling Court

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Physics Lab

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Goswami Ganesh Dutta S.D. CollegeReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Please don't consider this.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are just natural saunas. Just walk 5 minutes you’ll complete the campus tour. The labs and library are decent. Sports facilities are barely accessible. Never saw a medical facility here, so don’t know. Hostels are really small but decent. Don’t get food from that canteen.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Panjab UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college is top-notch choice if you want a balance of everything in life.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well maintained, with a few having AC. Hostels are top-notch with all facilities and no restrictions. Hostel staff is also very good. The hostels are well maintained. There are too many hostels, and students have the choice to choose according to their needs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Post Graduate Government CollegeReviewed on 16 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: A practical and student-friendly college.
reviews.review_text: The college has very good infrastructure and is one of the bigger colleges under Panjab University. The classrooms are big and have blackboards as well as smartboards for good audio-visual aids. There is also a library that has a wide range of books available. Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls with decent facilities. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Post Graduate Government CollegeReviewed on 5 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college and students are too good. The environment of the college is positive.
reviews.review_text: There are 3 computer labs in the college. It provides a good network connection. The mess in the hostel is okay. The canteen provides food at an affordable price. It has Nescafé, Verka, and juice corners in the college for students and teachers. There are sports rooms with different games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Govt Arts and Science CollegeReviewed on 2 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My college feels average to me.
reviews.review_text: As I am studying B.Sc. Chemistry, we need labs, which are only about 50% okay, with limited equipment. Wi-Fi is available only on the ground floor. The classrooms are spacious, but the library is poor, as it is usually closed even though it is a single room. Food availability is good. Currently, there is no hostel facility, and medical facilities are poor. Sports and games are also not very engaged in our college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Goswami Ganesh Dutta S.D. CollegeReviewed on 1 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It has excellent campus infrastructure, but poor placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is undoubtedly the strongest aspect of the college. There is a well stocked library with Wi-Fi. The reading room is great for self-study. The canteen food is quite decent but not so good. Students also get medical and sports facilities to use.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by Chandigarh College of ArchitectureReviewed on 25 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good facility and infrastructure, but quite a complex culture.
reviews.review_text: Good facility, but girls' hostel and boys' hostel still are very misogynistic, but at least there are non-sharing rooms plus the area of hostel is posh, so no harassment, but ragging of hostels is still tolerated by students of 1st year without the warden knowing.

reviews.review_heading: Great faculty who are highly qualified and experienced. Provides comfort to the students.
reviews.review_text: The department is well built, clean, and has all the required facilities. The labs are also well developed and have every instrument along with helpful lab assistants. The hostel also has every facility, like stocked shops. University campuses have a separate gym for women and a swimming pool as well.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Panjab UniversityReviewed on 21 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: You can enjoy your college life because of the crowd, but the course is not that good.
reviews.review_text: In our hostels, basically PU hostel are very bad, you cannot live there. Wi-Fi speed is okay, but it is not frequently working. Food is also not that good, it's very average in the mess and in the canteen as well. Sports are very good, there are many facilities available for sports persons. Department teachers are well-know of teaching of the subject and labs are pretty decent.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by S.C.D. Government CollegeReviewed on 20 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: All facilities of S.C.D. Government College are good.
reviews.review_text: Very nice facilities are provided to students, such as big and clean classrooms and nice teachers. In my BCA course, the college provides a separate PC (computer) to every student in the lab, and all computers are properly updated with the latest versions and with a high-speed Wi-Fi network. Hostel of S.C.D. Government College, Ludhiana, is also very nice, with a good quality of food and clean rooms, including beds and more amenities. The canteen of this college is very nice and clean. Medical f...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by DAV College, AboharReviewed on 14 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: DAV College, Abohar is nice but not that good.
reviews.review_text: The library is good, and grounds are good. In classrooms, there is no air-conditioning and not very good ventilation, so it is not good in summer. Overall, it is fine. The canteen is very bad. Other things are good. The liberty is good, and students are also fine here.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Dr. S. S. Bhatnagar University Institute of Chemical Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 5 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty members have a bad attitude.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good, but many pieces of equipment are not working and have been in that condition for many years. No one takes responsibility for fixing them. The hostels are good, but it is difficult to get accommodation if your merit is low or if you are not involved in campus activities or politics.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by University Institute of Legal Studies, Panjab UniversityReviewed on 28 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good campus, average faculty, but strong overall environment.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available for all students, facilitating the internet and their skills. There is a well-equipped computer lab with 30 computers in it, and free internet connectivity, including Wi-Fi, to further enhance the research ability of the lab, managed by a team of well-trained and dedicated professionals.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by DAV College, ChandigarhReviewed on 25 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good campus and college life, but placement rates are not that good.
reviews.review_text: The average infrastructure is not too good. Some classrooms are so good, but some classes are the worst. The benches in some classes are good, but in some classes they're not. The canteen is good with decent food prices. The sports ground is too big, and there is a cricket ground in the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Goswami Ganesh Dutta S.D. CollegeReviewed on 24 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because the infrastructure is good, and campus life at SD College is also good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the course and hostels is very good at SD College. All the labs are fully AC centralised, even the classrooms too, and the food available in the mess and canteens of both hostels (boys and girls) is good. Medical facilities are also provided if any disease occurs to a student.

college_info.college_name: Himalayan Institute of Medical Sciences, Swami Rama Himalayan University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Himalayan Institute of Medical Sciences, Swami Rama Himalayan University:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Humanities & Social Sciences and Nursing. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Sc., MBBS and UG Diploma. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.Sc., MD and MS. Himalayan Institute of Medical Sciences, Swami Rama Himalayan University courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Himalayan Institute of Medical Sciences, Swami Rama Himalayan University courses stands around INR 30,000 to 90,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Himalayan Institute of Medical Sciences, Swami Rama Himalayan University Uttarakhand admission is based on NEET UG, NEET SS, Uttarakhand NEET exams. The institute releases the cutoff lists separately for these exams, for admisison to various courses. For instance, for MBBS admission, the exams accepted are NEET and Uttarakhand NEET.
faqs.question: What are the entrance exams accepted by Himalayan Institute of Medical Sciences, Swami Rama Himalayan University Uttarakhand?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Himalayan Institute of Medical Sciences.

review_content.Placements: Around 100% of students are placed and salary packages are offered depending on their abilities. Any hospital can recruit students. Internships are also available for students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is good with ample space and educational resources. Wi-Fi is available everywhere. Laboratories and classrooms are spacious and maintained well. It also provides a library. The hostel is clean and the food served in the mess is average. Canteens are good. Sports and games are also provided.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are well-qualified and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is good and they have a strong emphasis on quality teaching. Our course curriculum is decided by NMC and it is followed strictly throughout this college. It also makes students ready for future practice. Semester exams are difficult according to the syllabus and the passing percentage is 50%. Other PG courses like nursing, management, engineering, and BPT physiotherapy are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Medical Technology (Radiotherapy) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is the best in Uttarakhand.

review_content.Placements: Around 99% of students are placed. Maximum students get placements when they are doing internships. The salary ranges between Rs.40,000 to 50,000 per month. The role offered is radiation therapist.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good and reliable which is full of the best infrastructure and facilities. Facilities are top-notch with the best experience.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very knowledgeable and are out of the mark. Teachers are well qualified in their field especially physics professors. University examinations are somewhere easy. They have more than 25 years of experience.

faqs.question: Q: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?

faqs.answer: Humanities as a stream provides a wide range of courses that can be studied after completing their 12th grade. Pursuing any of these degrees prepares you to understand the various levels of humanities and, as a result, carve out an appropriate job path. Candidates in the humanities can apply for positions in the government sector, such as banking firms, government ministries, legal firms, and political analysts.Content Writer, Civil Services, Human Resource Manager, Defense Services, Lawyer, Journalist, Counsellor, and Therapist positions are available. As freshers, humanities graduates can expect to earn between INR 2-6 LPA.

answer.text: Following are the industries that employ MD Dermatology candidates:IndustryDescriptionHealthcare IndustryHospitals, private clinics, and dermatology centers actively hire dermatologists.Cosmetic IndustryCompanies offering skincare products and cosmetic dermatology services recruit dermatologists for product development and consultancy.PharmaceuticalsPharmaceutical companies hire dermatologists for research and development of skin-related drugs and treatments.

faqs.question: Which industries hire MD Dermatology course graduates?

rows: Hospitals, private clinics, and dermatology centers actively hire dermatologists.
Companies offering skincare products and cosmetic dermatology services recruit dermatologists for product development and consultancy.
Pharmaceutical companies hire dermatologists for research and development of skin-related drugs and treatments.

answer.text: For last year, the closing rank for Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) was 202892 which is very close to this range. This was for general category under All India quota. Unless the candidate belongs to some other category or domicile, one cannot afford to score less than this. With this rank, there is a probability of getting admission however since, the cut offs keep changing year on year, it is advisable to try to score better ranks to increase your chances of getting admission in Himalayan Institute of Medical Sciences, Swami Rama Himalayan University.

content.Placements: In my batch, there are only 35 students. There are no placements for BMLT students. There is a six-month internship at our college. It is good for the medical field. BBA is good for placements. It offers bioscience courses. It is the best for MBBS and nursing due to the hospital.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms infrastructure is very good and projectors are available in each class. Pathology, biochemistry, and microbiology labs are the best. It has a separate building for labs. The hostel food is good. 4-5 canteens are available. A lot of sports are also played.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for studies with good infrastructure.

content.Infrastructure: Food served in the mess is good. The quality of the hostel is good. Our college has good atmosphere and surroundings. It has good infrastructure and facilities. Our college has its hospital, which provides new exposure to students.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are good, helpful, well-qualified, and knowledgeable. Teaching quality is very good. The course curriculum is relevant. It makes students industry ready. Semester exams are averagely difficult, and students gain good knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Himalayan Institute of Medical Sciences.

content.Placements: Around 100% of students are placed and salary packages are offered depending on their abilities. Any hospital can recruit students. Internships are also available for students.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is good with ample space and educational resources. Wi-Fi is available everywhere. Laboratories and classrooms are spacious and maintained well. It also provides a library. The hostel is clean and the food served in the mess is average. Canteens are good. Sports and games are also provided.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are well-qualified and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is good and they have a strong emphasis on quality teaching. Our course curriculum is decided by NMC and it is followed strictly throughout this college. It also makes students ready for future practice. Semester exams are difficult according to the syllabus and the passing percentage is 50%. Other PG courses like nursing, management, engineering, and BPT physiotherapy are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Technology (Radiotherapy) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college is the best in Uttarakhand.

content.Placements: Around 99% of students are placed. Maximum students get placements when they are doing internships. The salary ranges between Rs.40,000 to 50,000 per month. The role offered is radiation therapist.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good and reliable which is full of the best infrastructure and facilities. Facilities are top-notch with the best experience.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very knowledgeable and are out of the mark. Teachers are well qualified in their field especially physics professors. University examinations are somewhere easy. They have more than 25 years of experience.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good for MBBS course but takes a lot of fees and hostel and mess is not good enough.

content.Placements: With an MBBS degree you will get 100 % placement, so don't need to worry if you do MBBS from here. MBBS is a course where you get a degree with which you'll never be unemployed. If you get an MBBS degree from anywhere you can have your private setup or you can work for a private or government hospital.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is not that good. Don't have ample space and don't have a separate washroom. They don't give you single accommodation rooms. There are no geysers, no air conditioners, no separate washrooms, and they don't let you use electric appliances. No Wi-Fi is available at the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms infrastructure is very good and projectors are available in each class. Pathology, biochemistry, and microbiology labs are the best. It has a separate building for labs. The hostel food is good. 4-5 canteens are available. A lot of sports are also played.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for studies with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Food served in the mess is good. The quality of the hostel is good. Our college has good atmosphere and surroundings. It has good infrastructure and facilities. Our college has its hospital, which provides new exposure to students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Himalayan Institute of Medical Sciences.
reviews.review_text: Our college is good with ample space and educational resources. Wi-Fi is available everywhere. Laboratories and classrooms are spacious and maintained well. It also provides a library. The hostel is clean and the food served in the mess is average. Canteens are good. Sports and games are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best in Uttarakhand.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good and reliable which is full of the best infrastructure and facilities. Facilities are top-notch with the best experience.

reviews.review_heading: Good for MBBS course but takes a lot of fees and hostel and mess is not good enough.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is not that good. Don't have ample space and don't have a separate washroom. They don't give you single accommodation rooms. There are no geysers, no air conditioners, no separate washrooms, and they don't let you use electric appliances. No Wi-Fi is available at the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Greatful that I was a part of this place. Absolutely great place to learn.
reviews.review_text: The institute has a great infrastructure. PG hostels are clean well maintained with great food served in the hostel itself. The Department of ophthalmology is well-equipped and has very skilled surgeons. Other than surgeries they teach the most important thing, that's an ethical practice.

reviews.review_heading: Good MBBS college in north India.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really beautiful and the campus is built in a large space. Situated at the foothills of Himalaya, the campus is eco-friendly and is easily accessible to all nearby places. All the basic needed equipment are present within the campus itself. The food available in the mess is of good quality,  24*7 medical aid is available and hostels are having permanent Wi-Fi facility.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good if you want to study, but college life isn't interesting.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in the college are good enough considering the area of the university and the course which we have chosen. Hostels are well-furnished with beds, cupboards, Wi-Fi and a common mess. The mess provides plain, fresh and healthy food at all times of meals.

reviews.review_heading: Best Academic environment, Average extra activities, Good Overall.
reviews.review_text: The overall facilities of the college are average. The campus is provided with Wi-Fi connection, though over an additional payment. The Labs of the college are fully equipped and under the compliance of Medical Council of India. Sports and Games, although given less importance, still form a basic component of the academic year. There are various co-curricular and sports events around the year in the college. The food in various canteens and messes, although not the best, but is very hygienic and...

reviews.review_heading: The faculty and infrastructure are good, but a bit strict, and it is a good place to gain knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The labs, classrooms, and medical facilities are good. Equipment used are well-updated with time, and lab technicians are supportive. The canteen food is good and fresh, and the quality is well-maintained. There are ground for sports like cricket, football, volleyball, and badminton, and various athletic events are frequently organised.

The location of college is peaceful and weather is quite pleasant. Consultant in clinical field give lectures just to complete their job although with few exceptions. The administration is least concerned with co-curricular activities. Don’t expect much in the sports area. College has mess facility but it is above average at most of the time. Attendance in this college is strict. The academics are still better than many other private institution. The location of college is peaceful and weather is quite pleasant. Don’t expect much in the sports area. College has mess facility but it is above average at most of the time. Attendance in this college is strict. The academics are still better than many other private institution.

reviews.review_heading: According to me, the college is really good, but placements are not as satisfying as expected.
reviews.review_text: The classes are well-maintained and good. The library is okay, and the teachers are very supportive, making sure students learn in a good way. I don’t live in the hostel, so I don’t know much about it, but from what I've heard, it's really good, probably the best.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Himalayan Institute of Medical Sciences.
reviews.review_text: The course is good and unique. The hostel facilities are good. Our university has its hostel, and it covers a large area providing facilities of daily needs store, stationary, gym, laundry, and cafe on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are helpful and interested in educating.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is good. We get a stove in each building and TV on each floor. Washroom and common areas cleaned every day. We have common garden area. Mess is good, separate for boys & girls. Everyday menu is pre-decided with all meals.

reviews.review_heading: The college needs to improve the infrastructure and the number of faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good. It provided all sorts of activities and more and more activities were added each year. It provides all daily needs and accessories. Sports ground and courts for BB lawn tennis were available. Hostel rooms were not enough to accomodate increasing seats without compromise.

college_info.intro:
IIT Madras popular programmes are BTech and MBA. For the IIT Madras BTech departments such as EE, CS & CH, the average package recorded was 28.8 LPA, 53.2 LPA, 17.5 LPA. IIT Madras BTech and MBA students are placed in top companies such as Honeywell, Axis Bank, HCL Technologies, ICICI Bank, and others. There are other top courses also available for students such as IIT Madras Data Science course is quite renowned. Under this course, students are taught ML Foundations, Computer Vision, LLMs, Big Data, Deep Learning, Reinforcement Learning, & others. More than 36,000 students have enrolled in Data Science IIT Madras.
IIT Madras has been ranked at the 70th position by the QS Rankings 2026 under the Asian University Ranking category. Overall, it is one of the top colleges offering quality education to students. The below are the IIT Madras courses and their respective IIT Madras fee structure:

review_summary.college_name: IIT Madras Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of facilities and life at IIT Madras.

content.Placements: My batch has 154 students, which makes it the second-largest branch on the campus. The highest package offered is 1.31 crores per annum. The top recruiting companies for our course are Google, Microsoft, etc. A lot of other renowned companies around the world also visit the college. The top roles offered are software development engineer, validation engineer, IC design, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The department building is very spacious with a lot of classrooms and labs. The building is a bit old, so the renovation is being made now. The hostel infrastructure is nice, but there is a bit of a problem with monkeys in one or two of them. The mess food is of nice quality. Food courts are available throughout the day.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good campus, good placement, good faculty, but hostel alone needs improvement.

content.Placements: Placements are good and decent, we will receive top recruits. Core options are more. Package offered is decent with respect to our CGP it lies. Getting an internship is a difficult part but getting placed is easy. Nearly 80% of students get placed in a year. But you should maintain decent grades and skills.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel infrastructure needs to be improved. We will receive free Wi-Fi throughout. Library and many places are provided for students to study. We have wide options for mess and menu. Canteens are available at low cost without compromising the food quality. Labs are awesome.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering + M.Tech. in Applied Mechanics - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Great campus life with good placements and strong academic support.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students got placed. The highest package was 18 LPA, the lowest 5 LPA, average salary was 9 LPA. Top companies like L&T, ISRO, and DRDO. 60% of students got internships in same companies. Roles offered were design engineer, research associate, and tech consultant. It's quite good here.
content.Infrastructure: Department had good labs, classrooms with AC and projector, and Wi-Fi all around. Library was big with many books. Hostel rooms were fine, and shared type. Mess food was okay, sometimes good, sometimes not. Medical help was available 24X7. Many sports ground and gym were also there. It's quite good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The best campus in India, and very good.

content.Placements: Around 80% of people go for higher studies in India and abroad. The highest package offer is 42LPA, and the lowest is around 6 to 7LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Wipro, L&T, and Accenture. 60% of people got internships in many companies.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the department and library include Wi-Fi. Everything is good and well. The hostel is maintained well and nicely, with a mess, food, good infrastructure, AC classrooms, and facilitated labs. Medical facilities and sports facilities are also good.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Economics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall best college for M.A. In Economics Course.

content.Placements: Placements are excellent for our department. Students of finance are assigned to companies related to finance. The typical salary varies between approximately 15-25 LPA. PSUs visit our college for hiring purposes as well. The top packages reach as much as 3 LPA. Approximately 71-76% of students secure placements annually. 59% of learners obtained internships.
content.Infrastructure: The college is located in the northeast, and connectivity to the rest of India is limited. Thus, there were few female students on campus. Hotels were good. Each student is given an individual furnished room. Each hotel has a mess area, restaurant, and TV room. The food is awesome. It will take some time to adjust the menu for other public school students.

The minimum marks may vary depending on the course.

faqs.question: How is IIT Madras JEE Advanced cutoff 2024 different from that of past year?

paragraphs: Indian Institute of Technology Madrasalso known asIITMoffers the programmes through regular and full-time modes. Students are offered over ten programmes spanning multiple specialisations.IIT Madras admission processincludes the application process, selection round, cutoff, merit list and counselling. Students must meet the eligibility and selection criteria prior to applying for the desired course. The process mainly commences online. The step-wise admission process forIIT Madras UG & PG coursesis given below:
IIT Madras Application 2026

Candidates seeking admission must complete the application form for the course-specific entrance exam. For example, for BTech, candidates are required to apply for JEE Main followed by JEE Advanced application.

Similarly, for the MSc, IIT JAM application form is required to be completed. However, for MTech admission, candidates have to register for GATE first. The qualifying candidates have further applied for COAP and then applied on the official website of IIT Madras to proceed to confirm their admission.
Selection Rounds 2026

For BTech courses, students are selected based on JEE Main and JEE Advanced entrance scores. However, for MTech course, students must have GATE entrance exam scores followed by COAP Counselling. The institute considers IIT JAM and CCMN Counselling for MSc courses. Candidates can check with the admission office for the selection rounds of the rest of the courses.
Release of Cutoff list, Counselling & Admission Confirmation

The cutoff for BTech, MTech and MSc courses is released by the respective counselling bodies. For merit-based courses, the institute will release a course-wise merit list on the official website. Shortlisted candidates and then required to pay the admission fee to confirm their seats.

IIT Madras fee structureincludes tuition fees, library fees, laboratory fees, caution deposit, and more. Some of these charged only once during the admission. The rest are to be paid either semester-wise or yearly as per the institute's guidelines. Students can check the table below to know theIIT Madras feesand median package for some of the popular programmes:
Disclaimer:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
IIT Madras fee pdf

faqs.answer: No, IIT Madras BTech admission is only based on candidates' performance in JEE Maine exam, followed by the counselling round. JEE Main is also an eligibility test for JEE Advanced, which is conducted for admission to IITs. Candidates who have qualified for JEE Main are only eligible to appear for JEE Advanced entrance test for admission to IIT Madras BTech courses. faqs.question: How can I get admission in IIT Madras?
faqs.answer: To seek admission to the BTech programme offered at IIT Madras, candidates need to visit the official website of the National Testing Agency (NTA) and fill out the application form in online mode for JEE Main. For other courses such as MSc, MTech, BS-MS (Dual Degree) etc., candidates must visit the official website of the respective national-level entrance exam conducting bodies and fill out the application form in online mode. IIT Madras admission to most of the courses is entrance-based.

faqs.question: Is COAP mandatory for IIT Madras admission?
faqs.answer: Yes, COAP registration is mandatory for IIT Madras admissions done on the basis of GATE exam. The institute accepts GATE + COAP for both M.Tech and MA admissions. Any student choosing to register via GATE score at the institute must register on COAP portal as well.

faqs.question: Is JEE exam mandatory for BSc at IIT Madras?
faqs.answer: No, JEE exams are not mandatory for BSc admissions at IIT Madras. Candidates who wish to take admissions into the BSc course at IIT Madras must appear for IISER entrance examination. The admissions into IIT Madras BSc courses are decided on merit basis where, the scores obtained by candidates in the IISER entrance exam are taken into account to decide the admissions.

placement_data.title: IIT Madras Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: IIT Madras Consolidated Placement Report 2025 is released on the official website. The report published has department-wise salary package details. For BTech departments such as EE, CS and CH , the average package recorded was 28.8 LPA, 53.2 LPA, 18.8 LPA.
For Dual degree departments such as ME, CH and ED, the median package this year was 22.2 LPA, 24.5 LPA and 21.7 LPA.

The overall highest, average and median package recorded during IIT Madras MBA placements 2025 was 35.5 LPA, 17.9 LPA and 18 LPA . In Tech MBA , highest and average package received in 2025 was 81 LPA and 20 LPA .

MTech placement 2025 was also better with average and median package recorded for CS department being 29 LPA and 24.6 LPA. Other than this, the average and median package during MS placement 2025 for CS department was 21.9 LPA and 22.2 LPA.
The median package recorded during the placement drive 2025 for MSc Chemistry and Physics courses was 7.2 LPA and 12 LPA. For MA Humanities course, the average and median package was 17.2 LPA.
Download: IIT_Madras_Placement_Report_2025
Check out more on the Indian Institute of Technology Placement in the below video:

faqs.question: How are the placements at IIT Madras?
faqs.answer: Placements at IIT Madras are good. According to the placement report 2025 released, median and average package recorded during BTech CSE placements was 46 LPA and 53.2 LPA. In BTech EE, the median and average salary offered was 22.5 LPA and 28.8 LPA. In ME, MM and PH branch, the average package stood at 16.9 LPA, 18.4 LPA and 34.1 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the highest package at IIT Madras?
faqs.answer: IIT Madras overall highest package data is not released. The best placement was observed in BTech CS branch with average package of INR 53.2 LPA. During MBA and Tech MBA placements 2025, the highest package offered was 35.5 LPA and 81 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the median package recorded during IIT Madras Chemical Engineering placements?
faqs.answer: The median package recorded during IIT Madras BTech Chemical Engineering placements 2025 was 17.4 LPA. M.Tech CH median package in 2025 was 15 LPA. in Dual Degree, the median package was 24.5 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered to MTech graduates at IIT Madras?
faqs.answer: IIT Madras average package is yet to be released. However, the median package is out for the years 2022 and 2023 for IIT Madras M.Tech course. faqs.answer: It is worth pursuing MBA from IIT Madras. During the MBA placement drive 2025, the highest and median package recorded was 35.5 LPA and 18 LPA. In MBA Tech, highest package offered in 2025 was 81 LPA.

pgp_placements.title: IIT Madras MBA Placements 2025
pgp_placements.intro_text: TheMBA batch of 2023-25comprised93 students.71%of the total students were fromEngineeringbackgroundwhereas 14% students were from Commerce and Management background. The remaining 15% were from Arts, Science and Others stream. The batch included77% maleand23% femalestudents.

faqs.question: Is it worth pursuing MBA at IIT Madras?
faqs.answer: It is worth pursuing MBA from IIT Madras. During the MBA placement drive 2025, the highest and median package recorded was 35.5 LPA and 18 LPA. In MBA Tech, highest package offered in 2025 was 81 LPA.

faqs.question: What are the top packages offered during IIT Madras MBA placements?
faqs.answer: The highest, average and median package recorded during IIT Madras MBA placements 2025 is mentioned below: Particulars MBA Placement Statistics 2025 Highest package INR 35.5 LPA Average package INR 17.9 LPA Median package INR 18 LPA Top 10% average package INR 26.1 LPA Top 25% average package INR 22.7 LPA

faqs.question: Which is the top recruiting sector during IIT Madras MBA placements?
faqs.answer: The domain-wise placement distribution recorded during IIT Madras MBA placements 2025 is mentioned below: Domains MBA Placement Distribution 2025 General Management 36% Marketing & Sales 26% Finance 16% IT / Analytics 15% HR 4% Operations 3%

faqs.question: What is the fees for MBA at IIT Madras?
faqs.answer: IIT Madras MBA fee ranges between INR 1.3 lakh and INR 1.7 lakh . The fee structure may vary for both Day Scholars and Hostellers . The regular day scholars have to particularly pay for Tuition Fees, Establishment Charges and for Extra-curricular activities . Additionally, hosteller candidates have to pay for Hostel Admission Fees and Advanced Dining Charges , also. However, this information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates are advised to contact the admission department of the University for a detailed IIT Madras MBA fees structure.
