description: IIT Madras cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to BTech, MSc, MTech, and other courses. Students can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIT Madras JEE Advanced cutoff 2025, along with other exams for different courses, rounds, categories, etc. Further details regarding the latest exam events are below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view the IIT Madras year-wise cutoff ranks for different categories belonging to the AI quota. Click on the 'Download Now' link to view the JEE Advanced cutoff details for the Indian Institute of Technology Madras.

IIT Madras cutoff 2026 is expected to be released tentatively in the month of June 2026. In the meantime, candidates preparing for JEE Advanced can refer to the table below to view the cutoff ranks for the last year's first and last rounds for admission to B.Tech. and other courses. During the IIT Madras JEE Advanced cutoff 2025 in the last round, the highest cutoff rank reached 7433 under the B.E. / B.Tech course for the General AI category students. With a lowest last round cutoff rank of 171,

IIT Madras B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 171 and 7433, wherein the most sought-after specialisation for admission was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering with the lowest JEE Advanced cutoff rank. On the contrary, the easy-to-grab specialisation was B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Analytics, followed by B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering, with lenient JEE Advanced cutoff ranks of 306 and 849, respectively, in the General AI category.

JEE Advanced is the accepted exam for admission to the Engineering course, followed by the JoSAA counselling process for all the IITs, including IIT Madras. Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view all the important JEE Advanced 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

IIT Madras JEE Advanced cutoff 2025 was announced for different specialisations and categories. In this section, candidates can do a comparative analysis of different colleges, and specialisations offered as per the JoSAA last-round closing ranks.Students can use the provided filters to refine their search based on parameters, like location, gender, categories, etc.

IIT Madras CAT cutoff 2025 is yet to be released for admission to the MBA course. The Indian Institute of Technology Madras provides a 2-year MBA programme in full-time mode. The course is offered by the institute's Department of Management Studies (DoMS). The final CAT cutoff is only accessible via account login for candidates who appeared in the CAT exam, as the institute does not release the cutoff list publicly.

IIT Madras accepts CAT scores for admission to the Management courses. Eligible candidates are then called for the next admission process called WAT and PI. Aspirants preparing for IIT Madras MBA admission can check out the important CAT 2025 dates in the table below.

highlights.description:
IIT Madras has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national and international ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #1 in the Overall category, #1 under Engineering, #13 under Management, #2 under Research Institutions, and #1 under Innovation by the NIRF 2025. Internationally, IIT Madras is ranked #227 by the QS World 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around IIT Madras rankings:

nirf.description:
IIT Madras has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, IIT Madras's rank is #1, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'Engineering', the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, IIT Madras's rank is #1, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Management' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, IIT Madras climbed 3 ranks to #13 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is noticeable that in the 'Research Institutions' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, IIT Madras's rank is #2, the same as last year's rank in the 'Research Institutions' category by the NIRF ranking.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.
Read less

qs_world.description:
IIT Madras has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Top Global Universities' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Top Global Universities' category, the institute's ranks have ascended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, IIT Madras climbed 47 ranks to #180 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Asia', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, IIT Madras fell 14 ranks to #70 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, IIT Madras fell 1 rank to #4 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.
Read less

hostel_campus.college_name: IIT Madras Campus Infrastructure

hostel.description: All hostels are named after the prominent rivers of India.Rooms are furnished with internet and laundry facility in the campus.Each hostel has separate room for television called common room. Telephone and washing machine is provided in every hostel. Hostel library is provided in every hostel. The students are not allowed to drive powered vehicles in the campus. They can use bicycles only or walk. Separate dining facility is provided in hostel It has two large dining facilities namely Himalaya and .

library.description: The Central Library, a five-storey, air-conditioned building, divided into different sections - text book/reference, general stacks, reading halls, journals and current periodicals, media research centre. It is well equipped with modern facilities and resources in the form of online databases, e-journals, and provide electronic access to various full text & bibliographical databases & e-journals. The library has incorporated books in the areas of science, technology, engineering, humanities, social sciences, management, generalia, comprises mainly of books, theses, pamphlets , reports, current journals, back volumes, specifications, standards, patents, audio-video cassette, microfiche, microfilms CD-ROM databases.It has seating capacity of 200 people at a time. Also facilitates photocopying service.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Squash Court, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Volley Ball Court, Athletic Stadium

reviews.review_heading: Review of facilities and life at IIT Madras.
reviews.review_text: The department building is very spacious with a lot of classrooms and labs. The building is a bit old, so the renovation is being made now. The hostel infrastructure is nice, but there is a bit of a problem with monkeys in one or two of them. The mess food is of nice quality. Food courts are available throughout the day.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus, good placement, good faculty, but hostel alone needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: Hostel infrastructure needs to be improved. We will receive free Wi-Fi throughout. Library and many places are provided for students to study. We have wide options for mess and menu. Canteens are available at low cost without compromising the food quality. Labs are awesome.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus life with good placements and strong academic support.
reviews.review_text: Department had good labs, classrooms with AC and projector, and Wi-Fi all around. Library was big with many books. Hostel rooms were fine, and shared type. Mess food was okay, sometimes good, sometimes not. Medical help was available 24X7. Many sports ground and gym were also there. It's quite good.

reviews.review_heading: The best campus in India, and very good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the department and library include Wi-Fi. Everything is good and well. The hostel is maintained well and nicely, with a mess, food, good infrastructure, AC classrooms, and facilitated labs. Medical facilities and sports facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best college for M.A. In Economics Course.
reviews.review_text: The college is located in the northeast, and connectivity to the rest of India is limited. Thus, there were few female students on campus. Hotels were good. Each student is given an individual furnished room. Each hotel has a mess area, restaurant, and TV room. The food is awesome. It will take some time to adjust the menu for other public school students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely beautiful campus with wildlife.
reviews.review_text: Courses in my branch are difficult; others are pretty okay. Infrastructure depends on the branch you are in. Aerospace has a very mediocre infrastructure. Coming to the hostel, it is okay. I can't describe it as good exactly. Food is edible, extra in the mess would be good, food courts have good food. Medical facilities are good, and they have good sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Life at IITM is like your dream college life.
reviews.review_text: Institute Wi-Fi is present in all public places. Labs and classrooms are very well maintained and mostly air-conditioned. Library is open from 8:00 AM to 11:30 PM, and it is air-conditioned too. Hostel facilities are moderate, and we come to the hostel mostly for sleeping. We stay in the library most of the time. The quality of food available is also moderate. The institute hospital is very good, like a multi-specialty hospital. All types of sports are played here like cricket, football, badmint...

reviews.review_heading: A must experience campus life.
reviews.review_text: All the infrastructure in our department is top-notch, with table Wi-Fi connections, AC classrooms, and lab facilities for various subjects. All the students will be provided with hostels at the time of admission. There are single, double, triple, and quadruple sharing rooms. In each room, a cot, a cupboard, a study table with a chair, a socket, and LAN facilities will be provided. Hostels also have a basketball court, lawns, and various games, including board games. Mess can be selected by the ...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure of hostel is too good and neat and clean. There will be a single room also available in the hostel. Classroom is near and good. 
Labs with all facilities. Library has been quiet and peaceful. Canteen facilities are super on campus and worth money.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, but you need to read and enjoy as well.
reviews.review_text: IIT Madras has good classrooms, fast Wi-Fi, nice labs, and a big library. Hostels are clean with 24-hour water, power, and internet. Mess food is clean and okay, with different food choices. Canteens have many tasty options. There is a free campus hospital and ambulance. Sports grounds, gym, and games are also available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Best college with best placement rates.
reviews.review_text: Best infrastructure I have ever seen in my whole life. Every type of facility is available to students. IITM will give you everything, you just have to study and enjoy on campus. First time you enter the campus, you will find yourself in jungle.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, best college for MS in electrical engineering course.
reviews.review_text: In our college, classrooms were very primitive but labs had all the latest equipment for students from IIT to do their research. The quality of mess food varies greatly depending on where you come from. North Indians find it difficult to change their diet. Hostel furniture was quite outdated. Washing machines were exceptional, and western toilets were never expected.

reviews.review_heading: Life at IITM was lit from 2022 - 2026.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in every hostel. Labs are up to date in equipments and technology. Classrooms are okay, some are without ACs so it gets hot. Mess food is okay in quality. Sports facilities are abundant, and you can play your favourite sport. There is a hospital on campus which is sufficient for mild diseases.

reviews.review_heading: Read this before enrolling in IIT Madras BS degree in data science and application.
reviews.review_text: IIT Madras BS degree in data science and application is an online program that you can study from any location (also from abroad). All course is published prerecorded on the website of IIT Madras. There is a live doubt-solving lecture on Google Meet or Zoom. It is an online program so there is no need to go, it has campus in Madras but the exams are conducted offline. There are various centers for the exam also in other countries. Its fees are affiliated, also there is a scholarship upto 75%. Th...

reviews.review_heading: Very beautiful and calm, has very good faculty, and has all you need,
reviews.review_text: Facilities are top-notch. The hostels could be improved but value for money, the facilities of all the grounds are good and well maintained, has a lot apart from academics, the library is big and has a lot of things, Wi-Fi has some problems now and then but in general it is good enough, quality of food depends on the mess we choose.

college_info.college_name: IIT Madras

data.description: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) has a wide array of faculty. Moreover, over 550 teaching staff and 1,250 administrative and support staff are across all academic departments. The teaching staff hold PhD degrees in their respective fields. The best-in-class faculty members are all alumni from reputed national and international universities and hold an immense amount of experience in their respective sectors. These faculty members include professors, assistant professors, and associate professors, among others.

likes.text: Top recruiting companies were Google, Uber, Microsoft, KLA Tencor, GS, JPMC, MTX, etc.
Many students get internships to get ready for a job, and we have a lot of helpful courses going on via college to get placement-ready.

The course curriculum is vivid and allows a student to pursue any field that he/she finds interesting.

college_info.intro:
The flagship courses offered at GITAM Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Visakhapatnam are MBBS, BSc, and MD among others. GIMSR offers around 05 courses at the undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral levels. It offers programmes in the stream of Medical and Science. MBBS (Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery) and MD (Doctor of Medicine) are the popular programme offered to the students. Below-mentioned are GITAM Institute of Medical Sciences and Research popular programmes:

The college also accepts entrance exams like GAT, NEET-PG, GITAM GAT, etc. The cutoff was released for different categories of students belonging to the AI quota.

faqs.answer: A:    The fee payment can be done through a demand draft drawn in the name of GITAM Institute of Medical Sciences and Research payable at Visakhapatnam. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Anaesthesia Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is very good for learning.

review_content.Placements: In our college, almost 60% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 5.6 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2.4 LPA. The GIMSR hospital is the most popular recruiting platform. A total of 100% of students get internships from our course at GIMSR Hospital. Top roles offered are anasthesian, anesthesia technician, duty doctor, drug advisor, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is high-speed Wi-Fi. We have clean and sterile labs, a pleasant and stable classroom atmosphere, a healthy breakfast in the morning, a healthy diet during lunch, energy-giving snacks, and a light diet at dinner. There is a clean mess where we eat and we have dining facilities for the outsiders.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best private medical college.

review_content.Placements: In MBBS after passing out, most of the students were concerned with pursuing post-graduate degrees, and the college was being the first batch, students were not offered any campus placements. From this year, they were planning to take the post-graduate courses so it was a very good option to choose. If students can afford it, then they can surely opt for this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: It provides the best infrastructure, laboratories facilities, and library. Along with the studies, co-curricular activities were also encouraged. In the initial days of our hostel life, students had taste-related issues with the mess food but later it was sorted. Hostels were just like hotel rooms, with very good maintenance.

individual_reviews.title: It is a very excellent campus if we utilise the studies.

content.Placements: Almost 100% of students get placed. The highest package is 5 LPA. The hospital is very good and it provides the best medical services. The doctor plays a main role and they also teach the subject. We can also learn to work in the free time of our college in our departments. For some courses, there are internships. For some courses, there are no internships.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, the library, and labs are very good. But we need more classrooms. In the library, books are good. The food is very good on campus. There is a playground with more sports like cricket, volleyball, football, and table tennis. There are some tournaments also. There is a nice infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with hotels and food. Faculty members are okay types.

content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility is good because they charge a lot of money for that. Food is hygienic as well they also provide various facilities like gym, indoor games, basketball, cricket, and football. There are also vending machines which make it a bit easy to buy food as it saves time from going outside.
content.Faculty: I would say they pressure students a lot here now and then they conduct PCT and FAs. Seminars are frustrating and tired some as well. Teachers are always in a hurry to complete the syllabus, we just blink and boom they completed 4 chapters.

admission_overview.college_name: GITAM Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Course Admissions 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

paragraphs: GIMSR has MBBS, MD/MS and BSc Paramedical Courses with many specialisations.The college was recognized and is currently called the National Medical Commission (NMC).Admission in the MBBS program is done on the basis of NEET-UG and MD/MS using the NEET-PG score.BSc Paramedical Courses are admissions which are based on the GAT (Paramedical UG) scores.To be admitted to a course in GIMSR, the candidates need to app
The below-mentioned table carries the GIMSR courses fee, minimum eligibility requirement and selection details:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with 50% aggregate in PCB with English.
NEET UG+MCC Counselling
Class 12 with 60% aggregate
GAT(Paramedical UG)

NEET-PG+ MCCNEET PG Counselling
MBBS degree/provisional pass certificate

GIMSR admissions are entrance-based. Applicants must be eligible at every stage of the selection. The process for admissions 2025 at GIMSR is presented below:
Step 1: Application Process

Those who are interested in getting admission in GIMSR to study in the academic year 2025 have to start with the application process. The application form would be available on the official site of GITAM (Deemed to be University) and it can be downloaded. After filling it properly, the candidates are to submit the form via post or in person at the respective department at GIMSR. It is essential to mention, though that the entrance test fees and application should be paid online. The online bank challan has to be attached to the application form with two copies of the pay slip attached.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

The process of admission to different programmes at GIMSR is conducted on the basis of both merit and entry-based selections. In MBBS, MD/MS and BSc Paramedical, the candidates have to pass the corresponding entrance exams of the country level. Precisely, NEET-UG is a compulsory test in MBBS admission, and NEET-PG scores determine the admissions in MD/MS. In the case of the BSc Paramedical courses, one must depend on the success of the GAT (Paramedical UG) examination to be selected.
Step 3: Release of Merit List and Counselling.

After all the selection rounds, candidates who have successfully qualified will have to take part in the counselling process, which is specific to their courses. Thereafter, GIMSR will release the merit list with the names of the successful candidates in different rounds. The lucky people who see their names in the list of merits will then have to acquire their seats by paying the required fee within a certain period.

For MD and MS course, the entrance exams accepted include NEET PG. Moreover, for the BSc programme, candidates need to clear the GAT exam. faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in GITAM Institute of Medical Sciences and Research, Visakhapatnam?
faqs.answer: The admissions to GITAM Institute of Medical Sciences and Research, Visakhapatnam is entrance based. The mode of application is online. Moreover, for GITAM Institute of Medical Sciences and Research, Visakhapatnam admissions to the MBBS programme are based on the NEET-UG and MD/MS course admissions on the basis of the NEET-PG score. Admissions to the BSc Paramedical Courses are based on GAT (Paramedical UG) scores. Additional, the total annual seat intake is around 150 for the MBBS programme, around 127 are reserved under management and 23 are under the NRI seat quota.

Mentioned below is the refund policy followed by the institute: Time of withdrawal Amount The amount of fees to be deducted by GIMSR on the reallocation of seats to the candidates by MCC INR 50,000 The amount of fees to be reimbursed in case a candidate resigns after the counselling period No refund of fee

description: GITAM Institute of Medical Sciences and Research cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

GITAM Institute of Medical Sciences and Research NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 475650 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.
GITAM Institute of Medical Sciences and Research MBBS cutoff 2025 was 475650 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

GITAM Institute of Medical Sciences and Research accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

GITAM Institute of Medical Sciences and Research NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD and MS. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 86128 to 152810. According to this range, the most and least competitive courses are MS and MD, respectively. For more details, see the table below.

According to the GITAM Institute of Medical Sciences and Research MS cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MS in Orthopaedics, followed by MS in Ophthalmology. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 86128 and 118146, respectively.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

sports.description: GITAM campuses are equipped with modern stadiums, courts, and well-maintained equipment for maintaining a healthy environment on campus. GIMSR has its sports clubs where candidates can enroll themselves to get fun and secure environment through various sports activities, students can develop important skills and a strong sense of community. The club is setting up high standards among peers to be recognised as a leading initiative within medical colleges. Outdoor Sports:

reviews.review_heading: It is a very excellent campus if we utilise the studies.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, the library, and labs are very good. But we need more classrooms. In the library, books are good. The food is very good on campus. There is a playground with more sports like cricket, volleyball, football, and table tennis. There are some tournaments also. There is a nice infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with hotels and food. Faculty members are okay types.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility is good because they charge a lot of money for that. Food is hygienic as well they also provide various facilities like gym, indoor games, basketball, cricket, and football. There are also vending machines which make it a bit easy to buy food as it saves time from going outside.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good for learning.
reviews.review_text: There is high-speed Wi-Fi. We have clean and sterile labs, a pleasant and stable classroom atmosphere, a healthy breakfast in the morning, a healthy diet during lunch, energy-giving snacks, and a light diet at dinner. There is a clean mess where we eat and we have dining facilities for the outsiders.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best private medical college.
reviews.review_text: It provides the best infrastructure, laboratories facilities, and library. Along with the studies, co-curricular activities were also encouraged. In the initial days of our hostel life, students had taste-related issues with the mess food but later it was sorted. Hostels were just like hotel rooms, with very good maintenance.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: We have the best infrastructure and facilities that any college could ever have. Classrooms are also good. We have the best hostels, and they are well maintained and are hygienic. The food served is also good. We play sports as there is huge ground on campus. Medical facilities are also good. We have canteens all over the university. Wi-Fi is accessible in our hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Pretty decent college and course.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good overall. A. c with twin sharing bedroom and attached bathroom. No single rooms available though. Other eminites are also pretty decent. Mess food is good. The college infrastructure is decent overall, but it? S not perfect. The lecture halls are spacious enough and have projectors, but sometimes the equipment does? T work properly, which can be a bit annoying during lectures. The library is well-stocked with books and journals.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is really good, and hostel food is also satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is too good. Trust me with that, the hostels are pretty well spacious and cleaned properly every single day. Students are provided with lecture galleries with centralized air conditioners and quite large halls for regular classes. We are also provided with air conditioners libraries and 24/7 reading rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied good.
reviews.review_text:
u2022 the facilities and infrastructure available for your course and department like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and libraries 
u2022 the quality of the facilities in our hostel is good and the Quality of the food is good and food is available in the mess and canteen .

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college and I am satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available throughout the campus as well as the hostel. Our labs were good and we could also go to the library. In our hostel, a gym was available. The library was available. The food served was delicious. We played many sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college to study medicine beside the sea.
reviews.review_text: Our college has two buildings in which one is college, and the other is a hospital. It has a garden and a playground where all sports events are held. It has a canteen and two food courts. There are other two buildings which are a hostel for boys and girls. Hostels and lecture halls have centralised air-conditioners. There is a library in our college building.

college_info.college_name: GITAM Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Scholarship Details

paragraphs: GITAM Institute of Medical Sciences and Research is offering several courses for the latest admission session. A wide range of courses from the domains of Anaesthesiology, Community Medicine, Dermatology, Venerology and Leprosy, General Medicine, Psychiatry, Paediatrics, Pathology,  and Radio Diagnosis, among others are available to applicants. The different courses offered at GITAM Institute of Medical Sciences and Research have varying course fees. Candidates can pay the GITAM Institute of Medical Sciences and Research fee for the course they have chosen given that they are accepted through the GITAM Institute of Medical Sciences and Research admission process. The course fee ranges from INR 4.38 Lacs - INR 1.62 lakh.

GIMSR scholarships are granted based on marks scored in the GAT (GITAM Admission Test) or equivalent qualifying exam. Meritorious and eligible candidates can avail a scholarship up to 100% for first-year and will be continued for the subsequent years, subject to scoring 8.0 & above CGPA every year. Tabulated below is percentage of scholarship and respective GAT score needed to avail it:
Scholarship Percentage
GAT Score

The fee payment can be done through a demand draft drawn in the name of GITAM Institute of Medical Sciences and Research payable at Visakhapatnam. In addition, a fee can also be made by transfer (RTGS/NEFT) to the institute's account and proof of remittance must be produced at the time of reporting for admission. For fee payment, the account details are provided below:
tables: GITAM Institute of Medical Sciences and Research College Receipts A/c
Union Bank of India, GIMSR Branch

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Life of MBBS student at Akash Group of Institutions.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement in the MBBS course. There is a one-year compulsory internship for all students. A stipend of Rs. 10,000 is given per month to all students. Students are rotated in all departments and students learn all the skills necessary in this one-year internship course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel fee is 1.5 lakh per year. The canteen fee is included. For non-veg food, we have to pay an extra fee. Wi-Fi is not available but classrooms are set up with AC. Few lecture halls are good. The canteen food is good. Sports are not available. Only during fests, there are sports competitions.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: MBBS life at Akash Institute.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in the MBBS course. We have a one-year compulsory internship. They also provide a stipend, which is around 10,000 per month in our college. All students have to do a compulsory internship for one year. We are posted in all branches during this period.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, with all the lecture halls and practical demo rooms well-equipped. The library has a wide variety of books and is spacious with a peaceful environment. A cafeteria is present in the college, and the canteen is present in the hospital. A sports ground is available, and a swimming pool is also present.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Data Science (Advanced) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely good infrastructure, college, and faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements are good. They are good. They provide internships in 2nd or 3rd year with a good stipend. Packages are also good. Companies like Amazon, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Flipkart, and many others come for placements. They provide good packages.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good. There is a huge building and very good. It is beautiful and eco-friendly. It has a green nature. The college hostel is there. It is also good. The food is okay but not that much good. The college owns a hospital so we can have free checkups.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: MBBS at Akash Institute.

content.Placements: There are compulsory internships for all students in our hospital. There are no placements. Students usually prepare for PG after internships. Rs. 10,000 stipend is given every month. Students will learn all skills needed in this one year. Students can also work after MBBS in hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good, clean, and hygienic. The food is tasty. The hostel fee also includes the mess fee. Wi-Fi is not available. The library is peaceful. Labs are well-built. The canteen has both veg and non-veg food. A sports ground is also present. A swimming pool is available.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Akash Group of Institutions.

content.Placements: They merged with RS College, and now it has become Akash Global College of Management and Science. There is no placement because it is a recently opened college so after the 5th semester we will know about the placement. So I'll give feedback after 2 years. And in my opinion, it is better to go to another college.

Department-wise, I am not sure, so I am only talking about MBA faculty. Hostel quality is not good because bed bugs are there and food quality is also not good so better choose a government hostel.

admission_process.title: Akash Group of Institutions Admission Process

paragraphs: Akash Group of Institutions admission is merit based for programmes offered at UG and PG levels. In total, the institution offers 77 courses to the students across various streams, such as IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Science, Accounting & Commerce, and Medicine & Health Sciences, among others. Amid all these courses, some of the popularAkash Group of Institutions coursesoffered at the UG level include B.E. / B.Tech, BBA, and B.Sc. and at the PG level, the institution provides, MCA, M.Com, and MPT, etc. Students interested in Akash Group of Institutions admission 2024 must check the fees and other details below:
lists: Akash Group of Institutions Fees: The overall tuition fees charged for UG courses range between INR 200,000 - INR 635,382 and the total tuition fees for PG courses range between INR 570,960 - INR 2,142,090. In addition to the tuition fees, students might also be required to pay application, exam and other fee components. Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.
Akash Group of Institutions Course Duration: The duration for UG courses provided by Akash Group of Institutions ranges between 3 - 4 years and the same for PG courses falls between 2 - 3 years.

faqs.question: What's the seat availability for courses at the Akash Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: Combined intake across all courses at Akash Group of Institutions is up to 997. Akash Group of Institutions offers BCA, BBA, MCA, B.Sc, M.Com, B.Com, BPT, UG Diploma, B.A, MBBS, MPT, B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MD, MS courses for students to build their careers in IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Science, Accounting & Commerce, Nursing, Medicine & Health Sciences, Mass Communication & Media, Engineering. These highly regarded programs are available in full-time mode, catering to the needs of students who wish to obtain a comprehensive education in this field.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for the MBA course at Akash Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for the MBA course at Akash Group of Institutions is that the candidate should have passed graduation with a minimum of 50% aggregate. The entrance exams accepted include MAT, CAT, XAT, CMAt, ATMA, etc.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to Akash Group of Institutions for MBA?
faqs.answer: Applicants for MBA programs at Akash Group of Institutions must have a Bachelors degree with at least 50% aggregate marks from a recognised institution. Candidates are also often required to have legitimate results from entry tests such as the CAT, MAT, CMAT, GMAT or the Karnataka state PGCET. Those who meet these qualifications may apply directly through the Akash Institutions website or by visiting the admissions office. The selection procedure examines entrance exam scores, academic performance and occasionally includes interviews to judge the applicant's appropriateness for the program.

description: Akash Group of Institutions cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to BE/BTech programmes via the COMEDK UGCET examination. Students can view the exam-wise sections below to know the cutoffs for various accepted examinations across different rounds, categories and quotas. Refer to the pointers below for more exam-related updates:

Akash Group of Institutions Karnataka PGCET Round 2 Seat Allotment ranks are out for admission to MBA/ MCA courses. As per Round 2, MCA cutoff 2023 stood at 13919 for the General AI category, whereas for Round 1, the cutoff was 14239. Tabulated below are the year-wise closing ranks for Akash Group of Institutions Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2023 along with previous years' cutoffs.
According to the Akash Group of Institutions B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.E. in Mechanical Engineering stood at 68496 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

For the HS quota, the cutoff rank for the same specialisation was 100736. Comparing both the quotas, the last round cutoff rank for General AI category students was more competitive for admission than the HS quota students.

In this section, Akash Group of Institutions Karnataka NEET UG cutoff 2025 is available, alongside the last round cutoff of 2024 and 2023 for the general category students. As per this year’s cutoff, the General Home State quota stands at a cutoff rank of 69577 for MBBS.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good infrastructure, college, and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. There is a huge building and very good. It is beautiful and eco-friendly. It has a green nature. The college hostel is there. It is also good. The food is okay but not that much good. The college owns a hospital so we can have free checkups.

reviews.review_heading: MBBS at Akash Institute.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good, clean, and hygienic. The food is tasty. The hostel fee also includes the mess fee. Wi-Fi is not available. The library is peaceful. Labs are well-built. The canteen has both veg and non-veg food. A sports ground is also present. A swimming pool is available.

reviews.review_heading: Life of MBBS student at Akash Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The hostel fee is 1.5 lakh per year. The canteen fee is included. For non-veg food, we have to pay an extra fee. Wi-Fi is not available but classrooms are set up with AC. Few lecture halls are good. The canteen food is good. Sports are not available. Only during fests, there are sports competitions.

reviews.review_heading: MBBS life at Akash Institute.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, with all the lecture halls and practical demo rooms well-equipped. The library has a wide variety of books and is spacious with a peaceful environment. A cafeteria is present in the college, and the canteen is present in the hospital. A sports ground is available, and a swimming pool is also present.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Akash Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: Because there are not enough faculty members available, we will not be able to finish the syllabus on time. Department-wise, I am not sure, so I am only talking about MBA faculty. Hostel quality is not good because bed bugs are there and food quality is also not good so better choose a government hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for academics but campus life is not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good. Hostel facilities are decent. Our campus is not spacious. There is a playground on our campus. This college is still under construction. Management courses like MBA, BBA, and BCA have separate buildings.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty and teaching and modern infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have very modern infrastructure and all facilities needed like libraries, classrooms and access to the hospital. We have a very good hostel facility, and the food quality is really nice, the hygiene maintained in the mess is also more than satisfactory. Being attached to a hospital, we have access to medical facilities 24/7, we have an hour of sports and games every day.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Akash Institute of Nursing Devanahalli.
reviews.review_text: The college is situated in Devanahalli which is very near Kempegowda International Airport. The college building is super with nice classrooms and labs. Wi-Fi is not available on campus. The hostel is inside the same compound. The hostel is good looking and facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good infrastructure, and the facilities are also excellent.
reviews.review_text: This college provides laboratories and classrooms. The library was clean and there was total silence. There were many books to read in the library, the laboratories were good, and students can try every experiment. The books which were given by Aakash were the best, and students can learn everything from them. The canteen was provided, and the food was very delicious.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a very good infrastructure and very good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a very good infrastructure, along with neat labs and classrooms. There are neat hostel facilities with good Wi-Fi facility. Good quality food is served in the hostel, and the canteen is good with good food. Our college provides good sports with neat equipment and also good medical facilities with students-friendly staff members.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Akash Institute of Medical Sciences & Research Centre.
reviews.review_text: Lecture halls are quite good of 170 capacity. There are 4 lecture halls in the college and 1 in the hospital. Two of the lecture halls are air-conditioned. The building is not that great but well-equipped with labs, research labs, and demonstration rooms. The opportunities for sports is minimal. The canteen is fine. Medical facilities in some departments are good, but some needs improvement.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good infrastructure and education-wise facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure. The college provides facilities like large building, spacious auditoriums, demo rooms, well-equipped labs, libraries, study places, common rooms and canteens. The college provides good hostel facility with good food and other facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good facilities and teaching staff members.
reviews.review_text: Our college got its own central library which is very informative and helpful. There is a Wi-Fi facility in the hostel but not in college. Labs are spacious and clean with good equipment. Hostel food is good, and they serve South Indian meals. The college has its canteen where you can get Chinese food. Medical facilities are excellent and effective. There is a huge ground for sports, and a basketball court and badminton court are available here.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with our college infrastructure and teaching.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms and computer available here assist in learning. Classrooms are air-conditioned and are huge and can accommodate more than 200 students. They are also equipped with projectors. The library has books for subjects and also has a computer room for learning. There are good washrooms on all floors.

reviews.review_heading: Life at aimsrc medicos life.
reviews.review_text: We have gym in hostel. Library is very near to college with different kinds of books. We have very good playground with all kind of sport courts. Hostel is 3 sharing and 2 sharing with clean rooms and washrooms and hot water for batch. Mess food is very hygienic and tasty with evening snacks provided.

faqs.question: Does Jadavpur University provide 100% placements?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Jadavpur University offers international placements to its students. During the placement drive 2024, the highest international package offered was INR 140 LPA.
faqs.question: Does Jadavpur University offer international placements?

faqs.answer: A:    Jadavpur University Kolkata tuition fee costs around INR 1,200 - INR 5.1 L. The fee is exclusive of other components including application fee, examination fee, security deposit, etc. The fee is taken from the official website. It is subject to change. Aspirants can check the official website before applying.
faqs.question: How costly is Jadavpur University?

faqs.answer: A:    The candidates wanting to enrol in a BTech course of Jadavpur University must meet the prescribed eligibility and selection requirements. Aspirants who have passed Class 12 with at least 60% aggregate from a recognised board with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics as compulsory subjects (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC/ PwD) can apply for admission. Additionally, the applicants age must be at least 17 years. Further, the aspirants need to take the WBJEE exam. Jadavpur University shortlist candidates for admission based on exam scores. Following this, counselling is conducted for the seat allotment procedure.
faqs.question: Can I do B.Tech in Jadavpur University?

faqs.answer: A:    Jadavpur University MSc tuition fee range between INR 48,000 and INR 1.57 Lacs for two years. The total course fee will include other components as well. This fee range include tuition fee for the day and evening MSc programmes. The fee mentioned here is the total tuition fee and is taken from an unofficial source. Hence, the actual amount may vary. For detailed fee structure, candidates are advised to contact the admission department of the University.
faqs.question: How much is the fee for the Jadavpur University MSc course?

faqs.answer: A:    A stipend to basically GATE candidates is given by the central government. Candidates getting admission at Jadavpur University can also receive stipend from the government of West Bengal and the university fund. As per an unofficial source, the monthly stipend that the candidates may get can be around INR 12,400. The information given here is as per multiple sources and hence, is indicative.

faqs.answer: The Jadavpur University WBJEE Cutoff 2025 was published for admission to the BE/BTech courses. According to the Jadavpur University BE cutoff 2025, the cutoff for the General category students belonging to the All India quota ranged from 67 to 5435 according to the first and last round closing ranks. The most difficult BE specialisation was BE in Computer Science and Engineering, with the last round cutoff being 78. On the other hand, the easiest course specialisation for admission for this category was BTech in Architectural Engineering, with the last round cutoff of 5435. Please note that the cutoff will be different for each category in different rounds and quotas.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Excellent academic and corporate grooming.

content.Placements: At JD Birla Institute, everyone is eligible for a placement, but most of the students pursue an MBA, or they join family businesses, bringing the percentage down around 15-60 percent. The highest package is 9 LPA and the average is 5 LPA-6 LPA. The top recruiting companies include EY, Deloitte, HSBC Bank, and Amazon. In my batch, 100 percent of students got internships at top companies, such as TCS and Exide Industries. Top roles offered are business analyst, financial manager, account manager, HR, marketing, and sales executive.
content.Infrastructure: It is well regarded for maintaining a corporate-like environment, which is suitable for management studies. Classrooms are air-conditioned with smart boards. A fully automated library with quite a variety of books. Fully equipped computer lab with the latest software and Wi-Fi on campus. There are no official hostels, most students stay in nearby paying guests. The college has a very hygienic canteen. The college has an in-house infirmary. Sports facilities include a badminton court and a recreational area, including table tennis, football, and carrom board. While the college is very compact in terms of area.

admission_overview.title: Jadavpur University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Jadavpur University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The university considers scores in WBJEE, CAT, MAT, etc. for admission to specific courses. Jadavpur University offers programmes at UG, PG and doctoral levels in various streams such as Arts, Science, Engineering, Commerce, etc. The university offers admission to programmes such as B.Ed, BA, BBA, etc. based on the qualifying exam scores of the candidates.BTech is one of the top courses of Jadavpur University, admission to which is based on WBJEE scores of the aspirants. Interested candidates can fill out the application form online for the preferred course.

eligibility_selection.title: Jadavpur University Eligibility & Selection 2025

For PG courses, the admission process will begin in the month of April and May. Jadavpur PhD admission is done twice a year one in May and June and another in December and January. faqs.answer: No, a student scoring less that 60% in their bachelor's degree is not eligible to apply for MCA admission at Jadavpur University if they belong to the general/unreserved category. For candidates belonging to the general category, the minimum marks required in the UG degree is 60%. However, for the candidates belonging to the reserved categories (SC/ST) the minimum aggregate required in graduation is 45%. The selection is based on the scores of WEBJEE JECA. In case a candidate fails to get admission at Jadavpur University, they can check out other colleges offering MCA. They can check out the colleges offering Online MCA courses.

faqs.answer: Jadavpur University WBJEE cutoff 2024 was concluded for admission to BE/BTech/BPharm courses. The cutoff was released for different categories belonging to All India and Home State quota candidates. Among the General AI category candidates, the last round closing ranks varied between 57 and 2917. Therefore, it is possible to get admission to the college at 500 rank at a few specialisations. A few specialisations where the General AI category candidates can get admission were B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.E. in Information Technology (Day).
faqs.question: Can I get Jadavpur University with 500 rank in WBJEE?

paragraphs: The university offers admission both on an entrance and merit basis. Candidates have to get through all the selection rounds of the respective course to get a seat. The admission process involves application form filling, an entrance exam followed by counselling or interview (for some courses), cutoff release, and seat allotment.
1.Theapplication processis carried out in online mode. Application forms are available online on the official website of the university.

2.For some courses, admission is granted based on the last qualifying examination. Some of the entrance exams accepted by the university are WBJEE/ CAT/ MAT/ XAT/ JEMAT/ ATMA/ GATE, etc. After the application process, the university announces course-wise cutoff marks or may release a rank list.

3.Candidates seeking admission to the Jadavpur University BTech course are admitted based on merit in WBJEE. Selected candidates also have to go through a round of counselling. The rounds of counselling are conducted until all the seats are allocated. SeeJadavpur University cutoff.
4. Fee Payment & Admission Confirmation

Candidates who make it to the final selection list OR selected after counselling can pay theJadavpur University feeto confirm their seat. The directions or the steps to be followed are also intimated to the students by the university officials.

There are multiple components included in the totalJadavpur University fee, such as the hostel fee, meal plan, security deposit, etc. Some of the components are charged annually and some semesterly. Moreover, the university has the right to revise the fee structure. Below is theJadavpur University feeand average package for some of the programmes:
NOTE:The above-mentioned fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes.

The university reserves10% of seatsunder the domicile category for the candidates belonging to West Bengal. Thus, there are 90% of seats for the general category. The seat reservation for students belonging to the SC/ ST/ OBC-A/ OBC-B category is as per the norms of the government of West Bengal. faqs.answer: Jadavpur University is a state-aided autonomous university. It receives funding from the State Government, UGC and the World's Bank TEQIP division. So, the fee is quite low. The fee for UG courses start from INR 20,800. For PG courses, the start from INR 1,200. The fee is high for technical and Management courses such as BTech, MBA, MTech, etc.

courses_data.description: The university offers a three or four-year BSc/ BSc (Hons) course in a full-time mode. The course is divided into a semester pattern. faqs.question: What is the fee for the BSc courses at Jadavpur University?
faqs.answer: The total fees for Jadavpur University BSc fees in 2025 ranges between INR 4.1 lakh- INR 4.3 lakh. This fee amount is the total tuition fee for certain BSc courses offered by Jadavpur University. The fees for all the Jadavpur University BSc courses is currently unknown. faqs.question: How much is the fee for Jadavpur University BSc course?
faqs.answer: The total BSc course fee is cumulative of various fee components such as the admission fee, enrolment fee, tuition fee, security deposit, etc. Jadavpur University BSc course tuition fee ranges betweenINR 1.51 lakh - INR 4.13 lakh. This fee range includes BSc tuition fees at some of the affiliated colleges as well. It must be noted that the mentioned fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. Hence, the actual amount may vary.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission in BSc at Jadavpur University?
faqs.answer: Candidats seeking admission to BSc course in Jadavpur University must have passed Class 12 from any recognised Board in Science with Chemistry, Mathematics, and Physics. In addition, aspirant should have passed the qualifying exam with at least 75% aggregate (67.5% for OBC-A/OBC-B,  56.25% for SC/ST/PD/Sports category, and 40% for PD candidates). The aspirants must also hold the mark sheets (Original/photocopy).

courses_data.name: Jadavpur University MTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Jadavpur University offers a two-year ME/ MTech course divided into four semesters. The PG course is offered in different specialisations such as Computer Science and Engineering, Chemical,Software Engineering, etc. Jadavpur University MTech admission is through the GATE exam. Candidates who have completed their graduation are eligible to apply for ME/ MTech.

faqs.question: In which specialisations does Jadavpur University offer ME?
faqs.answer: Jadavpur University offersMTech coursescovering 12 specialisations, including CSE, Civil, Control Systems, Electrical, Software, Printing & Graphical Communication, Chemical, Mechanical, Automobile and Power, among others. These are two-year programmes divided into four semesters. For the ME courses, admission is also through GATE. The aspirants must check out the eligibility conditions before applying to the course.

faqs.question: Can I do MTech from Jadavpur University without GATE?

Hence, it is necessary that the applicants have a valid score of this national-level examination. Furthermore, the candidates seeking admission can contact the university admission office to confirm whether direct admission is offered to this PG-level programme.

courses_data.description: Jadavpur University offers a B.Ed programme under the faculty of Arts in a full-time mode. It is a two-year programme. Admission to this programme is based on the merit of candidates' performance in their last qualifying examinations. Candidates who have completed UG/ Master's degree with a minimum aggregate of 40% to 50% can apply for the B.Ed course.

courses_data.name: Jadavpur University PhD Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Jadavpur University offers PhD across different specialisations, including Economics, English,Economics, and Physics. The entrance exams accepted for course admissions are UGC NET and GATE. Aspirants seeking admission must also fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria. The applications of only the eligible candidates are accepted by the university. Candidates who have passed a master's degree in a relevant stream from a recognised institute/ university are eligible to apply for the PhD programme.

faqs.question: What are the PhD courses offered in Jadavpur University?
faqs.answer: Jadavpur University offer PhD across different specialisations. Admission criteria is almost the same for all. Some of the PhD specialisations are further mentioned below:JU PhD SpecialisationsBengaliComparative LiteratureEnglishEconomicsInternational RelationsPhilosophyMedia Communication & CultureSociologyPhysical Education

faqs.question: Does Jadavpur University conducts entrance test for Ph.D?
faqs.answer: Yes, Jadavpur University conducts entrance test for admission to PhD programme. It is a two hour written test conducted for PhD admission. Candidates who have qualified NET/ SET/ GATE are exempted from appearing for the written test. Selected candidates have to further come for the personal interview round.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for Ph.D at Jadavpur University?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete a two-year MA or equivalent degree with at least 55% aggregate or its equivalent Grade B to apply for Jadavpur University PhD programme. A relaxation of 5% is offered in aggregate for candidates belonging to SC/ ST/ OBC-NCL/ Differently-Abled.Applicants who have obtained an MA or equivalent degree of less than two two-years duration, must have completed at least a total of five years of UG and PG study to apply for PhD programme.

courses_data.name: Jadavpur University MBA Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:MAT, ATMA, XAT, JEMAT, CAT
courses_data.description: Jadavpur University offers an MBA through its affiliated college - the Institute of Business Management (IBM). It is a three-year degree course. This institute is located on the same campus as the university. The PG-level course is offered in five specialisations, including Finance, Marketing, System/IT, Human Resources, and Project Management. Jadavpur University MBA admission is based on the candidate's score inCAT/MAT/XAT/JEMAT/ATMA/CMAT. The shortlisted candidates have to go through a personal interview round as well. Besides, aspirants who do not meet the eligibility requirement or fails to get a seat in the university can opt forOnline MBA.

faqs.question: Is MBA from Jadavpur University worth it?
faqs.answer: MBA is offered by Jadavpur University through its affiliated college: IBM. The institute is a decent option for MBA aspirants as graduates get a degree from Jadavpur University. Some of the top recruiters that participate in IBM placements drive are HDFC Bank, KPMG, PwC, ICICI Prudential, etc. Further, the placement statistics are not available as of now. Candidates getting into a college ranked better than IBM can opt for that.

faqs.question: Does Jadavpur University offer MBA?
faqs.answer: Jadavpur University offers a two-year full-time MBA course via the Institute of Business Management (IBM), affiliated to the university. IBM MBA admission is based on candidates' performance in several national-level entrance exams, including CAT/MAT/XAT/JEMAT/ATMA/CMAT, followed by a Personal Interview (PI) round. Apart from the entrance test scores, candidates are also required to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria to be eligible for Jadavpur University MBA admission.

placement_data.title: Jadavpur University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to media reports, the highest international package offered during Jadavpur University placement 2024 (Engineering and Technology department) stood at INR 140 LPA . The average package received by Engineering students during JU placement 2024 was INR 11 LPA . 830 students were placed out of 913 registered Engineering students in 2024. Further, the highest domestic package in 2024 was INR 57 LPA. The placement rate recorded for top Engineering branch such as CSE, IT and Chemical was 97%, 96% and 90%, respectively. Other than this, the highest package offered during Arts and Science departments placement 2024 was INR 16.5 LPA and INR 14.5 LPA.

highlights.description:
One of India’s top institutes is Jadavpur University. As per the NIRF Ranking 2025, the rank of the institute is #18 under the category Overall, #9 under University, #18 under Engineering, #24 under Pharmacy, and #23 under Research Institutions. At the international level, QS World Rankings 2025 has ranked the institute at #721-730 position. Jadavpur University is top ranked by multiple national & international ranking bodies for its academic offerings and renowned faculty. Its faculty has a proven track record of doing great research. The article mentioned below covers all the necessary details you need if you're interested in the Jadavpur University rankings.

nirf.description:
Based on the rankings from NIRF, Jadavpur University outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the NIRF ranking system. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have dropped in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Jadavpur University fell 1 rank to #18 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Jadavpur University's rank is #9, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Jadavpur University fell 6 ranks to #18 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
The institute's ranks in the 'Pharmacy' category; have shown a fluctuation when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Jadavpur University fell 6 ranks to #24 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
Jadavpur University has been ranked well by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Top Global Universities' category. Through the years, the QS World University Rankingss for Jadavpur University indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the QS World University Rankings. It has been seen that in the 'Top Global Universities' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2026, Jadavpur University climbed 45 ranks to #676 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Asia', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Jadavpur University fell 3 ranks to #214 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown an increasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, Jadavpur University climbed 1 rank to #40 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.

sports.description: Jadavpur University pays adequate attention to the sports facilities so that students can possess the significant development and promotion of sports culture within the university. The university believes in the idea of "Sports for All", as sports are considered the fundamental right of all which seems to preserve the integrity of sports in the university. The sports board encourages sporting activities as an imperative part of the university community that can generate a feeling of national pride and identity. Every year about 200-250 students of the university participate in the inter-university sports competition. Such participating events are Aquatics (Swimming & Diving), Rowing, Chess, American Football, Karate, Grappling, Kick Boxing, Football, Volleyball, Basketball, Cricket, Tennis, Table Tennis, Air Rifle Shooting, Squash Rackets, Kho-Kho, Kabadi, Badminton, Ball Badminton, Athletics, Taekwondo, Weight & Powerlifting, Gymnastics, Yoga, Handball, Netball, Wrestling, Archery, Judo etc. Playground:

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Department of Management, J.D Birla InstituteReviewed on 24 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent academic and corporate grooming.
reviews.review_text: It is well regarded for maintaining a corporate-like environment, which is suitable for management studies. Classrooms are air-conditioned with smart boards. A fully automated library with quite a variety of books. Fully equipped computer lab with the latest software and Wi-Fi on campus. There are no official hostels, most students stay in nearby paying guests. The college has a very hygienic canteen. The college has an in-house infirmary. Sports facilities include a badminton court and a recrea...

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good placement on campus and also off-campus.
reviews.review_text: There is a good library with all the books, including the pharmacopoeia. Free Wi-Fi is available across the campus. Lab instruments are new, and classrooms are very good. PPTs are there, and the hostel is of good quality with low fees. The hostel's food quality is good, and there are six canteens. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Jadavpur University has a legacy of more than a century.
reviews.review_text: The department is well-equipped with all kinds of labs and necessary teaching resources. As I am not very familiar with the facilities offered by IITs and NITs, I would rate mine as 4/5. This department was the first in Asia and receives a lot of funds and grants from alumni and organizations. You will learn a lot if you join JU Chemical. About the hostels, UG1 hostels are well-maintained and good. Wi-Fi is available, and rooms are big enough for 2–3 people. As I am not a hosteller, this is all ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by J.D Birla Institute (JDBI)
reviews.review_heading: Review of J.D Birla Institute (JDBI).
reviews.review_text: We have good classrooms, a canteen, labs, a library, and even the college is undergoing renovation, providing us with greater facilities and a more comfortable infrastructure. We have AC classrooms and comfortable seating arrangements. The canteen food is good, and the library has a vast range of books with borrowing facilities.

reviews.review_heading: College with the best return on investment.
reviews.review_text: Being a state university, the institute is heavily underfunded. As a result, the infrastructure is not upto the mark in comparison to IITs and NITs. Though a good amount of research does take place. Hostel specifically is not of great quality, but that is justified by its ultra-cheap rent of Rs 30 per month.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a great college with the best return on investment, one can get with good placements.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well-maintained and have the necessary facilities for the course. From 2025 onwards, a new syllabus is being introduced which removes irrelevant courses in the first year that have been a part of the course for many years, replacing them with necessary subjects.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college. It is the best state university in India.
reviews.review_text: The department coordinated well with the students. There is Wi-Fi available. Library is one of the biggest in the whole West Bengal. The campus is very big, and has 6 canteens where food of every range is available.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good infrastructure and resources.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our department are very good. The whole department and campus have free Wi-Fi. Classrooms, library, and computer labs are also very modern. Hostel facilities are very good, with rooms for study, food services, and a canteen available. Every sports instrument is available, with a good playground.

reviews.review_heading: Jadavpur University food technology course summary and college life idea.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available on the whole campus. There are a total of 9 canteens, and each hostel has its own separate cooking area. Table tennis, cricket, and football are the most popular sports. The sports culture and fests are the most lovable part of Jadavpur University.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with good faculty, placements, and affordable education.
reviews.review_text: The college is good. Hostels are clean. The menu is good and cheap. It has clean labs, and toilets are provided. Medical facilities are also provided. The library is very big and good. Many books are present in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Awesome placements, top-notch faculty, and the college with the highest ROI.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are non-AC, and college infrastructure is decent. Labs are also decent; only the computer lab has AC. Wi-Fi is available throughout the whole campus. A large central library and a departmental library are available. Hostel is so-so, also about mess food. I live outside campus in a PG. I would say the hostel should not be preferred. There is a large playground on the campus, and also an ATMA SBI bank.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Department of Management, J.D Birla InstituteReviewed on 13 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A college known for its flagship BBA course.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious and equipped with smart boards. The library has a respectable selection of materials that can be accessed both online and offline. There is a canteen inside the building providing vegetarian food only. There are a few indoor games as well as a badminton court.

reviews.review_heading: Jadavpur University has got tier-1 rank by NAAC.
reviews.review_text: Every department has its own library and Wi-Fi. Each classroom is air-conditioned and contains a projector. Both boys' and girls' hostels (3 each) are available for students coming from far rural areas.

reviews.review_heading: An outstanding course for higher studies.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and, most importantly, the labs are well-equipped. Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. There is a huge collection of all types of books in both the central and departmental libraries. Hostels are also at their very best. The hostel charge is actually very nominal.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing return on investment and value for money. Amazing campus life and very good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good. Labs are maintained. Wi-Fi works quite well. Classrooms are quite clean. Library here is one of the best places. There are 4 canteens with reasonable rates for food present. Sports and games are quite encouraged too.

The scholarships are offered on the basis of recommendations of departments. The university also offers stipends on a means-cum-merit basis. highlights.summary: Summary not available

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent infrastructure and facilities. Very nice placements.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 75-80% of the students are placed in this course. This university has its own hospital and labs everything. This university provides an internship of 1 year here itself. After doing bachelor's course in MLT you can work in a hospital as a lab technician or lab scientist. You will be called a phlebotomist. This branch is so evolving branch. After doing masters in this course, you can be a professor or you can get a license to open your own lab.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are well structured. They have Wi-Fi facility, and there is a separate library section. The infrastructure at NIMS University is quite modern. They have all the facilities you ask for, from good classrooms to malls, from gym to swimming pool. Every facility is open here 24X7 for students. Hostel facility is very good. Rooms are spacious with AC facility. Mess food is also good. There are almost 4-5 restaurants inside the university which are open 24X7. Sports are taken as seriously. They take care of the health and fitness of students here. Sports competitions also happen here. Football ground, basketball ground, badminton court, and everything are there.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Radiation Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: My favourite is infrastructure of the campus.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 90% of students are placed in my course. The salary depends on work experience and knowledge, ranging from Rs. 20,000 to Rs. 60,000 per month. One year of internship is compulsory in this course, which we complete at our campus's own hospital of the campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of Nims University Jaipur is one the best in Jaipur. They provide many facilities for students like 24x7 campus open for students. Cafe, restaurant, and store are also 24x7 open where you can take your meal or enjoy with your group. Hostel rooms are well furnished and ventilation system is also provided for the comfort. There are libraries, gym, swimming pool and play ground for students.
