content.Placements: 50% of students get a job with a 4 LPA package. I don't know about the top recruiting companies yet. There is 100% internship because, of course, it is the top role is mainly technician, which can be abroad, then that, it is the main top roles otherwise not.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. Hostels, which are newly constructed now, were not good before. The old ones did not have good facilities and no proper maintenance. But now the new hostels are constructed, which are in good condition and maintaining it proper well. I am happy with the working AC.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure of this university is good. Faculty members are very well-behaved people.

content.Placements: About 80 students were in our course. The highest package in our course was around Rs. 50,000, and the starting salary was Rs. 10,000. Many types of positions were required, such as lab assistant, lab technician, etc. About 50% were required for the internship program for companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our labs were very well-ventilated and clean. Classrooms were cleaned daily by workers. On campus, there were many types of plants, including all kinds of flowers and other plants. The roads were very clean, and no dirty was seen anywhere. The hostel mess was very big, and all students ate their meals at the same time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Excellent infrastructure and facilities. Very nice placements.

content.Placements: Approximately 75-80% of the students are placed in this course. This university has its own hospital and labs everything. This university provides an internship of 1 year here itself. After doing bachelor's course in MLT you can work in a hospital as a lab technician or lab scientist. You will be called a phlebotomist. This branch is so evolving branch. After doing masters in this course, you can be a professor or you can get a license to open your own lab.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are well structured. They have Wi-Fi facility, and there is a separate library section. The infrastructure at NIMS University is quite modern. They have all the facilities you ask for, from good classrooms to malls, from gym to swimming pool. Every facility is open here 24X7 for students. Hostel facility is very good. Rooms are spacious with AC facility. Mess food is also good. There are almost 4-5 restaurants inside the university which are open 24X7. Sports are taken as seriously. They take care of the health and fitness of students here. Sports competitions also happen here. Football ground, basketball ground, badminton court, and everything are there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Radiation Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My favourite is infrastructure of the campus.

content.Placements: Approximately 90% of students are placed in my course. The salary depends on work experience and knowledge, ranging from Rs. 20,000 to Rs. 60,000 per month. One year of internship is compulsory in this course, which we complete at our campus's own hospital of the campus.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of Nims University Jaipur is one the best in Jaipur. They provide many facilities for students like 24x7 campus open for students. Cafe, restaurant, and store are also 24x7 open where you can take your meal or enjoy with your group. Hostel rooms are well furnished and ventilation system is also provided for the comfort. There are libraries, gym, swimming pool and play ground for students.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Radiation and Imaging Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Nice campus life and faculty are so sweet.

content.Placements: Placements are high for this course at approximately 70%, The highest package is around 10 LPA, the lowest at 2 LPA and an average of 4-5 LPA. 100% of students got internships in NIMS hospitals. X-ray technologies, CT technologies, MRI technologies, Ultrasound Radiology Assistant Nuclear Medicine Technologies, Medical Imaging Specials etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are available like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, etc. and they all are very good. The radiology equipments are very advanced level. Hospital facilities are superb. Food quality is good neat and clean and healthy food is provided in the mess and canteen, medical facilities are also good, sports and games facilities also available like cricket ground, football ground, basketball court, long tennis court, badminton court, table tennis court, volleyball court, swimming pool, gym, etc.

reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of Nims University Jaipur is one the best in Jaipur. They provide many facilities for students like 24x7 campus open for students. Cafe, restaurant, and store are also 24x7 open where you can take your meal or enjoy with your group. Hostel rooms are well furnished and ventilation system is also provided for the comfort. reviews.review_heading: Nice campus life and faculty are so sweet.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are available like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, etc. and they all are very good. The radiology equipments are very advanced level. Hospital facilities are superb. Food quality is good neat and clean and healthy food is provided in the mess and canteen, medical facilities are also good, sports and games facilities also available like cricket ground, football ground, basketball court, long tennis court, badminton court, table tennis court, volleyball court, swimming pool, gym, ...

reviews.review_heading: NIMS University B.Sc. OTT (review).
reviews.review_text: The university had excellent facilities, including well-equipped laboratories, a good library, and various blocks for different departments. The campus was not good, and Wi-Fi access was limited. We can play different types of sports on campus whenever we want.

reviews.review_heading: Best college with good environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Our college has well-cleaned and advanced labs. All classrooms are fully AC with digital smart boards. There is a library with lots of books. Boys' and girls' hostels are separate, each room has an attached bathroom. The mess food is also good with proper hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: All facilities are excellent.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good and well-designed. Almost all facilities are available in our college. Boys and girls hostels are separate, with every room having an attached bathroom. The mess food is good. Both indoor and outdoor games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of NIMS College of Paramedical Technology.
reviews.review_text: Daily floors are cleaned and kept dry. Sufficient equipment is provided to train the students. AC is available in the blocks, classrooms, and canteen. Sports and games are not much played because we are busy with studies only. A large library with useful books.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and high packages for jobs.
reviews.review_text: The college has the best facilities for the students to learn and grow in their professions and the campus has good classrooms, sufficient labs, auditoriums, etc. And the hostels are good, the food is good, and sports are conducted twice a year for students .

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities for my course are top notch with well-equipped labs and modern equipment, classrooms and a resourceful library offering extensive materials. The hostel is comfortable and mess serves good food, canteen options are also good. Medical and sports facility is available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college that provides impressive placements.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good, with well-furnished rooms, Wi-Fi, and sports facilities. It serves meals 3 times a day to students. Food quality is good. The environment of the hostel is strict. Liberty is available for students. It allots 2 seater and 3 seater rooms with a fee of 8 LPA.

reviews.review_heading: It is worth the money university with no worry of placements and top facility.
reviews.review_text: You can find Wi-Fi everywhere in campus so there is no need to worry about internet even in classrooms. Campus is very good as it is eye catching. In hostel all facilities are available even mess food is quite good to eat and healthy too. We are even provided with sports club where we can play anything of our desire.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are pretty decent and all the facilities are available. All students staying there are satisfied with the facilities provided to them. We have very clean and hygienic hostels and rooms. Good security is provided to students.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of infrastructure, campus life and faculty. Dissatisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well established. There is free Wi-Fi and the classrooms are well maintained. There are facilities in library with lots of books from different authors. There is a central library where any departments’ student can visit. There is a personal library in which you can visit anywhere and it opens till 8 pm.

highlights.summary:
As per the NIRF 2025 rankings, DU ranks #15 under the category 'Overall', and #5 under the category 'Universities'.

DU admissions 2026 are open. A few more updates are given below:

table.details: - Ranked 328 by the QS World University Rankings 2026 - Ranked 5th under the 'University' category by the NIRF Ranking 2025

college_info.intro:
Some of the popular programmes of Delhi University include BSc, BCom Hons and MSc, etc. Apart from this, BA (Hons) Economics and DU BA (Hons) English are another popular courses offered at DU. Interested students have to appear for the CUET exam and DU CSAS process.
DU graduates are placed in top organisations such as Genpact, Accenture, EY, Deloitte, HCL Tech, InfoEdge, etc.
Delhi University offers various UG, PG and doctorate programmes in streams such as Arts, Science, Commerce, Management, Law, Medical, Design, Information Technology, etc. Students can check the DU popular programmes, along with the eligibility and fee in the table provided below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered every semester
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in India
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

faqs.answer: A:    The average package offered by some of the top DU Colleges in recent times is presented below:DU College Name Average Package Hindu CollegeINR 10.4 LPA (2023)Miranda HouseINR 7.6 LPA (2025)KMCINR 10.8 LPA (2025) LSRINR 12.18 LPA (2025) Hansraj CollegeINR 9 LPA (2025)SRCCINR 9.9 LPA (2025) SVCINR 5.9 LPA (2024)JMCINR 6 LPA (2024)Gargi CollegeINR 5.25 LPA (2024)
faqs.question: What is the average package offered by top DU colleges?

faqs.answer: A:    The highest package offered at Maulana Azad Medical College, University of Delhi is approximately INR 80 LPA (80 Lacs per annum). The average package is not less than INR 85,000 per month in Delhi and can go up to INR 1 Lacs or INR 2 Lakhs per month after an undergraduate degree. Further, the placement rate recorded during Maulana Azad Medical College PG 2-year and PG 3-year placements in 2022 was 100 percent.
faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at Maulana Azad Medical College, University of Delhi?

faqs.question: What is the MBA intake at DU?

faqs.answer: A:    Delhi University placement process is conducted through Centralized Placement Cell and Department Placement Cell, which varies from college to college. Other than this, the placement period at DU is between August and December. However, it may vary from college and department.
faqs.question: What is the placement process followed by Delhi University?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: DU University offers over 500 programmes approved by various academic and executive councils, of which 200+ programmes have been considered for NAAC accreditation. DU Delhi admission 2026 is different for entrance-based and merit-based UG and PG programmes. DU admission to all the PG courses is subject to CUET PG exam conducted by NTA.

faqs.answer: A:    Delhi University BCom/ BCom (H) fee structure is cumulative of various components, such as tuition fees, caution money, etc. The total tuition fees for the UG course range from INR 540 to INR 1 lakh. This fee range is inclusive of course fees at the DU-affiliated colleges. Once final selection is done, candidates need to pay the admission fee amount. It must be noted that the fee range given here is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: How much does BCom at University of Delhi cost?

faqs.answer: A:    There is no application fees to apply for the college, but you have to pay CUET counseling fees at the time of counselling which is 1500 Rs for UR, OBC-NCL, EWS, and 1200 Rs for SC/ST/PwDB candidates. Sri Guru Nanak Dev Khalsa College admission 2024 for UG courses (as per DU) will be through the Common Seat Allocation System of the University of Delhi.
faqs.question: What is the application fee for the B.A programme at Sri Guru Nanak Dev Khalsa College University of Delhi?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, each student of LLM programme shall submit a dissertation carrying 200 marks as prescribed. The students shall submit the title with synopsis for dissertation for approval in the 5th semester on the specific data. The supervisors shall be appointed by the specified data after successful defence of the synopsis by the candidate through an interview before the panel appointed by the LLM Committee.
faqs.question: Do I have to submit dissertation in DU LLM programme?

faqs.answer: A:    Delhi University offers MSc across several specialisations. The duration for MSc at DU is 2 years. The eligibility for MSc courses at Delhi University  is graduation/ bachelor's degree in any stream with at least 50% and a valid score in CUET PG.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MSc at DU?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Economics and Food Technology - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The faculty members are good, but the infrastructure isn’t.

review_content.Placements: I am not much aware of my college’s placement cell, but there is a cell that provides better placements. About 65–70 percent of students have been placed, from my knowledge. Students mostly find internships online through sites and LinkedIn and apply for jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not that good. The Wi-Fi sometimes doesn’t work, and the facilities are limited. There is a canteen too, but since I don’t visit it much, I’m not aware of the food they provide. We also have a medical room that is better and good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in History and Geography - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Need to heavily work on infrastructure and placements.

review_content.Placements: Not much is known about the placement cell. Internships aren’t provided as well. We have to find internships and placements externally on our own. We do have clubs in our college, but they are just namesake. Very few events, functions, and programs are conducted.
review_content.Infrastructure: We don’t have a hostel for our college, so we have to take PGs nearby. The PGs are very bad, lack hygiene, and the food quality is very poor. The Wi-Fi doesn’t work all around the college. The infrastructure and facilities are very poor, and our college really needs to work on them.

review_summary.college_name: Delhi University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. (Hons.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: DRC is probably the second-best girls' college of DU.

content.Placements: Placement percentage is indeed a little poor at DRC as even Commerce and Economics students find placements hard. The Big 4 that is KPMG, EY, Deloitte, and PwC have been the best recruiters but they also note just a few students. Internship students have to find on their own as college doesn't provide that.
content.Infrastructure: The newly built building is perfect from AC classrooms to smart boards, we have them all. Our canteen too is amazing as it's an all-girls college and our canteen serves a variety of pastries. The only issue is with the auditorium as it needs serious development.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Economics - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The best commerce college.

content.Placements: From CUET, students get opportunities for this course, and people choose this course in DCAC. The highest placement is 10 LPA, the average is 5 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. At most 70 percent of students get placed everywhere from this course, and the college top recruiting companies are Deloitte, KPMG, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is mid, classrooms are decent, library is excellent. Infrastructure is 5/10, but is good for studies. There is no hostel. Canteen is working, but the food is not that good. Facilities for sports are not as needed, they need to be changed ASAP and work should be done soon.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Economics and Food Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The faculty members are good, but the infrastructure isn’t.

content.Placements: I am not much aware of my college’s placement cell, but there is a cell that provides better placements. About 65–70 percent of students have been placed, from my knowledge. Students mostly find internships online through sites and LinkedIn and apply for jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not that good. The Wi-Fi sometimes doesn’t work, and the facilities are limited. There is a canteen too, but since I don’t visit it much, I’m not aware of the food they provide. We also have a medical room that is better and good.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in History and Geography - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Need to heavily work on infrastructure and placements.

content.Placements: Not much is known about the placement cell. Internships aren’t provided as well. We have to find internships and placements externally on our own. We do have clubs in our college, but they are just namesake. Very few events, functions, and programs are conducted.
content.Infrastructure: We don’t have a hostel for our college, so we have to take PGs nearby. The PGs are very bad, lack hygiene, and the food quality is very poor. The Wi-Fi doesn’t work all around the college. The infrastructure and facilities are very poor, and our college really needs to work on them.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Decent college, could be considered as a last resort.

content.Placements: The placements provided by the college are below average. People from the B.A. program do get placements, but it is rare that they will get a good one. High packages are offered by some companies, but few will rarely grasp those. So it would be safe to avoid going to this college if you don't have any other skills other than your degree, if you want a good placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good for a college in a place like Shahdara, but it could have been better. For playing sports, we have a volleyball court and a ground where you can play football, cricket, etc. Hostel facilities are not provided by the college, so students have to make arrangements on their own.

admission_overview.college_name: Delhi University Admission 2026: Fees, Eligibility, Application Form, Last Date to Apply

admission_overview.title: DU Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: DU admission 2026 for UG courses is based on the CUET scores of the candidates. DU PG admissions are based on CUET-PG scores of the candidates. Aspirants who wish to get admission in Delhi University affiliated colleges have to apply and appear for CUET. There is no limit for attempting for CUET-UG or CUET-PG exams. However, getting admission in top DU colleges is competitive due to a large number of applicants, high cutoff and limited seats. Aspirants who pass the accepted exams have to further apply on DU CSAS Portal to provide the college and course preferences. The university offers more than 50 courses. These courses are offered across different levels, such as UG, PG, and Doctoral. Some of the top courses are BA, BSc, BCom, MA. etc. Aspirants can also pursue DU programmes in distance education mode via School of Open Learning, University of Delhi.

paragraphs: Students can get admission at University of Delhi by providing a valid CUET score. It is a national-level entrance test. For UG courses, such as BA, BSc, and BCom, the university conducts CUET UG. Students must appear for the exam by taking their DU CUET admit card. DU admission process for UG or PG courses consists of six major steps which include registration for CUET UG or PG, appearance in the relevant exam, registration for DU CSAS, CSAS counselling process, merit list release and seat allocation. Check below the DU admission process in detail:

DU University registrations via CUET usually commence in the last week ofFebruary. CUET registration process commences online. Candidates willing to appear for CUET 2026 exam must fill out the application form online when released. Interested candidates were able to apply online on the official website of CUET UG and CUET PG.

Followed by the application forms of CUET UG and CUET PG, DU will begin the DU CSAS registration for final college and course allotment of students who qualify the exams. The process will begin after the release of CUET-UG andCUET-PG resultswhich are expected to be released in July.

Candidates who have registered for CUET are required to appear for the exam in the subject of their choice and get a valid score.Common University Entrance Test also known asCUET UGis a national-level entrance exam is conducted in online mode.
3.1:Visit https://ugadmission.uod.ac.in/ and register as a new user.
3.2:Fill out the preferences of on andoff campus colleges of duand course combinations. This portal will be used until the admission process of the candidate is not completed.
3.3:There is a one-time CSAS(UG)-2026 application fee that students are required to pay. This fee is non-refundable.
CSAS (UG) - 2026 Application Fee
UR/OBC-NCL/EWS

DU admission 2026 for UG courses is through theCommon Seat Allocation Systemof the University of Delhi. But, at first, it is necessary that aspirants opt for DU during CUET form filling and later apply on the CSAS portal to be eligible for admission.
The admission process afterCUET resultdeclaration is explained below:
Step 4.1:After the declaration of the CUET UG exam, register on the DU CSAS portal in multiple phases. Submit College + Course combination preferences in the order of priority on the CSAS dashboard.
Step 4.2:The university releases DU CSAS Seat Allocation Lists for all categories.

Step 4.3:Once the candidate "Accepts" the provisionally allocated seat, the concerned college will verify the eligibility and documents uploaded by the candidate online. The college has an option to 'Accept' or 'Reject' the admission of the student basis the verification.
CheckDocuments Required for DU Admission
Once the DU-affiliated college accords the approval, candidates will have to pay the 'Admission Fee' to confirm their seats.CheckDU Seat Availability

Delhi University and GGSIPU are some of the prominent universities in India.

DU Seats 2026

DU seat intake varies course-wise. To get a seat in any of the DU affiliated colleges, candidates are required to pass CUET-UG. Admission to PG courses is based on CUET-PG score. DU has introduced a supernumerary quota for single girl children in its postgraduate (PG) admissions. Starting this admission cycle, the university will reserve one additional seat in every PG course for eligible single girl candidates applying through CUET PG counselling. lists: Candidates applying for BFA will have to pay an additional fee of INR 400 (non-refundable).
For applying to ECA and Sports supernumerary quota, there is an additional fee of INR100 for each quota.
The "freeze" option in seat allocation for CSAS (DU) is to be selected by the students to confirm their admission choice to the allocated on andoff campus colleges of DU.
If candidates are happy with the assigned college and course, they can freeze the request through their dashboard.
Once they select this option, they will not be considered for "upgradation" of choice in further rounds of CSAS.
Candidates must only select this option only if they are satisfied with the allocated seat and want to take admission to this course & college
If they do not choose to upgrade or freeze your admission, their current status will be maintained.

courses_data.name: DU MBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: Delhi University offers two-year MBA programme in Management Education and Research. This course is offered via Faculty of Management Studies (FMS), Department of Finance and Business Economics (DBE) and Delhi School of Economics. MBA is also available atDU Sol, National Institute of Health and Family Welfare andSri Guru Gobind Singh College of Commerce. DU colleges focuses on practical learning it conducts various workshops from time to time in addition to internship programmes. Students who do not wish to pursue a full-time MBA or did not get a seat can opt forOnline MBAcourse. Candidates can pursue the online degree along with their work.

courses_data.name: DU BTech Admission 2026
courses_data.description: Delhi University offers a four-year full-time BTech course via its affiliated colleges. Aspirants can apply for BTech course after completing Class 12 with at least 60% aggregate. Candidates must havePhysics, Chemistry andMathematicsas subjects in Class 12. There is 5% relaxation in the aggregate for OBC-NCL and 10% for SC/ ST/ PwD candidates. Download:DU BTech Information Bulletin

faqs.question: Which are the B.Tech specialisations offered at DU?
faqs.answer: University of Delhi offers a four-year BTech course through Faculty of Technology (FoT). The university offers BTech to students who have completed Class 12. Below are the BTech specialisations available at DU:Computer Science and EngineeringElectronics and Communication EngineeringElectrical Engineering

faqs.question: What are the essential qualifications for admission to BTech course at DU?
faqs.answer: Candidates must pass Class 12 or equivalent with at least 60% aggregate with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics along with English as a subject of study to apply for Delhi University BTech programme. Besides, aspirants must also appear for JEE Main for admission to BTech programme.

faqs.question: Is there any dress code at DU?
faqs.answer: Delhi University does not follow a dress code. The students are free to wear casual clothing. But, during the orientation, induction programmes and guest lectures, students are requested to dress in formals. Also, DU students are mostly known to have set new fashion trends for other college students.

courses_data.name: DU LLM Admission 2026
courses_data.description: Delhi University offers a full-time LLM programme for two to three years at the PG level. This course is offered by Faculty of Law under DU. Candidates who have passed 3 or 5-year LLB degree from DU or any other Indian/ Foreign University with at least 50% aggregate (45% for OBC-NCL/ PwD/ CW and 40% for SC/ ST) or equivalent can apply for the LLM programme. Admission for this course is based on CUET-PG or LLM Entrance Exam scores of the candidates.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for DU 3 year LLM?
faqs.answer: Graduation is the minimum qualification required for DU LLM programme. Below is detailed eligibility for LLM:Aspirants need to complete a three or five-year LLB degree from the University of Delhi or any other Indian or Foreign University recognised as equivalent by DU with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for OBC-NCL/ PwD/ CW and 40% aggregate for SC/ ST) or equivalent can apply for LLM course.Candidates securing the marks prescribed above or appearing in the qualifying degree examination

faqs.question: Do I need 60% in Class 12 to get admission in DU?
faqs.answer: DU is considered one of the most competitive universities in India for Commerce, Science and Arts education at the undergraduate level. The university and its affiliated colleges was attracting the cream layer of crowd till the time admission was subject to Class 12 scores. While reserved category candidates still had minor chances of getting into a not-so-popular course of DU with 60% in Class 12, a General category student with 60% had no chance of getting into any good college or course at DU.However, starting 2022, DU admission process has shifted to CUET-UG based admission process. Those with a valid score in CUET UG exam who have passed their Class 12 are eligible to take admission now. While the chances of getting into a good DU college are still low at this score, the chances of getting a seat have increased now (provided you score extremely well in CUET UG).

faqs.question: What is the DU selection process for B.Ed programme?
faqs.answer: Candidates can apply for DU admission via Common University Entrance Test (CUET). Before applying for the course, aspirants must check out the eligibility requirements. To apply students can visit NTA official website. After the entrance test, the cutoff marks are made available beind the login on the official samarth portal of the university. At the time of CUET registration, aspirants must selection DU as a preference.

faqs.question: Is DU admission open?
faqs.answer: DU admissionis open. Admission in Delhi University is based on CUET-UG & CUET-PG scores. Below are the upcoming events for DU admission:University of Delhi (DU) has released the admission cutoff for 5-yr integrated BA LLB and BBA LLB courses through Common Law Admission Test (CLAT) scores.The CUET PG 2026 registration process for admission to PG courses is expected to begin in Jan 2026.DU CSAS-PG 2025 Spot Round 3 allocations have been released for admission to various PG courses based on the CUET-PG 2025 scores, and the last date for fee payment isAug 20, 2025.

placement_data.title: DU Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Delhi University has active and dedicated Centralised Placement Cell (CPC) that facilitates all types of placement-related activities. DU students registered with CPC get placement assistance , employment counselling and entrepreneurship training as well. The CPC also organises workshops and seminars on present-day industry needs for students to become successful professionals.

DU placement process is conducted through Centralized Placement Cell and Department Placement Cell, which varies from college to college. Meanwhile, the peak placement period is between August and December . However, it may vary depending upon the college and department. As per the annual report 2024 , 15373 students applied for placement 2024 and 1766 students were placed. According to DU NIRF report 2025 , the median package offered to UG 3-year and PG 2-year students during placements 2024 stood at INR 5.5 LPA and INR 16.7 LPA , respectively.
DU Annual Report 2023-24

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered during DU placements?
faqs.answer: Leading Delhi University colleges such as SRCC and Lady Shri Ram College students received the highest package of INR 35 LPA and INR 48.9 LPA, respectively. DU Colleges like Jesus & Mary College and Gargi College got the highest package of INR 23.05 LPA. Earlier, during placements 2023, the highest package offered to Hindu College and Kirori Mal College students INR 36.5 LPA and INR 51 LPA.

faqs.question: How to prepare for DU placements?
faqs.answer: Delhi University has a decent record of placements for courses like BTech, MBA, BCA, MBBS, etc. The course-wise placement details are yet to be released on the offcial website. However, the DU has released the NIRF report 2024 on its offcial website which include the placement details for the batch 2023. According to DU NIRF report 2024, the key highlights of DU placements 2023 for UG programs are presented below: Particulars UG 3-year Placement Statistics (2023) UG 4-year Placement Statistics (2023) Median package INR 5.5 LPA INR 8.5 LPA Total students 266 47 Students placed 190 20 Students opted for higher studies 76 10 Further, the key highlights of DU placements 2023 for PG programs are presented below: Particulars PG 1-year Placement Statistics (2023) PG 2-year Placement Statistics (2023) PG 3-year Placement Statistics (2023) Median package INR 5.5 LPA INR 16 LPA INR 14 LPA Total students 101 6557 1934 Students placed 38 1253 77 Students opted for higher studies 46 590 96

faqs.question: What is the placement process followed by Delhi University?
faqs.answer: Delhi University placement process is conducted through Centralized Placement Cell and Department Placement Cell, which varies from college to college. Other than this, the placement period at DU is between August and December. However, it may vary from college and department.

faqs.question: What is the placement trend recorded during DU placements?
faqs.answer: According to DU NIRF report 2024, the key highlights of UG and PG placements 2023 as compared with previous two years are presented below: Particulars UG 3-year 2021 2022 2023 Median package INR 4.5 LPA INR 5 LPA INR 5.5 LPA Total students 331 344 266 Students placed 207 183 190 Students opted for higher studies 40 151 76 Particulars UG 4-year 2021 2022 2023 Median package INR 7 LPA INR 8 LPA INR 8.5 LPA Total students 40 40 47 Students placed 21 28 20 Students opted for higher studies 6 7 10 Particulars PG 1-year 2021 2022 2023 Median package INR 5.4 LPA INR 5.5 LPA INR 5.5 LPA Total students 98 106 101 Students placed 42 37 38 Students opted for higher studies 40 47 46 Particulars PG 2-year 2021 2022 2023 Median package INR 14 LPA INR 15.5 LPA INR 16 LPA Total students 7367 6986 6557 Students placed 977 1271 1253 Students opted for higher studies 587 750 590 Particulars PG 3-year 2021 2022 2023 Median package INR 9 LPA INR 13.6 LPA INR 14 LPA Total students 2069 1923 1934 Students placed 41 67 77 Students opted for higher studies 81 96 96

faqs.question: How much does BCom at University of Delhi cost?
faqs.answer: Delhi University BCom/ BCom (H) fee structure is cumulative of various components, such as tuition fees, caution money, etc. The total tuition fees for the UG course range from INR 540 to INR 1 lakh . This fee range is inclusive of course fees at the DU-affiliated colleges. Once final selection is done, candidates need to pay the admission fee amount. It must be noted that the fee range given here is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

highlights.description: One of India’s top schools is DU. Numerous national and international ranking agencies have continuously recognised it as one of the best institutes. According to the NIRF Ranking 2025, the institute has been awarded #15 rank in the Overall category, #5 under University, and #12 under Research Institutions. DU is also ranked internationally by QS World Rankings 2025 at #328 position. The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around DU rankings.

nirf.description:
DU has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'University' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for DU indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, DU climbed 1 rank to #5 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It has been noticed that in the 'Research Institutions' category, the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared against previous year's ranking. In 2025, DU climbed 2 ranks to #12 rank in the 'Research Institutions' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

outlook.description:
According to the rankings from Outlook, DU outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is to be noted that the DU's rankings in 'Central Universities' category have demonstrated an increasing trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, DU climbed 1 rank to #3 rank in the 'Central Universities' category by the Outlook ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.

qs_world.description:
DU has earned commendable rankings across different domains in the QS World University Rankings 2026. This signifies the institution's esteemed reputation and proficiency in various aspects, assigning it an overall good score. It can be seen that the DU's rankings in 'Top Global Universities' category have displayed a fluctuating trend as per the ranks of the previous years. In 2026, DU's rank is #328, the same as last year's rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings.
The rankings of the institute in the 'Asia' category have demonstrated a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, DU fell 14 ranks to #95 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Rankings achieved by the institute under the 'Southern Asia' category have exibited a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, DU fell 2 ranks to #10 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Daulat Ram College, University of DelhiReviewed on 11 Feb 2026)
reviews.review_heading: DRC is probably the second-best girls' college of DU.
reviews.review_text: The newly built building is perfect from AC classrooms to smart boards, we have them all. Our canteen too is amazing as it's an all-girls college and our canteen serves a variety of pastries. The only issue is with the auditorium as it needs serious development.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Delhi College of Arts and Commerce, University of DelhiReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The best commerce college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is mid, classrooms are decent, library is excellent. Infrastructure is 5/10, but is good for studies. There is no hostel. Canteen is working, but the food is not that good. Facilities for sports are not as needed, they need to be changed ASAP and work should be done soon.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Aditi Mahavidyalaya, University of DelhiReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The faculty members are good, but the infrastructure isn’t.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not that good. The Wi-Fi sometimes doesn’t work, and the facilities are limited. There is a canteen too, but since I don’t visit it much, I’m not aware of the food they provide. We also have a medical room that is better and good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Aditi Mahavidyalaya, University of DelhiReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Need to heavily work on infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: We don’t have a hostel for our college, so we have to take PGs nearby. The PGs are very bad, lack hygiene, and the food quality is very poor. The Wi-Fi doesn’t work all around the college. The infrastructure and facilities are very poor, and our college really needs to work on them.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Shyam Lal College, University of DelhiReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Decent college, could be considered as a last resort.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good for a college in a place like Shahdara, but it could have been better. For playing sports, we have a volleyball court and a ground where you can play football, cricket, etc. Hostel facilities are not provided by the college, so students have to make arrangements on their own.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Ram Lal Anand College, University of DelhiReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It has decent faculty and crowd.
reviews.review_text: Classes with AC and smart boards, a decent faculty with good facilities, including perfect benches, available Wi-Fi, and a good library, but insufficient reading material. There are no labs for political science students. The college does not provide hostels. Students live in PGs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Maitreyi College, University of DelhiReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: College is fine, as it is only for girls, so it is better.
reviews.review_text: There are plenty of facilities here, and there is Wi-Fi in the college. There is also a library in which all books, etc., are available. There is a canteen near the library where you don't get much good food. You get samosas and some other snacks. The college does not have its own hostel. According to me, everyone lives in private PGs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Hansraj College, University of DelhiReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Hansraj College, University of Delhi.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided are top-notch. There are air-conditioned libraries, laboratories, cafeterias and classrooms. The entire campus has Wi-Fi. So it is very comfortable for students. The hostel is very affordable and comfortable. The mess food is amazing.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sri Venkateswara College, University of DelhiReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My experience of SVC Delhi.
reviews.review_text: There are two buildings in our college and 3 blocks. It has big classrooms with modern teaching methods. The college has a canteen, and the food there is affordable. It has sports facilities like outdoor and indoor games. Overall, the facilities are good and luxurious.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Daulat Ram College, University of DelhiReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Average infrastructure, and faculty, and not great ROI.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are decent, Wi-Fi works but can be slow, and the library is very good with lots of study space. Hostel facilities are okay, mess food is average, and the canteen is better. Basic medical help and sports facilities are available. Hostel rooms are okay and manageable, mess food is average (some days better than others), and the canteen is more popular than the mess.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Ramanujan College, University of DelhiReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Ramanujan College, Delhi University.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is better than other colleges. A new wing is under construction and will be ready to use in about 2–3 months. Classrooms have sufficient space for 60 students, the library is spacious, Wi-Fi is available, and the canteen is also available with good food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Hindu College, University of DelhiReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good. To be honest, I consider this college as the best decision of my life.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities and infrastructure are upgraded and provide the best output to each and every student, be it Wi-Fi for classes, labs for experiments, or classrooms to study. Food is moderate, to be honest, because it is prepared in large bulk, but it’s more than sufficient for the need. Medical facilities are also average, there are huge numbers of people in college, so facilities are there, but it’s not up to the mark. Sports and games are very good. I like their quality of training and prac...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Acharya Narendra Dev College, University of DelhiReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Average college with an average crowd.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite average, the college does have basic facilities, but lacks research infrastructure. The classrooms are average too, they lack ACs. The library is okayish with a limited selection of books. The college is not for students wanting to build a career in sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dyal Singh College, University of DelhiReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The library of the college is pretty good, and it has sufficient space for studying. The Wi-Fi of the college provides good internet speed, and the classrooms are very big and open. The canteen provides good food at a reasonable price. The events for sports are conducted regularly.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Dyal Singh College, University of DelhiReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: College life through my lens.
reviews.review_text: Computer labs and good classrooms are available for commerce classes, but the cons are that some equipment is outdated and doesn't work properly. There is no hostel facility in DSC. Canteen food is really good and affordable for the students. Sports like football, cricket, basketball, and badminton are also available.

college_info.intro:
Sister Nivedita University offers various Undergraduate, Postgraduate, and PhD courses in the fields of Science, Humanities, Engineering, Social Sciences, Agricultural Sciences, etc. The flagship courses at SNU Kolkata are MBA, BTech, and BSc. Students can apply for various courses through online application. SNU eligibility criteria varies from course to course.
SNU Kolkata BTech programme is offered in full-time for the duration of four-years. The university offers BTech specilisation in CSE, Cyber Security, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Data Science, and others. SNU BTech admission is based on merit and entrance exams. The university also accepts BTech Lateral entry. Sister Nivedita University BTech fees ranges between INR 6.57 lakh- INR 9.03 lakh.
Sister Nivedita University courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Sister Nivedita University in the table provided below:

Majority opted in India

Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities

Love being in college

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Sister Nivedita University?

faqs.answer: A:    Sister Nivedita University conducts SNUET for admission to UG and PG programmes. However, aspirants with any of the accepted national or state-level entrance exam scores can also get admission. The university considers WBJEE, GATE, etc. for admission to specific programmes. Once selected based on entrance-exam score, candidates have to confirm their seat by paying the course fee.
faqs.question: Can I join Sister Nivedita University without SNUET?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates who have passed a three-year graduation degree with at least 55% aggregate are eligible to apply for Sister Nivedita University MBA programme. Aspirants appearing in the final year exam can also apply. Besides, candidates also need to pass GMAT, CAT, JEMAT or MAT for admission to MBA course.

review_content.Placements: The college does not provide any sort of related placement or internship at B.Sc. Level. The only placement you will get is for sales and marketing with an annual package of 2 to 3 LPA that also only a few students got an opportunity from my batch.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is not too big, but the classrooms are okay, the labs are air conditioned and the library has free Wi-Fi. Labs are highly equipped and you will get to learn each piece of equipment thoroughly. They do provide good hostel facility but outside the campus.

reviews_list.review_title: Excellent faculty, good infrastructure and facilities, satisfactory food.

review_content.Placements: In the M.A. in English course, the faculty regularly keep the students informed and updated with new placement and internship opportunities in various fields, including travel, sales, corporate, and even reputed. Organizations like British Council, and the students are also given the opportunity to apply for internships at the university as well.

faqs.answer: Sister Nivedita University admissions are open currently. Candidates can fill out the SNU application form online on the university's website. Aspirants have to register with an application fees of INR 1,000.

faqs.answer: Yes, Sister Nivedita University offers direct admission based on CUET-UG scores. Eligible candidates may be further contacted via email for counselling and admission. Shortlisted aspirants have to take admission by verification and submission of required documents. Candidates selected based on CUET-UG scores have to pay at least 50% of annual fee to confirm their seat in the university.

overview_faqs.question: Is Sister Nivedita University a good university?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Sister Nivedita University is a good university as it has more than 39 years of experience and is recognised by the UGC. The university is recognised by the UGC and is approved by the AICTE, PCI, BCI, and WBNC. In addition to this, Sister Nivedita University has a dedicated placement cell that has decent connections with top-notch companies such as Amazon, Microsoft, Ashok Leyland, Bosch, HP, etc.

review_summary.college_name: Sister Nivedita University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in English - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A temple for learning and individual growth.

content.Placements: Most of the students of my department have been given a chance for internship at a well-established and reputed area. From the creative field to the corporate world, every interest is given a chance to experience and flourish. Top recruiters are Aajkal, Republic, British Council, SVF, Hoichoi, Amazon, Wipro, TCS. Around 80 percent of the department receives placement opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The collection of books in the library is really helpful for having a strong hold on the syllabus. It has a wide range of hardcopy books as well as provides a good source of digital platform libraries. Thousands of books from different languages and genres find their place in the library.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good learning environment with Industry exposure.

content.Placements: Placements are decent, about 70 to 75 percent of my seniors got placed in the Big Four. If you have the skillset, you can easily crack the interview and get placed. Other details I can provide after completing my course, but my seniors said it has been an amazing journey for them. I am also looking forward to studying and getting placed.
content.Infrastructure: There are comfortable sitting arrangements for students, Wi-Fi and lab facilities are also available, and unlimited access to informative physical and digital books in the library makes it very student-friendly, especially in this age where everything is online. On campus, food trucks are there with lots of tasty and healthy options to choose from.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Microbiology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Excellent labs, but syllabus not upto the mark .

content.Placements: The college does not provide any sort of related placement or internship at B.Sc. Level. The only placement you will get is for sales and marketing with an annual package of 2 to 3 LPA that also only a few students got an opportunity from my batch.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is not too big, but the classrooms are okay, the labs are air conditioned and the library has free Wi-Fi. Labs are highly equipped and you will get to learn each piece of equipment thoroughly. They do provide good hostel facility but outside the campus.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in English - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Excellent faculty, good infrastructure and facilities, satisfactory food.

content.Placements: In the M.A. in English course, the faculty regularly keep the students informed and updated with new placement and internship opportunities in various fields, including travel, sales, corporate, and even reputed. Organizations like British Council, and the students are also given the opportunity to apply for internships at the university as well.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well above satisfactory, with classrooms big enough to accommodate the whole strength of the batch comfortably, an auditorium that can hold all attendees for different events, board rooms equipped with current technologies for smooth meetings and conferences. Food trucks at the university offering a wide variety of options with quality above average.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in English - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Supportive facility, structured curriculum and a well maintained campus

content.Placements: 97 percent of students get placements in roles such as a translator, content writer, HR, accountant and many others. The highest package was 51 LPA whereas the lowest package was 15 LPA. The placement cell is very helpful for students in providing internships and jobs.
content.Infrastructure: It has a modern campus with spacious classrooms. The department also provides the facilities of A. C and Wi-Fi for students. The library is also having large space and well-equipped books, e-resources, and journals that are very helpful for students. Hostel facilities are also very good and well maintained with hygiene. 24/7 security for safety purposes. Food is also good, healthy and made with hygiene.

admission_overview.title: Sister Nivedita University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Sister Nivedita University or SNU admission 2026 is entrance-based. The university conducts the SNUET exam for admission to most of the UG & PG courses. Apart from this, SNU also accepts scores of national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, CLAT, CAT, MAT, etc., for specific courses. Sister Nivedita University offers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels across various streams such as Engineering, Law, Science, Arts, etc. Candidates can fill out the form online for the preferred course.

eligibility_selection.title: Sister Nivedita University Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: The university offers courses in full-time mode. Candidates applying for a course must fulfil the specified eligibility criteria. SNUET is accepted for all the UG and PG courses offered at SNU. Aspirants can also get direct admission based on their CUET-UG scores. Below are the SNU courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:

paragraphs: SNU admission processincludes registration, selection, admission confirmation and fee payment. Below are the steps of the same:-
SNU Application Process 2026
Candidates have to fill out theSister Nivedita University application formon the university website or collect it from the campus. Students have to pay an application fees of INR 1,000.
Selection Rounds

Admission to all the courses is entirely entrance-based. SNUET is a common entrance exam accepted for all the UG & PG courses offered at the university. However, the university also accepts scores of national or state-level entrance exams such as WBJEE, GATE, etc. Candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria and qualify the entrance exams to confirm their admission. Students may also need to come for a PI round for admission to some courses.
Final Admission

All selected candidates are provided with an Admission offer letter, further guidelines and other details through e-mail. Shortlisted students are then required to deposit the first instalment of theSNU feesto confirm their seat in the university. Check below the common documents required at the time of admission:

faqs.question: What is the minimum eligibility requirement at Sister Nivedita University for B.Tech?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have completed Class 12 in Science stream with at least 60% aggregate are eligible to apply for the Sister Nivedita University BTech course. Besides, aspirants must also pass any of the accepted entrance exams for BTech admission. The university considers WBJEE or SNUET scores for BTech.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at Sister Nivedita University?

faqs.question: How can I get admission in BTech at Sister Nivedita University?
faqs.answer: Sister Nivedita University offers admission to BTech (Hons)/ Hons with Research course based on scores of candidates in WBJEE or SNUET. The university conducts SNUET for admission to BTech and other UG and PG courses. Besides, aspirants should also meet the eligibility criteria for admission in the SNU BTech course.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does Sister Nivedita University accept for admission to B.Tech?
faqs.answer: Sister Nivedita University considers WBJEE or SNUET score for admission to BTech programme. SNUET is conducted online by the university. It is a one-hour multiple choice test. Aspirants selected based on entrance exam scores are sent an admission offer letter. Shortlisted aspirants need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

This course is offered across various specialisations such as General,Sports Management, Healthcare Management and Business Analytics. Admission to this course is entirely entrance-based. Candidates with valid GMAT, CAT, JEMAT, MAT scores for MBA.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at Sister Nivedita University?
faqs.answer: Yes, MBA courses are available at Sister Nivedita University and are offered full-time. Additionally, the university provides majorly four specialisations in the course, such as Healthcare Management, Sports Management, Business Analytics and General. For admission to these courses, the university accepts the national-level entrance examinations i.e., MAT, CAT, and JEMAT. Additionally, SNU grants admission based on in-house entrance examination i.e., SNUET scores.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at Sister Nivedita University?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed a three-year graduation degree with at least 55% aggregate are eligible to apply for Sister Nivedita University MBA programme. Aspirants appearing in the final year exam can also apply. Besides, candidates also need to pass GMAT, CAT, JEMAT or MAT for admission to MBA course.

placement_report.college_name: Sister Nivedita University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: Sister Nivedita University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The 2025 or 2024 SNU placement record has not been released. The University concluded its placement drive for the Class of 2023 with a 97% placement rate. As per the latest report, the highest and average packages offered during SNU Kolkata placements 2023 stood at INR 51 LPA and INR 6.50 LPA , respectively. Over 270 recruiters participated in placements 2023 and placed students in various sectors . The top recruiters of Sister Nivedita University placements 2023 included Amazon, Deloitte, EY, Infosys, Wipro, TCS, IBM , etc.

The NIRF report 2025 has also been released for Pharmacy and Law courses. The median package offered to BPharma students during SNU placements 2024 was INR 2.86 LPA . The median salary offered to LLB and BA LLB / BBA LLB / BCom LLB students was INR 3.60 LPA and INR 3.60 LPA .

hostel_campus.college_name: Sister Nivedita University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: SNU provide an interactive, holistic, healthy and academic-oriented environment for students. Sister Nivedita University hostels are gender segregated and independent. The entire hostel facility is maintained by professional housekeeping and maintenance agencies that have vast exposure in the corporate climate. A global agency has been deployed for pest control and they work in defined periodic cycles, which is monitored and reported. This agency uses a combination of biodegradable and eco-friendly chemicals that does not impact our environment and is part of our commitment towards sustainability. A 24x7 security system, using male and female guarding staff, as appropriate, is deployed and very closely monitored by a vigilant and robust security matrix. Students from different cultures and backgrounds are treated with respect and dignity fueled by guidance and encouragement from the teaching team, as well as supported by excellent resources.

library.description: Sister Nivedita University library is housed in a state-of-the-art infrastructure and equipped with latest instruments to meet academic requirements. It offers its users the convenient access to the best of books, journals, magazines, eBooks from globally known publishers, e-journals consisting of scholarly contents both in print and electronic round the clock all across the campus. The major focus of the SNU library is to provide online/ digital learning resources that will allow users to access them anywhere, at any time. Apart from relevant text-books, a number of books of general value and interest are also available.

reviews.review_heading: A temple for learning and individual growth.
reviews.review_text: The collection of books in the library is really helpful for having a strong hold on the syllabus. It has a wide range of hardcopy books as well as provides a good source of digital platform libraries. Thousands of books from different languages and genres find their place in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Good learning environment with Industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: There are comfortable sitting arrangements for students, Wi-Fi and lab facilities are also available, and unlimited access to informative physical and digital books in the library makes it very student-friendly, especially in this age where everything is online. On campus, food trucks are there with lots of tasty and healthy options to choose from.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent labs, but syllabus not upto the mark .
reviews.review_text: The campus is not too big, but the classrooms are okay, the labs are air conditioned and the library has free Wi-Fi. Labs are highly equipped and you will get to learn each piece of equipment thoroughly. They do provide good hostel facility but outside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty, good infrastructure and facilities, satisfactory food.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well above satisfactory, with classrooms big enough to accommodate the whole strength of the batch comfortably, an auditorium that can hold all attendees for different events, board rooms equipped with current technologies for smooth meetings and conferences. Food trucks at the university offering a wide variety of options with quality above average.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive facility, structured curriculum and a well maintained campus
reviews.review_text: It has a modern campus with spacious classrooms. The department also provides the facilities of A. C and Wi-Fi for students. The library is also having large space and well-equipped books, e-resources, and journals that are very helpful for students. Hostel facilities are also very good and well maintained with hygiene. 24/7 security for safety purposes. Food is also good, healthy and made with hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: The journey was good and memorable.
reviews.review_text: The campus was quite spacious, with plenty of room to sit, walk, and even play some games. It featured a basketball court and a library with numerous subject-related books. There was also a seminar hall where various webinars were held. The classrooms were clean and appropriately sized based on the number of students in each section. However, the number of elevators was relatively low compared to the number of students.

reviews.review_heading: As per this review, come to this college and you will definitely not think of leaving this college.
reviews.review_text: I don’t know about the hostel as I don’t stay in the hostel, but from my friends, I got to know that it is well maintained and food is also served in good quality. For the course infrastructure, the classrooms and library are in good condition with Wi-Fi and projectors. Sports and games communities are there too, which organize many events and guide you for representing the college in AIU.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members are very good. They all have separate departments. There are many faculty members to teach us. They are very friendly to us. They help us in every academic situation. They teach us with effort.

reviews.review_heading: SNU gives students opportunities to build careers with minimal cost and great facilities.
reviews.review_text: All the required apparatus, reagents, incubators, freezer, and all other lab necessities are readily available in the air-conditioned labs. We have 5 labs in our department, including animal and plant biotechnology labs, which are sufficiently equipped for undergrad students. Classrooms are comfortable, spacious, and classes are easier to follow with the help of projectors and whiteboards.

reviews.review_heading: SNU builds a strong academic foundation and promises biotechnology opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our college. The labs of the biotechnology department are well-equipped. It has almost all the instruments that are required for students pursuing biotechnology in UG and PG. The reagents are orderly arranged. The lab assistants of our department work tremendously to keep everything in its proper place. We have a plant issue culture lab and an animal issue culture lab (not every highly equipped, but enough for UG students). Classrooms are quite big enough to accommodate 60-...

reviews.review_heading: Overall good if you are a nerd, else fest are very less.
reviews.review_text: Accommodation is extremely good, and the college has very well-equipped labs with high configuration laptops like i7 processors and 16 GB RAM. It has table tennis, a gym inside, fully air-conditioned classrooms, Wi-Fi in the hostel but not in class, and a library.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, supportive faculty, modern infrastructure, and overall great campus life.
reviews.review_text: It has advanced infrastructure with modern teaching techniques. My College has a good and safe hostel with several facilities like Wi-Fi, fridge, washing machines, etc. My college has advanced infrastructure with modern classrooms, well-equipped labs, a rich library, and reliable Wi-Fi across the campus. The canteen provides decent food, and medical as well as sports facilities are also available, making student life balanced and secure.

reviews.review_heading: Very good and supportive faculty members, moderate level placements, and a good environment.
reviews.review_text: We have one classroom for 1st year students, and from 2nd year we have specialisation-based classrooms. 24/7 Wi-Fi and a computer are provided. The food in the canteen is average, but we are also provided with different food trucks.

reviews.review_heading: It has great campus life, modern facilities, and good placement support.
reviews.review_text: Sister Nivedita University boasts a modern Wi-Fi-enabled smart classroom, fully equipped labs, and a digital library accessible 24/7. Hostels are gender segregated, hygienic, and secure, with furnished rooms. Mess/canteen serves healthy, affordable meals. Medical care is robust, with doctors and emergency staff on campus. A well-maintained sports complex offers cricket, basketball, a gym, and indoor games, ensuring a well-rounded campus experience.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: I think my college has great infrastructure. We have very nice labs, and there are many computers. We have free internet service, and the classrooms are good with AC. We don't have a hostel, but the canteens are good.

a) This Scholarship is granted directly by the Hon’ble Chancellor, Sister Nivedita University.
b) Under this scholarship scheme, a remission of 50 % to 100 % of total fees is waived for needy students, and the candidate should maintain a good academic record per semester.
Note: Chancellor Merit cum Means Scholarship requires a family income certificate from any of the following, which would be considered for awarding the scholarship
i. Any Government Gazetted Officer not below the rank of BDO in the case of rural areas.
ii. Executive Officer in case of Municipality.
iii. Any Govt. Gazetted Officer not below the rank of Deputy Secretary in case of Corporation.

Any talent in the field of sports, performing arts (e.g. singing, dancing, drama, etc.), visual arts (e.g. painting, sculpture, etc.), who has represented the State or Nation at a National or International level, may be offered 50% scholarship which is equivalent to 50% of the Tuition Fee payable by the student. Depending upon the applicant's merit the scholarship amount may be increased with due approval of the Scholarship Committee.
If the candidate qualifies for his/her previous examination from any of the Institutes under Techno India Group, he/she will be offered a 15% scholarship of tuition fees.
For detailed information, candidates can check SNU Scholarship details .

courses.overview: Dr.Subhash University Courses & Fees 2025 Dr. Subhash University offers various UG and PG courses in the stream of Science, Computer Application, Engineering and Management. Admission to all the UG and PG courses at the university is both merit and entrance-based. Admission to courses such as BTech and MCA is done based on GUJCET and CMAT entrance exams, respectively. Similarly, for other courses, the university accepts a valid score of several state/ national-level entrance exams. Those who are willing to get admission to either of the courses at Dr. Subhash University must visit the official website of the university and fill an online application form.

faqs.answer: The Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) in Microbiology programme at DR Subhash University, Junagadh, offers an exciting journey into the microscopic world of microorganisms, providing students with a comprehensive understanding of their structure, function, and importance in various fields. This programme is meticulously designed to prepare students for careers in microbiology research, biotechnology, healthcare, and environmental science. Through theoretical coursework, laboratory experiments, fieldwork, and research projects, students gain hands-on experience and practical skills in microbiological techniques, laboratory analysis, and data interpretation.

course_faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for BPharm at Dr. Subhash University?
course_faqs.answer: Dr. Subhash University BPharm fee is INR 3.5 lakh. The fee structure is sourced from unofficial sources, hence indicative. The fee might cover various academic expenses like tuition fees, laboratory charges, examination fees, library fees, and other relevant charges. It is important to note that the fee structure is subject to change, and candidates are advised to refer to the official website of the university for the latest and most accurate fee structure.

course_faqs.question: What is the fee for BPharm at Dr. Subhash University?
course_faqs.answer: The annual fee for a four-year BPharm course at Dr Subhash University is INR 87,097. There are some fee components that need to be paid during the fee submission such as the admission fee and security deposit, where the security fee gets refunded later on. There is also an application amount that is to be paid at the time of filling out the application form.

course_faqs.question: Is BPharm available at Dr. Subhash University?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, BPharm course is available at Dr. Subhash University. The university offers BPharm courses at the UG level. Candidate must meet the eligibility criteria to enrol for BPharm course admission is set by the university. Aspirants must pass Class 12 and must have a valid score in one entrance exam accepted by the university i.e. GUJCET/NEET.

review_summary.college_name: Dr. Subhash University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Microbiology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Microbiology in Subhash University.

content.Placements: Not getting placement in this course because the course is not a very high course; it is a basic course. No companies are recruiting for this course. There is a 6-month internship in the 6th semester, and students study about the environment and get M.Sc. in Microbiology.
content.Infrastructure: Not very good. Food in hostel is bad, no Wi-Fi facility, no library. I do not live in the hostel, I live in a PG near the university. PG is cheaper than the hostel, has better food, and good rooms. So I prefer to join PG because of the food and small rooms in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Pharmacy is better in DSU.

content.Placements: Only 20% of the students are getting placed in companies, and the lowest package was 5 Lacs per annum, while the highest package is 24 Lacs per annum, with an average of 7-9 Lacs per annum. There are no top recruiting companies in college. Many companies come and get students based on their own talent.
content.Infrastructure: Not a good hostel for girls. Only a girls' hostel is available, while boys stay in PGs nearby. The university department is good, and teachers and professors are very knowledgeable and talented. There's a good atmosphere around the college. It's a nice place with not much noise, and we can perform every experiment as well.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in CAD/CAM - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best university in Junagadh.

content.Placements: Around 60-70% of Mechanical Students got placed with packages ranging from 2-5 LPA, mainly in companies like Tata, Jyoti CNC, and Atul Auto. Mechanical placements were decent with a 60% selection rate. 3 LPA is the average package. Top recruiters are Tata, Adani, and Atul Auto.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are well-equipped with modern machines, and the hostel offers clean rooms with good facilities. The campus infrastructure is good, with fully functional mechanical labs and a well-maintained hostel. The student-friendly hostel makes the overall experience satisfying.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Microbiology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Microbiology student is not a good decision for DSU.

content.Placements: Not a very good course as there is a very small size required for research. 100 students are getting this course in our university and I do not know if one can get a job in this field. I do not like the college course because I do not see why we should want to learn biochemistry in this course.
content.Infrastructure: There is no good hostel because there is only a girls hostel and no boys hostel in university. Any of the girls are leaving the hostel because of the bad food and rooms are small not a good space. They do not want to live in hostel and no Wi-Fi facility in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Microbiology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: DSU Microbiology explanation.

content.Placements: Placements in this course are not very good because there is no company that hires B.Sc. Microbiology students. Out of 100 students, 89 Biology students choose Microbiology, but it is not a good course. That is why Microbiology is not a good option. There are no top recruiting companies.
content.Infrastructure: I do not like hostel management, which is why I live in a PG. The hostel is not a better option because the fees are very high. The food is not good, and many students stay in PG because of the food. Additionally, there is no proper Wi-Fi, and the atmosphere is not good.

paragraphs: Dr. Subhash University admission is based on merit or entrance exam scores. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process for admission. Find below the detailed steps forSubhash University admission process:
Dr. Subhash University Application Process

The admission process at Dr. Subhash University commences with the application process. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can fill out the application form online. To fill out the application form, candidates are required to visit the official website of the university.
Selection Rounds

Admission to all the courses is merit-based except BPharma, BAMS and BPT, the university accepts NEET and GUJCET scores. To be eligible for admission candidates are required to complete the eligibility and selection criteria set by the university.
Admission Confirmation
After candidates get shortlisted, they need to come for the document verification. Selected candidates need to payDr. Subhash University feeto confirm their admission.

paragraphs: Dr Subhash University (DSU) has completed the placement drive for batch passing out in 2023. As per the latest reports, the highest and average package offered to students during DSU placements 2023 was INR 11 LPA and INR 3 LPA , respectively. Further, 53 recruiters visited the campus for the 2023 placement process and placed 150 students from BTech , MTech , and other courses. The top recruiters included Paramsoft Global Solutions, Cogent Soft Solutions - Rajkot, A & K Infoline, DRC System , and many others.

description: Dr. Subhash University cutoff 2025 is finally out for candidates seeking admission to BTech and BPharma programs. The GUJCET cutoff has been released for all categories and rounds for students belonging to the HS and AI quota. Candidates can also view other exam cutoffs from the exam-wise sections given below. Further updates are down below:

The Dr. Subhash University cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Dr. Subhash University BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 25717 and 33385 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Civil Engineering. The first round cutoff rank for
