On the contrary the least competitive specialisations for admission in 2024 were B.Tech. in Computer Engineering and with closing cutoff ranks of and , respectively.

Dr. Subhash University GUJCET cutoff 2025 concluded with the final round cutoff list being published for various All India and Home State quota categories, like General, OBC, SC, etc. The cutoff was released for admission to B.E./ B.Tech course.
For the General HS category, the overall B.E./ B.Tech cutoff ranged from 968 to 36192. According to the last round, the most competitive branch for admission was ,

This section provides the closing ranks for 2025, 2024, and 2023 for various categories, rounds, courses, and quotas. Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff trend for the past 3 years.

In the final round for the General HS category, the Dr. Subhash University B.E./ B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged from 968 to 36192, wherein the toughest branch was B.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning).

The Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC) released the GUJCET 2025 cutoffs for various participating institutions for admissions to all branches, rounds, categories, and quotas. reviews.review_heading: Microbiology in Subhash University.
reviews.review_text: Not very good. Food in hostel is bad, no Wi-Fi facility, no library. I do not live in the hostel, I live in a PG near the university. PG is cheaper than the hostel, has better food, and good rooms. So I prefer to join PG because of the food and small rooms in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Pharmacy is better in DSU.
reviews.review_text: Not a good hostel for girls. Only a girls' hostel is available, while boys stay in PGs nearby. The university department is good, and teachers and professors are very knowledgeable and talented. There's a good atmosphere around the college. It's a nice place with not much noise, and we can perform every experiment as well.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best university in Junagadh.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well-equipped with modern machines, and the hostel offers clean rooms with good facilities. The campus infrastructure is good, with fully functional mechanical labs and a well-maintained hostel. The student-friendly hostel makes the overall experience satisfying.

reviews.review_heading: Microbiology student is not a good decision for DSU.
reviews.review_text: There is no good hostel because there is only a girls hostel and no boys hostel in university. Any of the girls are leaving the hostel because of the bad food and rooms are small not a good space. They do not want to live in hostel and no Wi-Fi facility in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: DSU Microbiology explanation.
reviews.review_text: I do not like hostel management, which is why I live in a PG. The hostel is not a better option because the fees are very high. The food is not good, and many students stay in PG because of the food. Additionally, there is no proper Wi-Fi, and the atmosphere is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Dr Subhash University’s Botany experience.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is not good because there is no boys’ hostel, so boys live only in PG's. The girls’ hostel is allowed, but it is not good for girls because many of the girls are not happy with the management. The food is very watery and not good. There are no proper rules in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: DSU offers a B.Sc. in Chemistry.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is not good. PG is a better option. The food in the mess is not good, and there is no Wi-Fi in the hostel. There are no proper rules in the hostel, and the security guards are old. The quality of food is bad.

reviews.review_heading: Review of DSU B.Sc. Mathematics Students.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is not very good. Otherwise, PG is a better option. The mess food is not good, and there is no Wi-Fi in the hostel. There are no strict rules, and the security guards are old. The food quality is poor. Our faculty is very good and supports us in every way.

reviews.review_heading: Dr. Subhas University campus.
reviews.review_text: Very bad hostel and very bad food. Many of the boys are leaving and live in PG because of food problems. There are 6 boys in a room of the hostel, and the price of the hostel is not very good and the services are not good, not value for money. No extra facility in 70,000. No Wi-Fi facility and not good for boys.

reviews.review_heading: It creates an optimistic environment for students.
reviews.review_text: Even though various departments attended drives, the department of BCA scored the highest position in the placement process. All of us underwent the same training process to avoid differentiation among us. The highest salary package offered to recruited talents is 16.3 LPA in the BCA department.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are helpful and supportive.
reviews.review_text: Our department meets all requirements, featuring well-equipped Wi-Fi labs, clean classrooms, and a peaceful library. The quality of faculty is excellent, and the behavior of both old and new faculty members is supportive and respectful. There are personal medical facilities available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: This college helped me in my projects to go next level and in funding too.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility is good for all girls and boys, It is safe for everyone. Hostel mess is also good and it's easy to come and go to college. The college is near to campus so it wouldn't be difficult for anyone. Attendance is also being maintained.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of supportive staff members and good placements in 2021.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are provided in our college. For example, free Wi-Fi and food. There is a vast canteen in college from which students can get fresh food. Classrooms are wide. It is mandatory to perform all practicals in labs, otherwise, faculty will fail in practical exams. Every year college celebrates each festival like Navratri, Ganesh Chaturthi, etc.

reviews.review_heading: If anyone wants to study in Junagadh then our college is the best.
reviews.review_text: The facilities like Wi-Fi are enabled. Laboratories such as computer laboratories, pharmacy laboratories, library are also there, but with not much stock if more than 15-20 students want the same course books then other than them, no more books for other students i.e. limited drinking water and playing ground are there. I am a day scholar, but the food is good. In the canteen also the food is oily, and the medical facility is provided. But limited sports equipment is there.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is useless if placement is not good, mine was the worst in 2016.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure of campus and hostel was good above average, has Wi-Fi facilities in college and hostels, and labs were also dedicated to each seperate departments, in my course HVAC lab also they have built to show live experiments. Classrooms also has decent space, big space, and step wise sitting arrangements.
Library is also above average, mostly all the books related to your course you can find other magazines, newspapers in it.
Hostel facilities are good, each person has bed and one T. V. f...

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by Topiwala National Medical College, Mumbai are approved by eminent Government bodies like NMC. The combined seats available for courses offered at Topiwala National Medical College, Mumbai goes up to 391.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Topiwala National Medical College, Mumbai?

review_content.General: It is a medical college so there is no direct relevance of recruiting companies. It is based on how you focus on study, but the academic facilities are best given by this college for study purposes practically on a clinical basis.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college includes a lab with equipments, library and reading room for 24 hrs with air-conditioners. Wi-Fi facility is also available in the library. The hostel has good rooms and a canteen. There is also a ground for us for sports in which we conduct various events.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is an amazing college with a great experience.

review_content.Placements: All the students have to work for 2 years of bond service. The salary offered is Rs. 60,000-80,000 per month, which is based on the locality in which you are working. There is a 1-year compulsory internship with a stipend in our college. The role offered is a medical officer. Students get options to appear for PLAB and USMLE to apply for a PG program in other countries.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classroom capacity is 150-200 students. There is 1 college building and 8 hospital buildings with 3,000 beds capacity. There are 3 canteens, a football ground on the hostel campus, tiffin services, special beds reserved for medical students, TT tables, and carrom boards in the boys' common room.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for academics in Maharashtra.

review_content.Placements: Our college has 150 seats for MBBS every year. Our hospital offers more than 5 LPA for MBBS graduates. After the degree, a one-year internship is compulsory for every student. MBBS students are offered one of the highly paid jobs in India.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities in our college are well-experienced and qualified. Our college has big classrooms, library, genetic and chemical labs for experimental analysis. The library has comfortable seats and Wi-Fi support. Our hostel has clean rooms. In each room, there are 2 students. There is a big ground attached to the hostel.

review_summary.college_name: Topiwala National Medical College, Mumbai Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Academic excellence and MBBS journey.

content.Placements: In my passing batch, around 60 percent of students are able to get placed through campus and hospital recruitment initiatives. The highest package offered is close to 22 LPA for some who join private multispeciality hospitals. The lowest is around 7 LPA for jobs in smaller clinics and rural hospitals. On average, most offers range between 10 to 15 LPA, especially for those choosing clinical roles in urban centers.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our medical college is pretty good. It definitely makes academic life smoother. As for the hostel, rooms are basic but comfortable. They offer the essentials like a study table, chair, and built-in cupboards. Dining facilities are satisfactory. The mess serves fresh meals with a rotating menu. So you don’t get bored of the food easily.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall, I want to state that this college is best for studies.

content.Placements: Since It is a Medical college, Placement doesn't bother students because for medical students PG exam is more important. Regarding Internship, Everyone goes through a compulsory and paid internship of 1 year after the completion of the 4th year. The government pays sum total of 12k per month for internees. After the internship, there is 1-year service bond in which wages are in the range of 50k-60k.
content.Infrastructure: To be more true and straight, Infrastructure will disappoint you because it comes under the old government colleges of India but construction and remodelling are going on and I hope it will surely improve our college infrastructure. Regarding labs, well-oriented labs with the availability of each and every instrument are there and free Wi-Fi is also available in the library. The girls' hostel is there on the campus itself and the boys' hostel is at Haji Ali road. The hostel is good with the accommodation of 4 students in each room. The hostel is available only after 1st year and the hostel charge is 4k per year (source:- college website). Food totally depends on the students what they want to eat and what's their budget. A mess facility is also available and the canteen is also good. According to my experience, your food cost will lie in the range of 4k-4 5k ( average). Regarding Sports I can assure you will love this college because out of all the medical Mumbai time has only a big playground where you can enjoy each and every outdoor sport. The clubhouse is also there in a hostel for indoors.

faqs.question: What has been the cutoff trend for MS in ENT (Otorhinolaryngology) at Topiwala National Medical College, Mumbai in last few years?
faqs.answer: The cutoff trend for MS at Topiwala National Medical College, Mumbai has been increasing in the recent years. In 2022, the closing rank for MS under general category for all India quota was 7380. hostel_campus.college_name: Topiwala National Medical College

reviews.review_heading: Academic excellence and MBBS journey.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our medical college is pretty good. It definitely makes academic life smoother. As for the hostel, rooms are basic but comfortable. They offer the essentials like a study table, chair, and built-in cupboards. Dining facilities are satisfactory. The mess serves fresh meals with a rotating menu. So you don’t get bored of the food easily.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I want to state that this college is best for studies.
reviews.review_text: To be more true and straight, Infrastructure will disappoint you because it comes under the old government colleges of India but construction and remodelling are going on and I hope it will surely improve our college infrastructure. Regarding labs, well-oriented labs with the availability of each and every instrument are there and free Wi-Fi is also available in the library. The girls' hostel is there on the campus itself and the boys' hostel is at Haji Ali road. The hostel is good with the acco...

reviews.review_heading: I am very well satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college includes a lab with equipments, library and reading room for 24 hrs with air-conditioners. Wi-Fi facility is also available in the library. The hostel has good rooms and a canteen. There is also a ground for us for sports in which we conduct various events.

reviews.review_heading: It is an amazing college with a great experience.
reviews.review_text: The classroom capacity is 150-200 students. There is 1 college building and 8 hospital buildings with 3,000 beds capacity. There are 3 canteens, a football ground on the hostel campus, tiffin services, special beds reserved for medical students, TT tables, and carrom boards in the boys' common room.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for academics in Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities in our college are well-experienced and qualified. Our college has big classrooms, library, genetic and chemical labs for experimental analysis. The library has comfortable seats and Wi-Fi support. Our hostel has clean rooms. In each room, there are 2 students. There is a big ground attached to the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides good teachers and academic facilities.
reviews.review_text: Students have a 7-floor college building and every classroom is well air-conditioned. The laboratories are spacious with new equipment. There is free Wi-Fi available in our building. Students have one big library and one reading room with good furniture. In the hostel, students live with 2 girls in one room with separate washrooms and time-to-time room cleaning facilities. Boys hostel have a playground with both indoor and outdoor sports facility.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college even though the campus infrastructure requires improvement.
reviews.review_text: The library is good and has a free Wi-Fi. The girls hostel doesn't even have a building, while boys hostel as a ground too near Mahalaxmi race course. There is no mess. There is a college canteen which serves mixed food at a decent price. Tiffin facilities are provided and can be availed. In games, only Table tennis is there but all the sports event are organized.

reviews.review_heading: It is a prestigious medical college of Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good here, and 24x7 Wi-Fi facility is available. There is an air-conditioned library, 24x7 reading room, quality drinking water, etc. Overall, our college provides good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Life at Topiwala National Medical College.
reviews.review_text: The college has a decent campus with everything needed for medical students. Classrooms, labs, and the library are all well-maintained. There's Wi-Fi facility in some areas. The hospital is attached to the college, so students get real-life training. The canteen is also there and serves okay food. The hostel is average but manageable.

college_info.intro:
Era University popular programmes are BSc and BPharma. BPharma students can become Pharmacists, Quality Controllers, Clinical Researchers, or can join various other careers relevant to their stream. BSc and BPharma students are placed in top companies such as Pfizer, Lupin, Sun Pharma, Mankind, Cipla, and others. Era University students are taught technical, communication, and various other skills.
Students opting for BSc Nursing degree courses are trained for generalised Nursing including the midwifery practice. The students are provided with several opportunities to learn a whole range of new skills in addition to acquiring great knowledge related to the Nursing practice. Below mentioned are some of the Era University Lucknow courses and their respective eligibility and Era University fee structure:

review_summary.college_name: Era University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty members and placements, etc.

content.Placements: 90% students got placements in their UG course, while others opted for higher studies. Median package of this course is 12 LPA, which is offered by my hospital. Top recruiting companies are Cipla, Sun Pharma, Mankind, etc. Top roles are clinical roles, government and public sector roles, Pharma, research, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are good, and campuses are sprawling across approximately 26 to 40 acres. Wi-Fi, labs, a classroom, well stocked library, a lecture theatre, auditorium, and other facilities are also available on campus. The quality of food is good, and separate hostels for girls and boys are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Optometry - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with Era University because it is the best college for me.

content.Placements: About 80% of students got jobs in Lenskart and different eye hospitals. Some students go outside of India and do a job in an eye hospital and earn lots of money. Some students open their own clinics and they earn on their own.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are maintained well and good. Instruments are available for practice. Our lab and our hospital are so good. In our hostel, all facilities are available like electricity and water supply for the whole day. The food provided is also very good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Era University Lucknow is the college for students and helps them to complete their dreams.

content.Placements: Placements are provided by the college. Around 20-25% of students get placements after completing their courses. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA. The average salary package offered is 5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is around 2.5 LPA - 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Sun Pharma, Cipla, and many more. Many students get their internships. Pharmacist is the top role offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is excellent and provides better knowledge and an environment for students. There are proper labs and a library in our college for students,

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in CT Technician - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is best for the students to gain knowledge in this field.

content.Placements: More than 80 percent of college students get good placements. The highest package is about 30,000 rupees, and the lowest package is about 10,000 rupees. Lenskart and Apollo recruit here. More than 50 percent of students got internships from the college at companies like Lenskart and Siemens.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides good facilities. There is 24-hour Wi-Fi available in the college for students. The college provides library facilities all week; the library remains open on holidays. The college canteen has all types of food available.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in MRI Technician - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good college for placement.

content.Placements: By the college, more than fifty percent of students get placed well. Top recruiting companies are Lenskart and Apollo. The minimum offered by the college is 12,000. More than 80% of students got internships from the college. Top roles offered by the college are tutor.
content.Infrastructure: The college facilities are better, and their library facilities are also impressive. The labs of the college are better for getting experience. The hostel facilities may be good, and the college canteen is also better for the students. In sports, the college has no better facility.

admission_overview.college_name: Era University Admissions 2025: Courses and Fee structure, Admission Process and application form

paragraphs: Era University admissionis made on the basis of preset admission requirement. The university has an extensive range of courses in streams such asManagement,Science,Pharmacy,Medicine,Arts,& more across a wide range of specialisations. Admissions to courses atEra University(EU) is primarily entrance-based.

Admissions to Era University are both merit & entrance-based. The university offers an array of courses through its various departments & colleges such as Era's College of Pharmacy, College of Nursing, & more. Check out the table below forEra University Admission 2025 Highlights:

Theadmission criteria for Era University courses is entrance-basedfor most of its courses. The University conducts a screening test & candidates who get shortlisted after the test are then invited for the personal interview round. It also accepts valid scores obtained by the candidates in other national/state-level entrance exams such as NEET & CUET. Interested candidates can check out the table below for the eligibility & selection criteria of popularEra University courses:

The completefee structure of Era Universitycourses is inclusive of various components such as admission fees, tuition fees, alumni fees, etc. Candidates need to pay the admission fee after getting shortlisted for admission to secure their seats. Interested candidates can check out the table below for Era University course fees:
Know more aboutEra University course fees.
Note: The fees information mentioned above is taken from official sources & hence is subject to change.
Note: The seat information mentioned above is taken from official sources & hence is subject to change.

Era University admission processstarts with registration for a course. Candidates must select a course & apply online for admission. The college shortlists candidates based on their performance in the entrance test & interviews for most of its courses. For the remaining courses, merit obtained by the candidates in the last qualifying exam is considered. Interested students can follow the below-mentioned steps to complete theadmission process at Era University:
1: Era University Application Process 2026

Candidates have to apply online for the course of their choice. The Era University admission forms are available on its official website. Aspirants need to pay an application fee to register for a course. Alternatively, candidates can also visit the university campus to obtain theoffline application form &submit it at the admission cell of the university.
2: Selection Process of Era University

Aspirants need to pass 12th or equivalent to get admission to any undergraduate course. For postgraduate courses, a bachelor's degree is the min. qualification required. The University also conducts screening & interview rounds for students who are shortlisted based on the entrance exam.
3: Document Verification & Admission Confirmation of Era University

Shortlisted candidates are required to report at the university campus with original & self-attested academic documents & other documents for verification & four passport-sized photographs. Selected candidates will be notified within 10 days & they need to pay the admission fees to secure their seats

faqs: What is Era University NEET cutoff?
At what UP NEET rank will I get Era University?
description: Era University cutoff 2025 can be accessed on this page. Students seeking admission to the MBBS course via the NEET entrance examination can scroll down this page to know category, round and year-wise cutoff details.

Era University NEET UG Cutoff 2025 was concluded with the cutoff being released for the final round. The cutoff was released for admission to the MBBS course for various categories under the Home State quota.

For the General category students who belong to the Home State quota, the overall cutoff varied between 333303 and 617922. Students who secured a rank below 617922 could easily attain a seat for this course and category. Candidates can refer to the table below to know the first and last ro

In this section, students can view the Era University MBBS cutoff 2025, as well as for 2024 and 2023. For the General AI category, in 2025, the last round cutoff was 617922. In 2024 and 2023, the cutoffs were 458276 and 450582, respectively. As observed, this upward trend in the closing ranks says that the competition has become more lenient over the past 3 years.

Era University accepts the NEET UG entrance examination results, followed by the counselling process to offer admission to the MBBS course. Students who want the same can refer to the table below to view the NEET UG important dates 2026.

In this section, students can see the Era University MBBS cutoff 2025, as well as 2024 and 2023 for multiple rounds and quotas. In 2025, for the General HS category, the round 1 cutoff rank was 333303.

As more rounds were released, the cutoff increased to 460725 in round 2, and finally closing at 617922 in Round 4. In conclusion, we can say that Era University offered a wider window for students with higher rank numbers to secure admission. For more details, students can check the table below.

According to the UP NEET PG cutoff 2025, the top three most competitive MD specialisations were MD in Dermatology, Venereology and Leprosy, followed by MD in Radiology and MD in General Medicine, with the last round cutoff being 1614, 1803, and 2384, respectively.
Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff for other categories, rounds, etc., for the year 2024 and 2025.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty, placements, infrastructure, and moreover the education
reviews.review_text: Library is so good. All the books are available. Labs have dummies and all the instruments and articles are present. A huge playground. More connected to nature because of fresh flowers and trees. Wi-Fi is available. The canteen is so good. Medical facilities are so low in cost. Many of the OPDS are free.

reviews.review_heading: Good private university, just lacking here and there.
reviews.review_text: There is a single lab for all the subjects' practicals in the university. Some practicals are carried out in the Biochem and Micro labs in the college building. The classrooms are spacious and clean. There is hostel accommodation only for girls in the Allied courses, not for boys.

reviews.review_heading: Yes it is good university.
reviews.review_text: The residential facilities at Era University are the best. They offer both AC and non-AC options. For more detailed information, please visit the Era University website. The college infrastructure is good and very attractive. There are separate buildings for different courses, and a library is available for students. The campus has a cricket ground and a football ground for sports week. For lunch, there is a cafeteria and a canteen on campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with the college. Review: 4.2 out of 5.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is too good. The college has all the labs needed and also provides industrial and community visits. The college has its own library, and classrooms are air-conditioned. The college has its own canteen, and the mess food is also very good, like home food. The college also organizes sports events from time to time.

reviews.review_heading: Everything was good. Facilities are best and education was good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is pretty good here; you'll have a hospital and your college building near by. You also have a canteen that's pretty affordable for the quality of the food. They have big LT rooms for class attendees. Hostels also provide most of the facilities to the students, including quality food and different menus.

reviews.review_heading: The Era University life of the many students.
reviews.review_text: A lot of facilities are available here, and it seems quite like a hostel. We have access to everything in a hostel. It seems like a hostel here. There is also a library, which is quite good for the children, and access to computers is also available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: My experience in college is totally good. I got an internship and learned a lot.
reviews.review_text: I'm not a hosteler but the facilities and infrastructure of our department are good. We have laboratories, libraries and smart classrooms. We have access to a vast collection of books, journal and online resources related to biotechnology. Students are encouraged to participate in ongoing research projects.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the atmosphere for learning.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is pretty good here; you'll have a hospital and your college building near by. You also have a canteen that's pretty affordable for the quality of the food. They have big LT rooms for class attendees. 
Hostels also provide most of the facilities to the students, including quality food and different menus.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and labs were also available for practical.
reviews.review_text: Our college department building was well maintained and well dedicated to the students. Classrooms, labs and libraries are well organized. Hostel rooms were neat and clean. Hostel food qualities were good. Sports and games were also available. Medical facilities were also available.

college_info.college_name: Era University

data.description: Yes, Era University has separate hostel facilities for boys and girls within the campus. The rooms are well-equipped and offered on a twin-sharing basis. The hostel rooms are spacious and airy. The hostel rooms have study tables, wardrobes, and comfortable beds.
